items.title: Italian transposition of press publishers’ right may be compatible with EU law, though with caveats, says Grand Chamber
items.title_zh: CJEU大法庭：意大利新闻出版者权转化基本符合欧盟法
items.title_en: CJEU Grand Chamber: Italian Transposition of Press Publishers’ Right Compatible with EU Law
items.summary: Today, the Grand Chamber of the Court of Justice of the European Union (CJEU) issued its long-awaited judgment in Meta, C-797/23, a referral from TAR Lazio (Italy). The case sought to determine whether Italy’s transposition of the press publishers’ right under Article 15 of the DSM Directive – in particular the role of the Communications Authority (AGCOM) – is permitted under EU law, having
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟法院大法庭在Meta案（C-797/23）中裁定，意大利将《数字单一市场版权指令》第15条转化为国内法，特别是赋予通信管理局（AGCOM）相关职权，原则上符合欧盟法律框架。尽管存在特定限制条件，该判决确认了成员国在实施新闻出版者邻接权时的监管灵活性，为平台与出版商之间的权利平衡提供了关键司法指引。
items.ai_summary_en: The Grand Chamber of the Court of Justice of the European Union issued its judgment in Meta, C-797/23, a referral from the TAR Lazio. The Court determined that Italy’s transposition of Article 15 of the DSM Directive, specifically regarding the powers granted to the Communications Authority (AGCOM), is fundamentally compatible with the EU legal framework. While confirming this compatibility, the ruling imposes specific caveats and limitations on the exercise of these national regulatory powers. This decision clarifies the scope of regulatory flexibility available to Member States when implementing neighboring rights for press publishers. It provides essential judicial guidance for balancing the interests of digital platforms and news publishers within the internal market, ensuring that national enforcement mechanisms adhere strictly to EU copyright standards.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国数字平台在欧洲运营需密切关注AGCOM对新闻链接的监管要求。建议审查内容聚合算法，确保尊重出版者邻接权，避免侵权风险。同时，应建立快速响应机制以应对可能的行政调查或诉讼，确保合规经营。
items.ai_insight_en: Digital service providers operating within the European Union must closely monitor AGCOM’s evolving regulatory requirements concerning news links and content aggregation. It is advisable to review content curation algorithms to ensure they respect the neighboring rights of press publishers, thereby minimizing infringement exposure. Establishing robust rapid response mechanisms for potential administrative investigations or litigation is critical for maintaining operational compliance. Stakeholders should assess their current licensing strategies and technical safeguards against the specific caveats outlined in this judgment to navigate the complex landscape of national implementations of EU copyright directives effectively.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["CJEU裁定意大利转化DSM指令第15条及AGCOM职权基本符合欧盟法", "确认成员国在实施新闻出版者邻接权时拥有监管裁量空间", "判决附带特定保留条件，需关注具体合规细节以避免法律风险"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["CJEU rules Italy's transposition of DSM Directive Article 15 and AGCOM powers generally comply with EU law.", "Judgment confirms Member States possess regulatory discretion when implementing press publishers' neighboring rights.", "Decision includes specific reservations requiring careful attention to compliance details to mitigate legal risks."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["审视内容聚合策略，确保尊重欧洲新闻出版者邻接权", "建立针对AGCOM监管要求的合规响应机制以降低法律风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Review content aggregation strategies to ensure respect for European press publishers' neighboring rights.", "Practice note: Establish compliance response mechanisms addressing AGCOM regulatory requirements to reduce legal risk.", "What to monitor: Specific caveats in the CJEU judgment regarding national enforcement powers and algorithmic transparency."]
core_points_en: CJEU rules Italy's transposition of DSM Directive Article 15 and AGCOM powers generally comply with EU law.
Judgment confirms Member States possess regulatory discretion when implementing press publishers' neighboring rights.
Decision includes specific reservations requiring careful attention to compliance details to mitigate legal risks.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Review content aggregation strategies to ensure respect for European press publishers' neighboring rights.
Practice note: Establish compliance response mechanisms addressing AGCOM regulatory requirements to reduce legal risk.
What to monitor: Specific caveats in the CJEU judgment regarding national enforcement powers and algorithmic transparency.

items.title: Avocado scores win as Regional Court Nuremberg overturns PIs in 3D pen case
items.title_zh: 纽伦堡地方法院撤销3D笔案临时禁令，Avocado胜诉
items.title_en: Nuremberg Regional Court Overturns Preliminary Injunctions in 3D Pen Patent Dispute
items.summary: WobbleWorks is the developer of a 3D pen, based on EP 2 928 672 B1, which covers a hand-held three-dimensional drawing device and is marketed under the brand name 3Doodler. The patent relates to a device which extrudes a feedstock material in order to apply this to a surface. The user can also apply the material […] The post Avocado scores win as Regional Court Nuremberg overturns PIs in 3D pen case appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: WobbleWorks依据EP 2 928 672 B1专利起诉3D笔侵权并获临时禁令。纽伦堡地区法院随后撤销该禁令，认定被告产品未落入专利保护范围或专利有效性存疑。此案凸显欧洲专利诉讼中临时救济措施的不确定性，以及被诉方通过抗辩成功解除市场限制的策略价值。
items.ai_summary_en: WobbleWorks, the developer of the 3Doodler brand, initiated patent infringement proceedings based on European patent EP 2 928 672 B1. The patent covers a handheld three-dimensional drawing device that extrudes feedstock material onto surfaces. WobbleWorks successfully obtained preliminary injunctions against competing 3D pen products. However, the Regional Court Nuremberg subsequently overturned these provisional measures. The court determined that the defendant's products did not fall within the scope of patent protection or raised significant doubts regarding the patent's validity. This development underscores the inherent uncertainty surrounding preliminary relief in European patent litigation and highlights the strategic value for defendants in mounting effective early-stage defenses to lift market restrictions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧遭遇专利临时禁令风险高，需建立快速响应机制。建议提前进行FTO分析，准备不侵权或无效证据，以便在诉讼初期有效抗辩。同时关注德国法院对禁令发布的审查标准变化，优化全球IP布局与维权策略。
items.ai_insight_en: Preliminary injunctions remain a powerful yet unpredictable tool in European patent enforcement. Rights holders must anticipate that courts may rapidly reassess the balance of interests, particularly when validity challenges are credible. For companies operating in this space, establishing a rapid legal response mechanism is critical to mitigate sudden market access disruptions. Proactive freedom-to-operate analysis before product launch allows for the preparation of robust non-infringement or invalidity arguments. Understanding the specific evidentiary standards German courts apply when granting or lifting such orders enables better global IP strategy optimization and risk management during the initial phases of litigation.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["纽伦堡地方法院撤销了针对3D笔产品的临时禁令", "原告WobbleWorks基于EP专利主张权利但未能维持禁令效力", "判决反映欧洲专利侵权诉讼中临时救济措施的易变性"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The Regional Court Nuremberg revoked preliminary injunctions previously granted against specific 3D pen products.", "Plaintiff WobbleWorks relied on EP 2 928 672 B1 but failed to maintain the enforceability of the provisional measures.", "The ruling illustrates the volatility of preliminary injunctive relief within German patent infringement proceedings."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["建立应对欧洲临时禁令的快速法律响应与抗辩机制", "加强出口前自由实施分析，储备专利无效或不侵权证据"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Establish rapid legal response protocols to effectively challenge preliminary injunctions and minimize business disruption.", "Practice note: Conduct thorough pre-launch freedom-to-operate analyses and prepare substantive invalidity or non-infringement evidence.", "What to monitor: Evolving judicial standards in Germany regarding the granting and revocation of provisional patent remedies."]
core_points_en: The Regional Court Nuremberg revoked preliminary injunctions previously granted against specific 3D pen products.
Plaintiff WobbleWorks relied on EP 2 928 672 B1 but failed to maintain the enforceability of the provisional measures.
The ruling illustrates the volatility of preliminary injunctive relief within German patent infringement proceedings.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Establish rapid legal response protocols to effectively challenge preliminary injunctions and minimize business disruption.
Practice note: Conduct thorough pre-launch freedom-to-operate analyses and prepare substantive invalidity or non-infringement evidence.
What to monitor: Evolving judicial standards in Germany regarding the granting and revocation of provisional patent remedies.

items.title: Creating ongoing awareness among entrepreneurs about the importance of IP
items.title_zh: BOIP持续推动企业家提升知识产权意识
items.title_en: BOIP Launches New Campaign to Boost IP Awareness Among Benelux Entrepreneurs
items.summary: Unfortunately, many entrepreneurs are still unfamiliar with intellectual property (IP).
items.ai_summary_zh: 比荷卢知识产权局（BOIP）通过“Create, Protect, Benefit”平台，联合荷兰专利局等伙伴，旨在消除企业家对IP复杂且昂贵的误解。该平台展示IP在加强市场地位、促进合作及加速融资方面的优势。2025年营销活动覆盖超100万次，新活动将继续扩大受众，以实现BOIP 2030战略中IP融入商业计划的目标。
items.ai_summary_en: The Benelux Office for Intellectual Property (BOIP) has announced a new marketing campaign under its 'Create, Protect, Benefit' platform. The initiative aims to address the common perception among entrepreneurs that intellectual property is complex and costly. By highlighting how IP rights can strengthen market position, facilitate collaborations, and accelerate access to financing, BOIP seeks to demonstrate the tangible business advantages of protection. This effort aligns with the BOIP 2030 Strategic Plan, which targets the integration of IP into every business plan in the region. Following a successful 2025 campaign that generated over one million impressions, the new outreach continues to engage partners across the Netherlands and Belgium to broaden awareness.
items.ai_insight_zh: 比荷卢地区官方机构正强化IP基础认知教育，强调IP的商业化价值而非单纯法律保护。实务中需关注该区域针对初创企业的IP支持政策及合作伙伴网络，以利用当地资源优化IP布局与融资策略。
items.ai_insight_en: This development underscores the increasing focus by European IP offices on proactive education and value demonstration rather than solely administrative registration services. For rights holders and legal teams operating in the Benelux, understanding these official narratives is crucial for aligning client advice with regional support structures. The emphasis on financing and collaboration suggests that IP strategy discussions should increasingly integrate commercial growth metrics alongside traditional legal protection frameworks.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["BOIP与合作伙伴通过平台展示IP在加强企业地位、促进合作及获取融资方面的具体优势", "年相关营销活动产生超100万次曝光，显著扩大了在比荷卢地区的企业家覆盖面", "依据BOIP 2030战略，新活动将持续提升意识，致力于使IP成为比荷卢企业计划的组成…"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["BOIP's 'Create, Protect, Benefit' platform highlights IP's role in strengthening business positions and facilitating collaborations.", "The initiative emphasizes how IP protection can help entrepreneurs gain faster access to financing for product commercialization.", "A new campaign follows a 2025 effort that achieved over one million impressions, supporting the BOIP 2030 strategic goals."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["Client relevance/客户相关性: 关注比荷卢地区IP公共服务对企业融资与…", "Practice note/实务观察: 官方宣传侧重IP商业价值，建议企业在该地区沟通…", "What to monitor/后续观察: 监测BOIP 2030战略下具体落地措施及…"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Entrepreneurs in the Benelux should leverage BOIP resources to articulate IP value in funding and partnership negotiations.", "Practice note: Legal counsel may use official BOIP materials to counter client perceptions regarding the complexity and cost of IP protection.", "What to monitor: Future iterations of the BOIP 2030 Strategic Plan and specific partner initiatives with FPS Economy and VLAIO."]
core_points_en: BOIP's 'Create, Protect, Benefit' platform highlights IP's role in strengthening business positions and facilitating collaborations.
The initiative emphasizes how IP protection can help entrepreneurs gain faster access to financing for product commercialization.
A new campaign follows a 2025 effort that achieved over one million impressions, supporting the BOIP 2030 strategic goals.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Entrepreneurs in the Benelux should leverage BOIP resources to articulate IP value in funding and partnership negotiations.
Practice note: Legal counsel may use official BOIP materials to counter client perceptions regarding the complexity and cost of IP protection.
What to monitor: Future iterations of the BOIP 2030 Strategic Plan and specific partner initiatives with FPS Economy and VLAIO.

items.title: ZTE-Samsung: UPC recommends settlement rate, German court makes FRAND determination
items.title_zh: ZTE诉三星：UPC建议和解费率，德国法院作出FRAND裁定
items.title_en: ZTE-Samsung: UPC recommends settlement rate, German court makes FRAND determination
items.summary: Flurry of decisions from around the world highlights the lack of global FRAND harmonisation
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文报道了ZTE与三星专利纠纷中，统一专利法院（UPC）提出和解费率建议，同时德国法院作出FRAND裁定的最新进展。全球范围内此类密集判决凸显了当前缺乏全球统一的FRAND许可规则。文章分析了不同法域裁判差异对跨国企业许可谈判的影响，指出司法碎片化加剧了合规不确定性，强调了协调国际FRAND标准的重要性。
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临UPC与成员国法院并行的双重诉讼风险。建议建立全球FRAND应对预案，密切关注UPC费率指引趋势。在谈判中需综合评估各法域裁判差异，利用程序策略平衡和解压力，避免单一法域不利判决引发连锁反应，确保许可条款的全球一致性。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC提出和解费率建议，德国法院同步作出FRAND裁定", "全球密集判决凸显缺乏统一FRAND规则，司法碎片化严重", "跨国许可谈判面临多重管辖冲突，合规成本与不确定性增加"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕UPC与德院并行诉讼风险，建立全球FRAND应对预案", "关注费率指引趋势，利用程序策略平衡和解压力以保一致"]

items.title: Central Division Paris accepts revocation action against expired patent
items.title_zh: UPC巴黎分部：过期专利撤销之诉若具法律利益仍属可受理
items.title_en: UPC Paris Confirms Admissibility of Revocation Actions Against Expired Patents
items.summary: Huntsman (Europe) BV and Huntsman Holland BV v BASF SE — Central Division Paris, 22 April 2026 (UPC_CFI_461/2025))
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC巴黎中央分部在Huntsman诉BASF案中裁定，即使涉案专利已过期，只要原告因追索过往侵权损害赔偿而保留合法法律利益，撤销诉讼即具可受理性。法院重申在创造性评估中不受专利自身技术问题表述限制，可独立界定客观技术问题。此外，辅助请求的审查仅限于针对修改后权利要求的具体无效攻击，不自动沿用对授权权利要求的异议。
items.ai_summary_en: In Huntsman v BASF, the UPC Central Division Paris ruled that a revocation action remains admissible even if the patent expired before filing, provided the claimant retains a legitimate legal interest. The Court found such interest existed because the defendant had initiated evidence preservation and announced damages claims for alleged past infringement. Additionally, the judgment clarified that the Court is not bound by the objective technical problem stated in the patent when assessing inventive step. Procedurally, it held that objections against granted claims do not automatically apply to amended claims in auxiliary requests.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业需警惕UPC程序灵活性，即便专利过期，对手仍可借撤销之诉清除障碍以索赔。应对时须精准论证法律利益缺失，并在答复辅助请求时聚焦具体修改点，避免异议范围不当扩大，强化程序抗辩策略。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies critical procedural boundaries for portfolio management and litigation strategy under the UPC framework. Rights holders must recognize that patent expiry does not automatically shield against revocation if past infringement liabilities are being pursued. For defendants, the ruling offers a pathway to clear patents from the register to mitigate historical damages exposure. Furthermore, the strict separation of validity attacks between granted and amended claims requires precise drafting of defenses and amendments, preventing the automatic carryover of broad invalidity arguments during proceedings.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["过期专利撤销案若为追索过往侵权赔偿，因具备法律利益仍可被受理", "法院在创造性分析中有权独立界定客观技术问题，不受专利文本束缚", "辅助请求审查限于针对修改权利要求的具体无效攻击，不自动继承异议"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Revocation actions remain admissible post-expiry if the claimant faces ongoing infringement or damages claims, establishing a continuing legal interest.", "The Court may independently determine the objective technical problem for inventive step analysis, rather than relying solely on the patent's formulation.", "When reviewing auxiliary requests, the Court limits its assessment to specific invalidity attacks directed at the amended claims, excluding general objections."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕过期专利撤销风险，积极抗辩原告缺乏合法法律利益以阻断诉讼", "优化辅助请求答复策略，严格限定审查范围，防止无效理由不当扩展"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Patent owners should assess whether expired patents still pose litigation risks due to pending damages claims, as revocation actions remain viable tools for comp…", "Practice note: When responding to auxiliary requests, parties must tailor invalidity arguments specifically to the amended features, as prior objections to granted claims may not…", "What to monitor: Future UPC decisions defining the scope of 'legitimate legal interest' post-expiry and how courts independently formulate technical problems in complex inventive…"]
core_points_en: Revocation actions remain admissible post-expiry if the claimant faces ongoing infringement or damages claims, establishing a continuing legal interest.
The Court may independently determine the objective technical problem for inventive step analysis, rather than relying solely on the patent's formulation.
When reviewing auxiliary requests, the Court limits its assessment to specific invalidity attacks directed at the amended claims, excluding general objections.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Patent owners should assess whether expired patents still pose litigation risks due to pending damages claims, as revocation actions remain viable tools for comp…
Practice note: When responding to auxiliary requests, parties must tailor invalidity arguments specifically to the amended features, as prior objections to granted claims may not…
What to monitor: Future UPC decisions defining the scope of 'legitimate legal interest' post-expiry and how courts independently formulate technical problems in complex inventive…

items.title: UK Court of Appeal decision in Nokia SEPs dispute may be a ‘game changer’
items.title_zh: 英上诉法院诺基亚SEP案裁决或成游戏规则改变者
items.title_en: UK Court of Appeal Ruling in Nokia SEP Dispute May Reshape Global Licensing Dynamics
items.summary: Lord Justice Arnold halts the case in the UK, quashing claims made by Acer and Asus against Nokia in their video streaming patents dispute—but wider global litigation continues.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国上诉法院阿诺德法官在诺基亚与宏碁、华硕的视频流媒体专利纠纷中，暂停了英国境内的诉讼并撤销了相关索赔主张。尽管英国本土案件受阻，但双方在全球范围内的广泛诉讼仍在继续。该裁决被视为可能改变标准必要专利（SEP）许可谈判态势的关键节点，凸显了跨国知识产权争议中管辖权策略的重要性及全球并行诉讼的复杂性。
items.ai_summary_en: Lord Justice Arnold has suspended proceedings in the United Kingdom, quashing claims brought by Acer and Asus against Nokia regarding video streaming standard essential patents. While this procedural halt effectively stops the litigation within the UK jurisdiction, it does not resolve the broader international conflict. The parties continue to engage in extensive global patent disputes across multiple territories. This decision is widely viewed as a potential game changer for standard essential patent licensing negotiations. It underscores the critical importance of jurisdictional strategy in cross-border intellectual property conflicts and highlights the inherent complexities of managing parallel litigation on a global scale.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对海外SEP诉讼时，需密切关注英国法院的程序性裁决趋势。建议优化全球诉讼布局，利用不同法域的司法差异争取有利地位。同时，应加强FRAND合规评估，积极通过谈判解决争议，避免陷入长期高昂的全球诉讼泥潭，确保供应链安全与市场稳定。
items.ai_insight_en: Stakeholders involved in standard essential patent disputes should closely track procedural trends in UK courts, as these rulings can significantly influence global negotiation postures. Companies are advised to optimize their international litigation strategies by leveraging judicial differences across various legal systems to secure favorable positions. Furthermore, strengthening FRAND compliance assessments and prioritizing negotiated settlements can help avoid the substantial costs and uncertainties associated with prolonged global litigation. This approach helps ensure supply chain security and maintains market stability amidst complex cross-border intellectual property challenges.

items.title: LD Brussels, May 4, 2026, Order On Public Access To Case Files In Evidence Preservation Proceedings, UPC_CFI_1167/2026
items.title_zh: UPC布鲁塞尔：证据保全后限制公众查阅案卷的裁决
items.title_en: UPC Brussels Limits Public Access to Evidence Preservation Files After Withdrawal
items.summary: The nature of proceedings may justify restricting public access under Art. 45 UPCA, even though R. 262.1(b) RoP does not explicitly differentiate by proceeding type
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年5月4日，UPC布鲁塞尔地方法院在UPC_CFI_1167/2026案中裁定，即便未启动实体审理，基于《统一专利法院协定》第45条及程序规则，证据保全程序的保密性仍应维持。法院指出，虽公众有权了解裁判理由，但第三方获取未决销毁请求下的信息违背司法利益。申请查阅需具体说明理由，且已允许查阅删减版时，无需额外保密措施。此裁决明确了无后续诉讼时案卷公开的范围与限制。
items.ai_summary_en: On May 4, 2026, the UPC Local Division in Brussels issued an order in case UPC_CFI_1167/2026 regarding public access to case files following evidence preservation proceedings. The Court ruled that even when no subsequent proceedings on the merits are initiated, the confidential nature of evidence preservation justifies restricting public access under Article 45 of the Unified Patent Court Agreement (UPCA). While the public retains a legitimate interest in understanding the reasoning behind judicial decisions, third-party access to information subject to pending but unadjudicated destruction requests contravenes the general interest of justice. The Court emphasized that it cannot be required to hypothetically adjudicate withdrawn requests to determine access rights. Consequently, access was limited to redacted submissions leading to orders and review decisions, balancing transparency with the protection of sensitive commercial information and procedural integrity.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧应对专利诉讼时，需重视证据保全阶段的保密策略。若案件撤诉或和解，应积极主张维持案卷保密，防止敏感商业信息通过公众查阅泄露。同时，在申请查阅对方文件时，务必提供详尽的分类理由以符合程序要求，避免因形式瑕疵被驳回，从而有效保护自身知识产权与商业秘密。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling clarifies the scope of public access to UPC case files when evidence preservation actions are withdrawn or settled without merit proceedings. Parties should actively argue for maintaining file confidentiality to prevent sensitive commercial data from leaking through public inspection. When seeking access to opposing party documents, applicants must provide detailed, categorized justifications to avoid procedural dismissal. The decision underscores that while transparency is valued, it does not override the need to protect confidential information gathered during preliminary measures, especially where destruction requests remain unresolved.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["证据保全程序结束后，若未启动实体诉讼，基于保密需求可限制公众查阅案卷", "第三方获取涉及未决销毁请求的信息违背司法公正，法院无需假设性裁决", "查阅申请需按类别列明具体理由，若已提供删减版则无需额外保密保障"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Public access to evidence preservation files may be restricted after withdrawal to maintain confidentiality and procedural integrity.", "Third-party access to information involving unadjudicated destruction requests violates the general interest of justice.", "Access requests must specify reasons by document category; providing redacted versions satisfies confidentiality requirements."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用保密规则防止撤诉后敏感证据通过公众查阅泄露", "规范查阅申请格式，确保理由充分以避免程序性驳回"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage confidentiality rules to prevent sensitive evidence from being exposed via public access after case withdrawal.", "Practice note: Ensure access applications include specific, categorized reasons to meet procedural standards and avoid formal rejection.", "What to monitor: How the UPC balances public interest in judicial reasoning against confidentiality in future evidence preservation cases."]
core_points_en: Public access to evidence preservation files may be restricted after withdrawal to maintain confidentiality and procedural integrity.
Third-party access to information involving unadjudicated destruction requests violates the general interest of justice.
Access requests must specify reasons by document category; providing redacted versions satisfies confidentiality requirements.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Leverage confidentiality rules to prevent sensitive evidence from being exposed via public access after case withdrawal.
Practice note: Ensure access applications include specific, categorized reasons to meet procedural standards and avoid formal rejection.
What to monitor: How the UPC balances public interest in judicial reasoning against confidentiality in future evidence preservation cases.

items.title: CD Milan, May 4, 2026, Revocation Action, UPC_CFI_552/2025
items.title_zh: UPC米兰法院：本领域技术人员为虚构主体，公司隶属无关
items.title_en: UPC Milan: Skilled Person Is Notional; Success Expectation Based On Objective Data
items.summary: The skilled person under Art. 56 EPC is a notional figure, i.e., affiliations to specific companies are irrelevant and inadmissible as differentiating characteristics
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC米兰地方法院在撤销诉讼中裁定，EPC第56条下的“本领域技术人员”是反映申请日普通知识的虚构客观主体，特定公司隶属或主观态度不构成区分特征。法院强调，成功预期应基于科学数据的客观评估，而非研究者的主观希望；仅文献记载的偏见可阻碍技术启示。此外，非相关领域的贡献若提供有用指导亦可作为现有技术，但专业期刊内容通常不属普通知识。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Local Division in Milan ruled that the skilled person under Article 56 EPC is a notional, objective figure reflecting common general knowledge at the priority date. Affiliations with specific companies or subjective attitudes are irrelevant and inadmissible as differentiating characteristics. The court emphasized that a reasonable expectation of success must be assessed objectively based on scientific data, rather than relying on a researcher’s subjective hope or fear of failure. Only documented prejudice in the literature can deter technical teaching. Furthermore, contributions from unrelated technical fields may constitute relevant prior art if they provide useful guidance, although content from specialized journals generally does not form part of the common general knowledge unless it has become widely recognized through targeted research.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧应对专利无效挑战时，应避免将技术人员具象化为特定专家或受主观情绪影响。主张创造性时，需夯实科学数据以证明合理成功预期，而非依赖推测。同时，谨慎引用非本领域文献，需论证其对本领域技术人员的实际指导意义，以防被认定为非公知常识。
items.ai_insight_en: Practitioners should avoid defining the skilled person by reference to specific real-world experts or attributing subjective emotional states such as fear of failure. When arguing inventive step, parties must substantiate a reasonable expectation of success with concrete scientific data rather than speculative assumptions. Additionally, when citing prior art from unrelated technical fields, it is crucial to demonstrate its actual guiding value for the skilled person in the relevant field. Failure to establish this link may result in the document being excluded from the assessment of common general knowledge, potentially weakening arguments regarding lack of inventive step.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["本领域技术人员为虚构客观主体，特定公司隶属关系不可作为区分特征", "成功预期需基于科学数据客观评估，排除研究者主观恐惧或单纯希望", "专业期刊内容通常不属普通知识，除非经针对性研究成为公知常识"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The skilled person is a notional, objective entity; specific company affiliations are inadmissible distinguishing characteristics.", "Reasonable expectation of success requires objective assessment of scientific data, excluding subjective researcher hopes or fears.", "Specialized journal content usually excludes common general knowledge, though cross-field contributions may serve as relevant prior art."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["避免将技术人员具象化，坚持客观数据支撑成功预期", "谨慎引用跨领域文献，论证其对技术改进的实际指导价值"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Avoid defining the skilled person via specific experts or subjective emotions; rely on objective data for success expectations.", "Practice note: Substantiate inventive step arguments with concrete scientific data rather than speculative assumptions about outcomes.", "What to monitor: Ensure cross-field prior art citations demonstrate clear guiding value to avoid exclusion from common general knowledge assessments."]
core_points_en: The skilled person is a notional, objective entity; specific company affiliations are inadmissible distinguishing characteristics.
Reasonable expectation of success requires objective assessment of scientific data, excluding subjective researcher hopes or fears.
Specialized journal content usually excludes common general knowledge, though cross-field contributions may serve as relevant prior art.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Avoid defining the skilled person via specific experts or subjective emotions; rely on objective data for success expectations.
Practice note: Substantiate inventive step arguments with concrete scientific data rather than speculative assumptions about outcomes.
What to monitor: Ensure cross-field prior art citations demonstrate clear guiding value to avoid exclusion from common general knowledge assessments.

items.title: Mind the SEP: UKIPO signals upcoming SEP reform
items.title_zh: 英专局信号：即将推进标准必要专利改革
items.title_en: UKIPO Corporate Plan Signals Upcoming Standard Essential Patent Regulatory Reforms
items.summary: On 11 May 2026, the UK Intellectual Property Office (UKIPO) published its Corporate Plan for 2026–2027, outlining its policy priorities for the coming…
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年5月11日，英国知识产权局（UKIPO）发布2026-2027企业计划，明确将标准必要专利（SEP）作为政策重点。针对当前生态系统存在的许可不透明、必要性不确定及争议解决成本高企等结构性挑战，UKIPO计划在2026年完成政策制定并推动监管框架变革。此举旨在提升英国创新吸引力，虽无即时立法，但预示未来将在许可透明度、SEP必要性认定及纠纷效率方面进行改革。
items.ai_summary_en: On 11 May 2026, the UK Intellectual Property Office (UKIPO) published its Corporate Plan for 2026–2027, identifying standard essential patents (SEPs) as a critical policy priority. The plan acknowledges longstanding structural challenges within the SEP ecosystem, specifically limited licensing transparency, uncertainty regarding patent essentiality, and costly dispute resolution mechanisms that disproportionately impact small and medium-sized enterprises. While no immediate legislative changes are introduced, the UKIPO intends to complete policy development in 2026, aiming to enhance regulatory frameworks to support the UK’s position as a leading jurisdiction for innovation and technology-driven industries.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国通信及科技企业在英面临更严格的SEP合规环境。建议密切关注UKIPO后续政策细则，提前评估现有许可协议的透明度与必要性条款风险。应加强内部SEP管理能力，积极参与行业咨询，以应对潜在的监管变化及更高的争议解决效率要求，避免在新一轮改革中处于被动地位。
items.ai_insight_en: This update signals a sustained regulatory focus on SEP governance in the UK, aligning with broader European efforts to streamline SEP licensing and enforcement. For rights holders and implementers, the emphasis on reducing complexity and cost suggests future frameworks may prioritize procedural efficiency and clarity over substantive FRAND rate-setting. Stakeholders should prepare for potential shifts in how essentiality is verified and how disputes are mediated, ensuring internal compliance structures are adaptable to upcoming policy refinements aimed at supporting SMEs and technological growth.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UKIPO将SEP列为核心政策领域，致力于解决许可不透明及必要性不确定性问题", "计划于2026年完成政策制定，推动监管框架改革以优化争议解决机制", "改革旨在降低中小企业成本，维持英国作为全球技术创新领先司法管辖区的吸引力"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UKIPO identifies SEPs as vital to the UK economy but cites structural issues like opaque licensing practices and essentiality uncertainty.", "Policy development will continue throughout 2026 to address inefficiencies in dispute resolution and improve overall market transparency.", "Reforms aim to maintain the UK's attractiveness for innovation without introducing immediate legal changes or specific legislative proposals yet."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注UKIPO后续政策细则，评估现有许可协议合规风险", "加强内部SEP管理，积极参与咨询以应对监管变化"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders and implementers must anticipate enhanced scrutiny on licensing transparency and essentiality declarations under the new framework.", "Practice note: Review current SEP management protocols to ensure readiness for potential regulatory changes focusing on dispute resolution efficiency.", "What to monitor: Watch for the UKIPO's completion of policy development work in 2026 and any subsequent consultations on regulatory adjustments."]
core_points_en: The UKIPO identifies SEPs as vital to the UK economy but cites structural issues like opaque licensing practices and essentiality uncertainty.
Policy development will continue throughout 2026 to address inefficiencies in dispute resolution and improve overall market transparency.
Reforms aim to maintain the UK's attractiveness for innovation without introducing immediate legal changes or specific legislative proposals yet.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders and implementers must anticipate enhanced scrutiny on licensing transparency and essentiality declarations under the new framework.
Practice note: Review current SEP management protocols to ensure readiness for potential regulatory changes focusing on dispute resolution efficiency.
What to monitor: Watch for the UKIPO's completion of policy development work in 2026 and any subsequent consultations on regulatory adjustments.

items.title: L’ajout d’un élément figuratif à un terme descriptif suffit-il à rendre un signe distinctif ? Illustration avec l’affaire Washtower
items.title_zh: 欧盟法院：描述性词加图形未必获显著性-Washtower案
items.title_en: L’ajout d’un élément figuratif à un terme descriptif suffit-il à rendre un signe distinctif ? Illustration avec l’affaire Washtower
items.summary: Le Tribunal de l'Union européenne examine si l'ajout d'un élément figuratif complexe à un terme descriptif peut conférer un caractère distinctif à une marque.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟普通法院在Washtower案中裁定，LG电子挑战的“WASHTOWER+盾牌”商标无效。尽管上诉委员会认为复杂图形赋予其显著性，但法院指出“washtower”为描述性词汇，且图形与产品无关联、未改变整体描述性质，故缺乏固有显著性。此案明确了描述性术语叠加无关图形不能自动获得注册资格，强化了商标显著性的严格审查标准。
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请商标时，应避免直接使用描述产品功能或形态的词汇。若必须使用，需设计具有强识别度的独特图形或进行抽象化处理，确保整体印象超越描述性含义，以防因缺乏显著性被驳回或无效。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院认定“washtower”结合洗衣机功能与形态，属直接描述性词汇", "附加的盾牌等图形元素与商品无内在联系，不足以挽救整体显著性缺失", "确立了描述性文字叠加装饰性图形不必然产生固有显著性的司法标准"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["避免在欧盟商标中使用直接描述产品功能或形态的通用词汇", "强化图形设计的独创性与关联性，确保整体标识具备固有显著性"]

items.title: PMAC's Case Management System now live
items.title_zh: PMAC案件管理系统正式上线
items.title_en: UPC's PMAC Launches Case Management System for Mediation and Arbitration
items.summary: As of today, 12 May 2026, the Case Management System of the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) is live
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年5月12日，统一专利法院（UPC）宣布其专利调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）的案件管理系统（CCMS）正式启用。该系统支持用户在线提交替代性争议解决（ADR）信息及调解程序请求。PMAC网站已设立专门页面提供系统使用指南。此举标志着UPC在优化专利纠纷非诉讼解决机制方面迈出重要一步，为当事人提供了更便捷的调解与仲裁服务渠道，有助于提高争议解决效率并降低诉讼成本。
items.ai_summary_en: As of 12 May 2026, the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) has officially launched its Case Management System (CCMS). This digital platform enables parties to submit requests for ADR information sessions and mediation proceedings directly through the Centre. The PMAC website now features a dedicated section providing practical guidance on navigating the new system. This development marks the operational availability of structured alternative dispute resolution services under the Unified Patent Court framework, offering a streamlined digital interface for initiating non-litigious patent dispute resolutions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧遭遇专利纠纷时，应关注并利用PMAC的调解与仲裁机制。相比UPC诉讼，ADR程序通常更具成本效益且保密性强。建议企业熟悉CCMS操作流程，在争议初期评估通过调解快速和解的可能性，以规避高昂的跨国诉讼风险并维护商业关系。
items.ai_insight_en: The launch of the PMAC Case Management System provides rights holders with a formalized digital channel for accessing alternative dispute resolution mechanisms within the UPC ecosystem. For in-house counsel and IP teams managing European portfolios, this infrastructure supports efficient initiation of mediation or arbitration without immediate recourse to full litigation. Monitoring the uptake and procedural rules of this system will help stakeholders evaluate its utility for resolving cross-border patent disputes efficiently.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["PMAC案件管理系统于2026年5月12日正式上线运行", "支持在线提交ADR信息会话及调解程序相关请求", "官网发布专用页面提供系统操作实务指导"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The PMAC Case Management System is live as of 12 May 2026, enabling online submission of ADR requests.", "Parties can now initiate ADR information sessions and formal mediation proceedings via the new digital portal.", "Practical user guidance for the Case Management System is available on the dedicated PMAC website page."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用PMAC调解机制可降低在欧专利维权成本", "熟悉CCMS系统以便高效启动替代性争议解决程序"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Provides a structured digital pathway for initiating mediation and arbitration under the UPC framework.", "Practice note: Review the dedicated PMAC guidance page to understand submission requirements for ADR requests.", "What to monitor: Track future updates on PMAC procedural rules and case statistics to assess ADR effectiveness."]
core_points_en: The PMAC Case Management System is live as of 12 May 2026, enabling online submission of ADR requests.
Parties can now initiate ADR information sessions and formal mediation proceedings via the new digital portal.
Practical user guidance for the Case Management System is available on the dedicated PMAC website page.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Provides a structured digital pathway for initiating mediation and arbitration under the UPC framework.
Practice note: Review the dedicated PMAC guidance page to understand submission requirements for ADR requests.
What to monitor: Track future updates on PMAC procedural rules and case statistics to assess ADR effectiveness.

items.title: Judgment of the Court in Case C-797/23 Meta Platforms Ireland (Fair compensation)
items.title_zh: CJEU：成员国可规定新闻出版者获在线使用公平报酬
items.title_en: CJEU: Member States May Provide Fair Remuneration for Press Publishers
items.summary: Member States may make provision for publishers of press publications to be entitled to fair remuneration when they grant online service providers authorisation to use those publications
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲法院在Meta诉意大利AGCOM案中裁定，成员国可立法赋予新闻出版者在授权在线服务提供者使用时获得公平报酬的权利。该权利符合欧盟法律，前提是报酬构成授权对价，且出版者可拒绝授权或免费授权。法院认为，要求平台谈判并提供数据虽限制经营自由，但有助于实现版权市场公平及保障出版业投资回收，平衡了各方权益。
items.ai_summary_en: In Case C-797/23, the Court of Justice ruled that EU law permits Member States to establish systems granting press publishers fair remuneration when authorizing online service providers to use their publications. The judgment confirms this is consistent with the Digital Single Market framework, provided the payment constitutes consideration for authorization and publishers retain the right to refuse or grant free licenses. The Court further held that obligations requiring platforms to negotiate and provide data are justified restrictions on business freedom, necessary to balance intellectual property rights with media pluralism and ensure publishers can recoup investments in a transformed digital media landscape.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国出海媒体及聚合平台需关注欧盟各成员国的国内法转化，特别是意大利等先行国家。应建立合规机制，评估是否触发“公平报酬”义务，避免侵权风险。同时，利用出版者可免费授权的条款，积极争取低成本内容合作，优化内容供应链成本结构。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment validates national legislative models aiming to secure revenue streams for press publishers from digital platforms. For online service providers, particularly those operating across multiple EU jurisdictions, the decision underscores the need to assess compliance with local 'fair compensation' regimes. It clarifies that while negotiation duties restrict operational freedom, they are legally defensible if structured to support a fair marketplace. Rights holders should note the explicit preservation of their ability to grant free licenses, which remains a key contractual lever in platform negotiations.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["成员国可立法规定出版者就在线使用获公平报酬，符合欧盟法框架", "报酬须为授权对价，出版者有权拒绝授权或提供免费授权", "强制谈判义务旨在平衡经营自由与版权保护，支持出版业生存"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Member States may legislate for fair remuneration for press publishers authorizing online use by service providers.", "Remuneration must be consideration for authorization; publishers must retain rights to refuse or license freely.", "Negotiation and data provision duties are justified to balance business freedom with copyright protection objectives."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注成员国国内法转化，评估在线内容使用的报酬合规义务", "利用免费授权条款，争取低成本内容合作以优化供应链成本"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Online service providers must evaluate exposure to national fair remuneration schemes and prepare for mandatory negotiation frameworks.", "Practice note: Publishers should leverage the confirmed right to grant free licenses strategically during platform negotiations to maintain visibility.", "What to monitor: Implementation details of such remuneration systems in other Member States following the Italian model validated by the CJEU."]
core_points_en: Member States may legislate for fair remuneration for press publishers authorizing online use by service providers.
Remuneration must be consideration for authorization; publishers must retain rights to refuse or license freely.
Negotiation and data provision duties are justified to balance business freedom with copyright protection objectives.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Online service providers must evaluate exposure to national fair remuneration schemes and prepare for mandatory negotiation frameworks.
Practice note: Publishers should leverage the confirmed right to grant free licenses strategically during platform negotiations to maintain visibility.
What to monitor: Implementation details of such remuneration systems in other Member States following the Italian model validated by the CJEU.

items.title: The CJEU on heritage washing in trade mark law
items.title_zh: CJEU裁定：商标含年份若暗示悠久历史且不实，可能构成欺骗
items.title_en: CJEU Rules: Trademarks with False Historical Years May Be Deceptive and Invalid
items.summary: Is a trade mark that contains a year deceptive under Art. 4(1)(g) Trade Mark Directive (“TMD3”) and its predecessor Art. 3(1)(g) Second Trade Mark Directive (“TMD2”) if the owner was not established in that year? In Fauré Le Page (case C-412/24), the CJEU held that this may be the case where the year is perceived as indicating a long-established business and thereby evokes long-standing know-how
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲法院在Fauré Le Page案（C-412/24）中裁定，若商标包含的年份被公众视为指示企业历史悠久并唤起长期专业知识，而所有者并非成立于该年，则该商标可能因具有欺骗性而被宣告无效。此裁决依据《商标指令》第4(1)(g)条及前身条款，旨在打击“遗产洗白”行为，保护消费者免受误导，强调商标注册需真实反映企业背景。
items.ai_summary_en: In the Fauré Le Page case (C-412/24), the Court of Justice of the European Union addressed whether a trademark containing a specific year is deceptive under Article 4(1)(g) of the Trade Mark Directive and its predecessor if the owner was not established in that year. The CJEU held that such a mark may be considered deceptive if the public perceives the year as indicating a long-established business, thereby evoking an impression of long-standing know-how that does not exist. This ruling aims to combat 'heritage washing,' ensuring that trademarks do not mislead consumers regarding the brand's history. Consequently, registration may be invalidated if the date falsely suggests a heritage or expertise that the company lacks, reinforcing the requirement for truthfulness in trademark representations.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧注册商标时，应避免使用非成立年份以营造虚假历史感。需确保商标元素真实反映品牌背景，防止因“遗产洗白”被诉无效。建议进行尽职调查，核实商标合规性，以降低法律风险并维护品牌声誉。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment clarifies that incorporating historical dates into trademarks carries significant legal risk if those dates do not accurately reflect the entity's founding or operational history. Rights holders must ensure that any chronological elements in their marks are truthful and verifiable to avoid invalidation based on deception. Brands should conduct thorough due diligence to confirm that their marketing narratives align with factual corporate timelines. This approach mitigates the risk of oppositions or cancellation actions based on misleading indications of heritage, protecting both brand integrity and consumer trust in the European market.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["CJEU认定商标含年份若暗示悠久历史且不实，具欺骗性可致无效", "依据《商标指令》，重点在于年份是否被感知为指示长期建立的企业", "裁决旨在打击“遗产洗白”，确保商标不误导消费者对品牌历史的认知"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Trademarks with years implying false historical longevity may be deemed deceptive under EU law.", "Deception hinges on whether the public perceives the year as signaling established business expertise.", "The ruling targets 'heritage washing' to prevent consumer confusion about brand origins and history."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["避免在非成立年份注册商标，防止因虚假历史暗示被认定欺骗", "确保商标元素真实，进行合规审查以规避“遗产洗白”法律风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Ensure trademark dates accurately reflect corporate history to avoid invalidity risks.", "Practice note: Verify all chronological claims in branding materials against official registration records.", "What to monitor: Enforcement trends regarding 'heritage washing' and deceptive historical indicators."]
core_points_en: Trademarks with years implying false historical longevity may be deemed deceptive under EU law.
Deception hinges on whether the public perceives the year as signaling established business expertise.
The ruling targets 'heritage washing' to prevent consumer confusion about brand origins and history.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Ensure trademark dates accurately reflect corporate history to avoid invalidity risks.
Practice note: Verify all chronological claims in branding materials against official registration records.
What to monitor: Enforcement trends regarding 'heritage washing' and deceptive historical indicators.

items.title: La porcelaine de Limoges
items.title_zh: 利摩日瓷器获欧盟首项手工艺地理标志保护
items.title_en: Limoges Porcelain Becomes First French Artisanal GI Registered Under New EU Regulation
items.summary: La porcelaine de Limoges sgurtler@inpi.fr 11 mai 2026 Avec l'entrée en vigueur du règlement européen sur les indications géographiques pour les produits artisanaux et industriels le 1er décembre 2025, la porcelaine de Limoges devient ce 15 mai la première indication géographique protégée (IGP) française artisanale et industrielle à être enregistrée au niveau européen auprès de l'Office de l'Union européenne pour la propriété intellectuelle (EUIPO). Cette reconnaissance marque une étape décisive
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年5月15日，利摩日瓷器成为欧盟《手工业和工业产品地理标志条例》生效后，首个在欧盟知识产权局（EUIPO）注册的法国手工艺及工业地理标志（IGP）。该认证基于其自2017年起获得的法国国家地理标志地位，通过简化程序转化而来。此举赋予其在欧盟27国的广泛保护及官方标识使用权，标志着法国传统工艺知识产权保护的重要里程碑，并为其他法国手工艺品的欧盟注册开辟路径。
items.ai_summary_en: On 15 May 2026, Limoges porcelain became the first French artisanal and industrial geographical indication (GI) registered at the EU level with the EUIPO. This registration follows the entry into force of the new EU regulation on GIs for craft and industrial products on 1 December 2025. Leveraging its national GI status granted by INPI in 2017, Limoges porcelain utilized a simplified transformation procedure without an opposition phase. The decision grants protection across all 27 EU member states and authorizes the use of the official 'Protected Geographical Indication' logo, marking a significant step for the protection of traditional French craftsmanship.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This registration demonstrates the operationalization of the new EU framework for craft and industrial geographical indications. For rights holders, it highlights the strategic value of securing national GI status as a foundation for streamlined EU-wide protection. The case illustrates how established regional brands can leverage existing national recognitions to achieve broader territorial coverage and enhanced enforcement capabilities within the single market.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["利摩日瓷器成欧盟新规下首个注册的手工艺地理标志", "凭借法国国家GI基础，经简化程序直接转化为欧盟IGP", "获欧盟全境保护权及官方标识使用权，强化品牌壁垒"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Limoges porcelain is the first French artisanal GI registered under the new EU regulation effective 1 December 2025.", "Registration used a simplified transformation from national INPI status, bypassing EU-level opposition procedures.", "The GI covers all production steps in Haute-Vienne, granting EU-wide protection and official logo usage rights."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕欧盟GI新规对陶瓷等手工艺品出口的合规冲击", "推动中国特色产品申请欧盟GI以提升国际品牌溢价"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders should assess if their national GIs qualify for simplified transformation to gain immediate EU-wide protection.", "Practice note: National GI recognition serves as a critical prerequisite for accessing the streamlined EU registration pathway.", "What to monitor: Future registrations of other French and European artisanal products under this new regulatory framework."]
core_points_en: Limoges porcelain is the first French artisanal GI registered under the new EU regulation effective 1 December 2025.
Registration used a simplified transformation from national INPI status, bypassing EU-level opposition procedures.
The GI covers all production steps in Haute-Vienne, granting EU-wide protection and official logo usage rights.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders should assess if their national GIs qualify for simplified transformation to gain immediate EU-wide protection.
Practice note: National GI recognition serves as a critical prerequisite for accessing the streamlined EU registration pathway.
What to monitor: Future registrations of other French and European artisanal products under this new regulatory framework.

items.title: Corporate report: Intellectual Property Office Corporate Plan 2026 to 2027
items.title_zh: 英国知识产权局2026至2027年度企业计划
items.title_en: UKIPO Releases Corporate Plan 2026-2027: Advancing IP Strategy for Creative and Innovative UK
items.summary: This plan outlines our main activities and focus in the third of our strategy, Intellectual Property (IP) for a creative and innovative UK 2024 to 2027.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局（UKIPO）正式发布《2026至2027年度企业计划》。该计划是其“2024至2027年创意与创新英国知识产权”战略的第三阶段执行方案。文件详细阐述了UKIPO在未来一年的主要活动重点、资源分配及战略目标，旨在通过优化知识产权服务体系，支持英国创意产业与技术创新发展，确保英国在全球知识产权生态中的竞争力与吸引力。
items.ai_summary_en: The United Kingdom Intellectual Property Office (UKIPO) has officially published its Corporate Plan for 2026 to 2027. This document serves as the execution framework for the third phase of the broader 'Intellectual Property for a Creative and Innovative UK' strategy covering 2024 to 2027. The plan details the office's primary operational focuses, resource allocation strategies, and strategic objectives for the upcoming year. Key priorities include optimizing intellectual property service systems to better support the growth of the UK's creative industries and technological innovation sectors. By enhancing service efficiency and quality, the UKIPO aims to maintain and strengthen the United Kingdom's competitiveness and attractiveness within the global intellectual property ecosystem, ensuring robust protection and facilitation for rights holders operating in or entering the British market.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业需关注UKIPO行政效率变化及服务数字化进程。该计划强调创新支持，意味着英国对高质量IP申请审查可能更严或更快。建议出口英企提前布局高价值专利商标，利用官方服务优化组合，并密切关注后续具体操作指南更新，以规避合规风险并提升品牌在英保护效能。
items.ai_insight_en: Stakeholders should closely monitor changes in UKIPO administrative efficiency and the progression of digital service initiatives outlined in the plan. The emphasis on supporting innovation suggests that examination standards for high-quality IP applications may become more rigorous or expedited. Rights holders are advised to proactively structure their patent and trademark portfolios to align with these evolving service models. Leveraging official support mechanisms can enhance brand protection and compliance capabilities. Continuous attention to subsequent operational guidelines is essential to mitigate regulatory risks and maximize the effectiveness of IP protections within the UK jurisdiction.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["发布2026-2027年度企业计划，落实2024-2027战略第三阶段目标", "聚焦优化IP服务流程，支持英国创意产业与科技创新生态发展", "明确未来一年主要活动重点，提升英国全球知识产权体系竞争力"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Implementation of the third phase of the 2024-2027 strategy through the newly released 2026-2027 corporate plan.", "Focus on optimizing IP service processes to support the development of the UK's creative and innovation ecosystems.", "Clarification of key activities and goals to enhance the UK's competitiveness within the global IP system."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注UKIPO服务数字化与审查效率变化，优化在英IP申请策略", "提前布局高价值权利，利用官方支持提升品牌保护与合规能力"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor shifts in UKIPO service digitization and examination efficiency to refine UK IP application strategies.", "Practice note: Proactively secure high-value rights and utilize official support services to strengthen brand protection and compliance.", "What to monitor: Updates to specific operational guidelines and digital service tools introduced under the new corporate plan."]
core_points_en: Implementation of the third phase of the 2024-2027 strategy through the newly released 2026-2027 corporate plan.
Focus on optimizing IP service processes to support the development of the UK's creative and innovation ecosystems.
Clarification of key activities and goals to enhance the UK's competitiveness within the global IP system.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor shifts in UKIPO service digitization and examination efficiency to refine UK IP application strategies.
Practice note: Proactively secure high-value rights and utilize official support services to strengthen brand protection and compliance.
What to monitor: Updates to specific operational guidelines and digital service tools introduced under the new corporate plan.

items.title: Intellectual Property Office publishes Corporate Plan 2026 to 2027
items.title_zh: 英国知识产权局发布2026至2027年度企业规划
items.title_en: UK Intellectual Property Office Publishes Corporate Plan for 2026 to 2027
items.summary: The Intellectual Property Office (IPO) has published its Corporate Plan for 2026 to  2027, setting out its priorities and commitments for the year ahead.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局（UKIPO）正式发布2026至2027年度企业规划，明确未来一年的战略优先事项与承诺。该规划旨在通过优化知识产权服务体系、提升审查效率及加强国际合作，支持英国创新生态系统的可持续发展。作为英国知识产权管理的核心机构，UKIPO此举意在巩固其在全球IP治理中的地位，并为权利人和企业提供更具确定性的行政环境，涵盖专利、商标及设计等多领域服务的改进计划。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office (UKIPO) has officially released its Corporate Plan for the 2026 to 2027 period, outlining strategic priorities and operational commitments for the upcoming year. The plan aims to support the sustainable development of the UK innovation ecosystem by optimizing intellectual property service systems, enhancing examination efficiency, and strengthening international cooperation. As the central authority for IP management in the UK, the UKIPO seeks to consolidate its position in global IP governance. The initiative intends to provide rights holders and businesses with a more certain administrative environment, covering improvement plans across patents, trademarks, and designs.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应密切关注UKIPO的服务优化动向，利用其效率提升红利加速在英布局。鉴于英国脱欧后IP体系独立化趋势，建议企业同步评估欧盟与英国双轨注册策略的成本效益，确保核心资产在两大市场的合规性与保护力度，防范因行政程序差异导致的权利瑕疵风险。
items.ai_insight_en: Stakeholders should closely monitor UKIPO’s service optimization trends to leverage efficiency improvements for faster IP portfolio management in the UK. Given the trend toward an independent UK IP system post-Brexit, organizations are advised to evaluate the cost-effectiveness of dual registration strategies across both EU and UK jurisdictions. This approach ensures compliance and robust protection for core assets in both major markets, mitigating risks of rights defects arising from diverging administrative procedures and regulatory frameworks.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UKIPO发布2026-2027企业规划，确立年度战略重点与服务承诺", "聚焦提升知识产权行政效率，优化审查流程以支持英国创新经济", "强化国际协作机制，确保持续提供高质量、可预期的IP公共服务"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["UKIPO releases the 2026-2027 Corporate Plan, establishing annual strategic priorities and service commitments for stakeholders.", "Focuses on improving administrative efficiency and optimizing examination processes to support the broader UK innovation economy.", "Strengthens international collaboration mechanisms to ensure continuous delivery of high-quality, predictable public IP services."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注UKIPO效率提升，利用行政优化加速在英知识产权布局进程", "评估英欧双轨注册成本，防范体系独立化带来的合规与权利风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage UKIPO's enhanced administrative efficiency to accelerate intellectual property filing and prosecution timelines within the UK market.", "Practice note: Conduct a cost-benefit analysis of maintaining separate EU and UK registration strategies to address the increasing independence of the UK IP framework.", "What to monitor: Administrative procedural differences between the UK and EU systems that may impact the validity or enforcement of intellectual property rights."]
core_points_en: UKIPO releases the 2026-2027 Corporate Plan, establishing annual strategic priorities and service commitments for stakeholders.
Focuses on improving administrative efficiency and optimizing examination processes to support the broader UK innovation economy.
Strengthens international collaboration mechanisms to ensure continuous delivery of high-quality, predictable public IP services.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Leverage UKIPO's enhanced administrative efficiency to accelerate intellectual property filing and prosecution timelines within the UK market.
Practice note: Conduct a cost-benefit analysis of maintaining separate EU and UK registration strategies to address the increasing independence of the UK IP framework.
What to monitor: Administrative procedural differences between the UK and EU systems that may impact the validity or enforcement of intellectual property rights.

items.title: UPC: Late filed physical evidence cannot clarify the content of an earlier filed brochure
items.title_zh: UPC裁定：迟交实物证据不得用于澄清先前提交的宣传册内容
items.title_en: UPC Vienna Division Excludes Late Physical Evidence Clarifying Prior Art Brochure
items.summary: In a recent decision from the Vienna Local Division of the Unified Patent Court (UPC), the Court maintained EP 3705415, taking a strict...
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）维也纳地方法院在Messerle诉Sabert案中维持涉案专利有效。被告Sabert试图通过迟交实物样品来澄清商业宣传册中产品特征以攻击专利新颖性。法院裁定宣传册为独立现有技术，实物证据不能用于补充或重构其披露内容，以防事后诸葛亮式解读。因该证据实质引入新的无效理由且提交过晚，法院拒绝采纳，强调证据必须基于现有论点发展而非引入新攻击。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court Vienna Local Division maintained European patent EP 3705415 in infringement proceedings between Messerle and Sabert. The defendant attempted to rely on a commercial brochure for a novelty attack but submitted physical product samples late to clarify ambiguous features depicted in the brochure's two-dimensional images. The Court rejected this evidence, ruling that the brochure constitutes stand-alone prior art. External physical evidence cannot supplement or reconstruct the document's disclosure, as this risks hindsight bias. Furthermore, the Court found the late submission effectively introduced a new line of attack based on alleged prior use rather than developing existing arguments, rendering it inadmissible under procedural rules.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在UPC诉讼中需严格遵循举证时限与策略一致性。针对新颖性挑战，应确保书面证据本身清晰完整，避免依赖后续实物补强。若主张公开使用，须早期明确提出并单独举证，防止因混淆证据性质导致关键证据被排除，从而丧失无效机会。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision underscores the UPC's strict adherence to procedural discipline regarding late-filed evidence and the definition of prior art disclosures. Rights holders and defendants must ensure that documentary evidence relied upon for novelty attacks is self-contained and clear at the time of filing. Attempting to cure ambiguities in written prior art with subsequent physical exhibits risks exclusion, particularly if the court perceives this as introducing a new legal ground like public prior use without proper early pleading.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院拒绝采纳迟交的实物证据，因其旨在澄清而非补充先前提交的宣传册披露内容", "宣传册作为独立现有技术，其披露范围由本领域技术人员直接明确认定，禁止事后重构", "迟交证据若实质引入全新无效攻击路径（如公开使用），将因程序不当被排除"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Physical samples submitted late cannot clarify or supplement the disclosure content of an earlier filed commercial brochure.", "Courts treat documentary prior art as stand-alone evidence, prohibiting external items from reconstructing disclosure via hindsight.", "Late-filed evidence introducing a fundamentally new attack, such as alleged prior use, is inadmissible if it does not develop existing arguments."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC对迟交证据持严格态度，企业需确保书面证据自身具备充分清晰度", "区分不同无效理由的证据提交策略，避免混合导致程序性驳回"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Ensure prior art documents are sufficiently clear and complete when initially filed to avoid reliance on supplementary physical evidence.", "Practice note: Distinguish clearly between attacks based on documentary disclosure and those based on prior use to prevent procedural rejection of late evidence.", "What to monitor: Observe how other UPC divisions apply these admissibility standards to late-submitted evidence intended to interpret ambiguous prior art."]
core_points_en: Physical samples submitted late cannot clarify or supplement the disclosure content of an earlier filed commercial brochure.
Courts treat documentary prior art as stand-alone evidence, prohibiting external items from reconstructing disclosure via hindsight.
Late-filed evidence introducing a fundamentally new attack, such as alleged prior use, is inadmissible if it does not develop existing arguments.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Ensure prior art documents are sufficiently clear and complete when initially filed to avoid reliance on supplementary physical evidence.
Practice note: Distinguish clearly between attacks based on documentary disclosure and those based on prior use to prevent procedural rejection of late evidence.
What to monitor: Observe how other UPC divisions apply these admissibility standards to late-submitted evidence intended to interpret ambiguous prior art.

items.title: Samsung hit with $15m lawsuit over Dua Lipa’s image on TV boxes
items.title_zh: 三星因电视盒包装擅自使用Dua Lipa肖像遭千万美元起诉
items.title_en: Samsung Faces $15 Million Lawsuit Over Unauthorized Dua Lipa Image on TV Boxes
items.summary: Singer claims the tech giant infringed her trademark, copyright and personal identity rights through the unauthorised use of a photo on product packaging.
items.ai_summary_zh: 歌手Dua Lipa起诉科技巨头三星，指控其在电视盒子等产品包装上未经授权使用其照片，侵犯了商标权、版权及个人身份权。原告要求赔偿1500万美元。此案凸显了企业在全球营销中利用名人形象进行商业推广时的知识产权与人格权合规风险，特别是在欧洲市场，需严格区分商业代言与新闻报道的界限，避免未经授权的商业性使用引发高额索赔。
items.ai_summary_en: Singer Dua Lipa has initiated legal proceedings against technology giant Samsung, alleging that the company infringed upon her trademark, copyright, and personal identity rights. The core of the dispute involves the unauthorized use of a photograph of the artist on the packaging of Samsung TV boxes and related products. The plaintiff is seeking damages amounting to fifteen million US dollars for this unlicensed commercial exploitation. This case underscores the significant intellectual property and personality rights compliance risks inherent in global marketing strategies that leverage celebrity imagery. It highlights the critical necessity for companies operating in Europe to strictly distinguish between permissible news reporting and prohibited commercial endorsement, thereby avoiding high-stakes litigation resulting from unauthorized commercial use of protected personal likenesses.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国出海企业应建立严格的营销素材合规审查机制，严禁未经书面授权使用名人肖像或受版权保护的图片。在欧洲市场，人格权保护严格，违规成本极高。建议完善IP尽职调查流程，确保所有宣传物料获得完整权利链条授权，避免因小失大，损害品牌声誉并面临巨额诉讼。
items.ai_insight_en: Companies engaging in global marketing campaigns must implement robust compliance mechanisms for all promotional materials. It is essential to prohibit the use of celebrity portraits or copyrighted images without explicit written authorization. In the European market, where personality rights are strictly protected, non-compliance can lead to severe financial penalties and reputational damage. Organizations should enhance their intellectual property due diligence processes to ensure that all advertising assets possess a complete and verifiable chain of title. Failing to secure proper rights clearance not only exposes firms to costly litigation but also jeopardizes brand integrity and consumer trust in regulated jurisdictions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["三星被诉擅用Dua Lipa肖像于产品包装，侵犯商标版权及人格权", "原告主张1500万美元赔偿，指控三星未经授权进行商业性使用", "案件警示企业需严格审查营销素材授权，规避欧洲法律下的侵权风险"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Samsung is sued for unauthorized use of Dua Lipa's image on product packaging, infringing trademark, copyright, and personality rights.", "The plaintiff claims fifteen million US dollars in damages, alleging Samsung engaged in unlicensed commercial exploitation of her likeness.", "The case serves as a warning for enterprises to rigorously review marketing material authorizations to mitigate infringement risks under European law."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["建立严格营销素材合规审查，严禁未经授权使用名人肖像", "完善IP尽职调查，确保宣传物料拥有完整权利链条授权"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Establish strict compliance reviews for marketing materials to prevent unauthorized use of celebrity portraits and avoid liability.", "Practice note: Strengthen IP due diligence procedures to verify that all promotional content holds a complete and valid chain of rights authorization.", "What to monitor: Evolving judicial interpretations of personality rights versus commercial speech in key European markets to adjust risk thresholds."]
core_points_en: Samsung is sued for unauthorized use of Dua Lipa's image on product packaging, infringing trademark, copyright, and personality rights.
The plaintiff claims fifteen million US dollars in damages, alleging Samsung engaged in unlicensed commercial exploitation of her likeness.
The case serves as a warning for enterprises to rigorously review marketing material authorizations to mitigate infringement risks under European law.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Establish strict compliance reviews for marketing materials to prevent unauthorized use of celebrity portraits and avoid liability.
Practice note: Strengthen IP due diligence procedures to verify that all promotional content holds a complete and valid chain of rights authorization.
What to monitor: Evolving judicial interpretations of personality rights versus commercial speech in key European markets to adjust risk thresholds.

items.title: 100 years of design protection: where creativity, law and innovation meet
items.title_zh: 比荷卢外观设计保护百年：创意、法律与创新交汇
items.title_en: BOIP Marks Centenary of Design Protection: Balancing Creativity, Law, and Innovation
items.ai_summary_zh: 比荷卢知识产权局（BOIP）发文庆祝外观设计保护制度建立100周年。文章回顾了该区域外观设计法律从早期立法到现代欧盟协调框架的演变历程，强调了法律制度在平衡创作者权益与促进工业创新中的关键作用。作为欧洲重要的区域性知识产权机构，BOIP通过此纪念活动展示了其在维护设计权利、支持企业创新方面的历史贡献及当前职能，突显了比荷卢地区在设计保护领域的领先地位。
items.ai_summary_en: The Benelux Office for Intellectual Property (BOIP) celebrates the centenary of its design protection system. The article traces the evolution of regional design law from early legislation to the modern EU harmonized framework. It highlights the legal system's critical role in balancing creator rights with industrial innovation promotion. As a key regional IP institution, BOIP uses this milestone to showcase its historical contributions and current functions in safeguarding design rights and supporting enterprise innovation. This underscores the Benelux region's leading position in design protection within Europe.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应重视比荷卢作为进入欧盟市场的设计保护门户地位。建议出口企业充分利用BOIP的高效注册机制，提前布局外观设计专利，以应对日益激烈的市场竞争。同时，需关注该区域法律对“新颖性”和“个体特征”的具体司法实践标准，确保产品设计合规，规避侵权风险，提升品牌在欧洲市场的知识产权保护层级。
items.ai_insight_en: The Benelux region remains a strategic gateway for design protection when entering the broader EU market. Rights holders should leverage BOIP’s efficient registration mechanisms to secure early design rights, establishing a robust foundation for market access. It is essential to closely monitor specific judicial standards regarding novelty and individual character within the Benelux jurisdiction. Ensuring product designs comply with these local practices helps mitigate infringement risks and strengthens overall intellectual property protection strategies for brands operating in Europe.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["BOIP庆祝外观设计保护制度实施一百周年，回顾区域法律发展史", "强调外观设计法在连接创意表达、法律规范与技术创新间的桥梁作用", "展示比荷卢地区在欧盟框架下持续优化设计权利注册与保护体系的成果"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["BOIP commemorates one hundred years of design protection implementation, reviewing the history of regional legal development.", "Emphasizes design law as a vital bridge connecting creative expression, legal norms, and technological innovation.", "Showcases continuous optimization of design rights registration and protection systems within the EU framework."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用BOIP高效机制提前布局外观设计，巩固欧盟市场准入基础", "深入研究比荷卢司法实践标准，确保产品设计合规以规避侵权风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage BOIP's efficient registration mechanisms to secure early design rights and solidify EU market access foundations.", "Practice note: Conduct thorough analysis of Benelux judicial standards on novelty and individual character to ensure design compliance.", "What to monitor: Evolving case law interpretations regarding individual character to proactively mitigate infringement risks."]
core_points_en: BOIP commemorates one hundred years of design protection implementation, reviewing the history of regional legal development.
Emphasizes design law as a vital bridge connecting creative expression, legal norms, and technological innovation.
Showcases continuous optimization of design rights registration and protection systems within the EU framework.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Leverage BOIP's efficient registration mechanisms to secure early design rights and solidify EU market access foundations.
Practice note: Conduct thorough analysis of Benelux judicial standards on novelty and individual character to ensure design compliance.
What to monitor: Evolving case law interpretations regarding individual character to proactively mitigate infringement risks.

items.title: Why Ericsson and Nokia don’t charge patent licensing royalties to MNOs
items.title_zh: 为何爱立信和诺基亚不向移动运营商收取专利许可费
items.title_en: Why Ericsson and Nokia don’t charge patent licensing royalties to MNOs
items.summary: Saturday Opinion: As the cellular SEP licensing landscape evolves from established practice, SEP licensing expert Eric Stasik digs into the foundations of today’s licensing market
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文探讨蜂窝标准必要专利（SEP）许可格局的演变。专家Eric Stasik分析指出，传统上向移动网络运营商（MNOs）收费的模式正在改变。文章深入剖析当前许可市场的基础，解释为何行业领导者如爱立信和诺基亚调整策略，不再主要向MNOs收取特许权使用费，而是转向终端层级或其他模式，反映了SEP许可实践从既定惯例向新范式的过渡。
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国通信企业需密切关注许可层级下移趋势，避免在MNO环节陷入被动谈判。应重点评估终端侧许可风险，提前布局FRAND合规策略。鉴于欧洲巨头策略调整，中国企业应积极准备应对可能的费率争议，利用全球诉讼与谈判组合拳维护自身权益，确保供应链稳定。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["分析SEP许可格局从传统向新模式的演变趋势", "解读爱立信和诺基亚不向MNOs收费的市场基础", "探讨当前通信领域专利许可实践的根本性变化"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注许可层级下移，规避MNO环节谈判风险", "提前布局终端侧FRAND合规，应对费率争议"]

items.title: HP prevails in Munich in toner cartridge dispute against Ninestar
items.title_zh: HP在慕尼黑墨盒专利纠纷中胜诉Ninestar
items.title_en: HP Secures Munich Court Ruling in Toner Cartridge Patent Dispute Against Ninestar Group
items.summary: In a series of lawsuits concerning various patents, Hewlett Packard Development is taking action at Munich Regional Court against several European and Chinese companies of the Ninestar Group. They all sell printer cartridges on platforms such as Amazon. According to HP, these cartridges infringe HP’s patents. After the court imposed a sales ban on CaiLuo last […] The post HP prevails in Munich in toner cartridge dispute against Ninestar appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 惠普开发公司在慕尼黑地区法院对纳思达集团多家欧中企业发起系列专利诉讼，指控其通过亚马逊等平台销售的打印机墨盒侵犯惠普专利。法院已对其中一家名为CaiLuo的公司实施销售禁令。此案反映了跨国企业在欧洲针对替代耗材市场的严格知识产权保护行动，凸显了当地司法机构在认定专利侵权及执行禁令方面的效率与力度。
items.ai_summary_en: Hewlett Packard Development has initiated a series of patent infringement lawsuits at the Munich Regional Court against multiple entities within the Ninestar Group. The defendants, comprising European and Chinese companies, are accused of selling printer cartridges on online platforms such as Amazon that allegedly infringe HP's patents. The court has reportedly imposed sales restrictions on one specific defendant, CaiLuo, marking a significant development in this ongoing enforcement action regarding compatible consumables.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，德国后续是否会围绕这类执法动作给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This case highlights the continued use of German regional courts for enforcing patent rights against suppliers of compatible printing consumables. Rights holders are actively targeting distributors across different jurisdictions who utilize major online marketplaces. Market participants should observe how these proceedings develop, particularly regarding the scope of liability for various group entities involved in the supply chain.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["惠普在慕尼黑法院起诉纳思达集团侵犯多项专利", "涉案产品为通过亚马逊销售的打印机兼容墨盒", "法院已对部分被告实施临时销售禁令"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["HP filed patent infringement suits at Munich Regional Court against several Ninestar Group companies.", "The dispute targets printer cartridges sold by defendants on e-commerce platforms like Amazon.", "The court has already imposed a sales ban on the defendant entity known as CaiLuo."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["出口企业需强化德国市场专利FTO尽职调查", "应对策略应结合无效宣告与积极应诉机制"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders may leverage German litigation to enforce patents against multi-jurisdictional sellers of compatible goods.", "Practice note: Enforcement actions increasingly target specific corporate entities within larger groups operating on digital platforms.", "What to monitor: Further developments in the Munich proceedings and potential impacts on other Ninestar affiliates."]
core_points_en: HP filed patent infringement suits at Munich Regional Court against several Ninestar Group companies.
The dispute targets printer cartridges sold by defendants on e-commerce platforms like Amazon.
The court has already imposed a sales ban on the defendant entity known as CaiLuo.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders may leverage German litigation to enforce patents against multi-jurisdictional sellers of compatible goods.
Practice note: Enforcement actions increasingly target specific corporate entities within larger groups operating on digital platforms.
What to monitor: Further developments in the Munich proceedings and potential impacts on other Ninestar affiliates.

items.title: Court of Appeal overturns unjustified threats injunction in vape TM dispute
items.title_zh: 上诉法院推翻电子烟商标不正当威胁禁令
items.title_en: UK Court of Appeal Overturns Unjustified Threats Injunction in Vaping Trademark Dispute
items.summary: Vaping dispute, in which Stobbs and Brandsmiths are the representatives, tested how the UK's Human Rights Act can apply to injunctions restraining unjustified threats
items.ai_summary_zh: 本案为一起电子烟商标纠纷，Stobbs与Brandsmiths代理涉案方。争议焦点在于英国《人权法案》如何适用于限制“不正当威胁”行为的禁令。英国上诉法院最终推翻了此前发出的禁令，裁定需重新审视在知识产权维权警告中，平衡权利人执法利益与被警告方言论自由及商业权益的法律标准，确立了更严格的禁令颁发门槛。
items.ai_summary_en: This case involves a trademark dispute concerning vaping products, where Stobbs and Brandsmiths represented the involved parties. The litigation primarily tested the application of the UK Human Rights Act to injunctions designed to restrain unjustified threats of infringement proceedings. The Court of Appeal ultimately overturned the previously issued injunction. The judgment emphasizes the necessity of re-examining the legal standards used to balance the enforcement interests of intellectual property rights holders against the freedom of expression and commercial interests of the parties receiving warnings. This decision establishes a stricter threshold for granting such injunctions, ensuring that fundamental rights are adequately protected during IP enforcement actions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国出口企业向英发送或接收侵权警告时，需警惕“不正当威胁”法律风险。建议企业在发出警告函前进行严谨的权利稳定性评估，避免滥用诉讼威胁；若遭遇不当指控，可援引《人权法案》抗辩，利用程序规则维护自身商誉与经营自由。
items.ai_insight_en: Entities operating in or trading with the UK must carefully assess the risk of unjustified threats when sending or receiving infringement warnings. Before issuing cease-and-desist letters, rigorous evaluation of right stability is essential to avoid constituting an unjustified threat through abusive litigation tactics. Conversely, parties facing improper accusations should consider invoking the Human Rights Act as a defense mechanism. Utilizing procedural rules effectively can help protect corporate reputation and maintain operational freedom against potentially overreaching intellectual property enforcement strategies.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["英国上诉法院推翻了下级法院针对电子烟商标纠纷的不正当威胁禁令", "案件核心测试了《人权法案》在限制知识产权不正当威胁禁令中的适用性", "裁判强调需在权利人行使诉权与被警告方基本权利间寻求更精准平衡"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UK Court of Appeal overturned a lower court injunction regarding unjustified threats in a vaping trademark dispute.", "The case tested the applicability of the Human Rights Act to injunctions restraining unjustified intellectual property threats.", "The ruling emphasizes balancing rights holders' enforcement interests with recipients' fundamental rights and business freedoms."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["发函前需严谨评估权利稳定性，避免因滥用诉讼威胁构成不正当威胁", "遭遇不当指控时可援引《人权法案》抗辩，维护自身商誉与经营自由"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Assess right stability before sending warnings to avoid liability for unjustified threats under UK law.", "Practice note: Invoke the Human Rights Act to defend against improper infringement accusations and protect business operations.", "What to monitor: Evolving judicial standards for balancing IP enforcement interests with freedom of expression and commercial rights."]
core_points_en: The UK Court of Appeal overturned a lower court injunction regarding unjustified threats in a vaping trademark dispute.
The case tested the applicability of the Human Rights Act to injunctions restraining unjustified intellectual property threats.
The ruling emphasizes balancing rights holders' enforcement interests with recipients' fundamental rights and business freedoms.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Assess right stability before sending warnings to avoid liability for unjustified threats under UK law.
Practice note: Invoke the Human Rights Act to defend against improper infringement accusations and protect business operations.
What to monitor: Evolving judicial standards for balancing IP enforcement interests with freedom of expression and commercial rights.
