items.title: LD Helsinki, April 29, 2026, Decision On Infringement And Validity, UPC_CFI_214/2023, UPC_CFI_403/2025
items.title_zh: UPC赫尔辛基分院：专利侵权与有效性裁决及等同原则适用
items.title_en: UPC Helsinki Applies Hague Equivalence Approach and Limits Revocation Scope in EP 3 295 663 Decision
items.summary: The Helsinki Local Division of the Unified Patent Court examined infringement proceedings involving EP 3 295 663, with AIM Sport Development AG asserting patent rights against multiple TGI Sport entities across European jurisdictions. The case included a counterclaim for revocation, requiring the court to analyze validity under Articles 54, 56, and 123(2) EPC alongside infringement claims under Article 69 EPC.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）赫尔辛基地方分院就EP 3 295 663号专利作出侵权与有效性判决。在缺乏上诉法院先例时，法院采纳海牙分院的等同侵权判定路径，强调等同标准需累积满足，任一不成立即无侵权。针对撤销反诉，法院指出若当事人未充分论证“新增事项”，仅需回应已 substantiated 的部分。该案明确了UPC内部司法一致性的重要性及举证责任边界。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court's Helsinki Local Division issued a decision on infringement and validity concerning European patent EP 3 295 663, held by AIM Sport Development AG against multiple TGI Sport entities. In the absence of Court of Appeal precedent on equivalence, the Division adopted the approach established by The Hague Local Division, emphasizing that equivalence criteria are cumulative; failure to meet any single criterion precludes a finding of infringement. Regarding the counterclaim for revocation based on added matter under Article 123(2) EPC, the Court ruled it would only address arguments substantiated by the defendant, noting that TGI provided minimal detail and did not further develop this allegation during oral proceedings.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC诉讼时，需密切关注各地方分院对等同原则的司法倾向，尤其是海牙、赫尔辛基等关键分院。在提出无效抗辩时，必须提供详尽的技术比对与法律论证，避免仅凭形式主张导致被驳回。建议建立跨法域的专利风险预警机制，统一应诉策略以应对UPC日益增强的判例约束力。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment reinforces the importance of judicial consistency across UPC Local Divisions, particularly regarding the doctrine of equivalents. It signals that applicants and defendants must provide robust, substantiated technical and legal arguments for invalidity defenses, as courts will not expand the scope of review beyond what is rigorously pleaded. This highlights the need for precise drafting of counterclaims and careful selection of equivalence frameworks in litigation strategy.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["无上诉先例时，地方法院参照海牙分院等同判定路径以保法律确定性", "等同侵权判定标准具有累积性，任一要件缺失即认定不构成等同侵权", "法院仅对当事人提供实质论证的撤销理由进行回应，简化审理焦点"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Helsinki Local Division adopts The Hague Local Division's equivalence approach to ensure legal certainty absent Court of Appeal case law.", "Equivalence infringement criteria are cumulative; if one criterion is unmet, no further assessment is required for a finding of non-infringement.", "Courts respond to revocation allegations only where parties present substantiated arguments, limiting scope when claims lack detailed support."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注UPC地方分院等同原则司法倾向，统一跨法域应诉策略", "无效抗辩需提供实质技术论证，避免形式主张被法院忽略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders and defendants should align equivalence arguments with established Local Division precedents, such as those from The Hague, to enhance predictabil…", "Practice note: When filing counterclaims for revocation, ensure all grounds, including added matter, are supported by detailed technical and legal analysis to guarantee full judic…", "What to monitor: Monitor future Local Division decisions to see if the cumulative equivalence approach gains broader acceptance or if divergent interpretations emerge before Court…"]
core_points_en: Helsinki Local Division adopts The Hague Local Division's equivalence approach to ensure legal certainty absent Court of Appeal case law.
Equivalence infringement criteria are cumulative; if one criterion is unmet, no further assessment is required for a finding of non-infringement.
Courts respond to revocation allegations only where parties present substantiated arguments, limiting scope when claims lack detailed support.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders and defendants should align equivalence arguments with established Local Division precedents, such as those from The Hague, to enhance predictabil…
Practice note: When filing counterclaims for revocation, ensure all grounds, including added matter, are supported by detailed technical and legal analysis to guarantee full judic…
What to monitor: Monitor future Local Division decisions to see if the cumulative equivalence approach gains broader acceptance or if divergent interpretations emerge before Court…

items.title: LD Düsseldorf, April 28, 2026, Procedural Order, UPC_CFI_869/2025
items.title_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫地院2026年4月程序令：关于提交文件可采性的裁决
items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf: Equality of Arms Requires Plaintiff Comment on Defendant's Late Rejoinder
items.summary: The admissibility of the documents and arguments submitted is a question of fact. Whether the defendant’s submissions in its rejoinder regarding the motion to amend are relevant...
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）杜塞尔多夫地方分院发布程序令（案号UPC_CFI_869/2025），涉及大日本印刷诉Zapp等公司专利侵权案。法院裁定，被告在反驳中针对修改动议提交的论据是否相关及是否逾期，属事实问题，需待口头程序结束后方能确定。依据武器平等原则，法院允许原告就被告的事实陈述补充评论，作为预防性措施，且不 prejudge 最终的可采性决定。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Düsseldorf Local Division issued a procedural order in Dai Nippon Printing v. Zapp regarding the admissibility of documents submitted in the defendant's rejoinder concerning a motion to amend. The court determined that assessing the relevance and timeliness of these submissions is a factual question requiring thorough analysis, which can only be conclusively resolved at the end of oral proceedings. To uphold the principle of equality of arms, the judge rapporteur granted the plaintiff a precautionary opportunity to comment on the defendant's statement of facts. This measure is without prejudice to the final decision on whether the defendant's additional arguments will be admitted into the record.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC诉讼时，应高度重视程序规则的灵活性。即便对方提交材料可能逾期，法院仍可能基于公平原则给予我方回应机会。建议企业建立快速响应机制，充分利用程序赋予的评论权，同时密切关注法官对“武器平等”原则的适用尺度，以优化诉讼策略。
items.ai_insight_en: This order highlights the UPC's procedural flexibility in managing late-filed evidence under the Rules of Procedure. By deferring the final admissibility ruling while granting immediate comment rights, the court balances procedural efficiency with fair trial guarantees. Rights holders should note that 'equality of arms' may trigger additional briefing rounds even when opposing filings appear procedurally irregular, requiring agile case management during the early stages of litigation.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["被告反驳中的修改动议论据可采性属事实问题，需结合案情全面分析", "基于武器平等原则，原告获准对被告新增事实陈述进行补充评论", "最终可采性判定将推迟至口头程序结束时作出，确保程序公正"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Admissibility of late submissions in a rejoinder regarding amendment motions is treated as a complex question of fact.", "Final determination on the relevance and timeliness of such arguments is deferred until the conclusion of oral proceedings.", "Plaintiff is granted a precautionary right to comment on defendant's facts to ensure compliance with equality of arms principles."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用UPC程序规则争取补充评论机会，平衡对方突袭式举证", "关注法官对逾期证据可采性的裁量标准，完善应诉响应流程"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Courts may prioritize fair hearing rights over strict procedural deadlines, potentially extending pre-trial preparation timelines for both parties.", "Practice note: Prepare contingency responses for potential late submissions by opponents, ensuring readiness to file supplementary comments if granted by the division.", "What to monitor: How different UPC Local Divisions apply Rule 9.2 and Rule 36 RoP regarding the threshold for admitting late arguments in rejoinders."]
core_points_en: Admissibility of late submissions in a rejoinder regarding amendment motions is treated as a complex question of fact.
Final determination on the relevance and timeliness of such arguments is deferred until the conclusion of oral proceedings.
Plaintiff is granted a precautionary right to comment on defendant's facts to ensure compliance with equality of arms principles.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Courts may prioritize fair hearing rights over strict procedural deadlines, potentially extending pre-trial preparation timelines for both parties.
Practice note: Prepare contingency responses for potential late submissions by opponents, ensuring readiness to file supplementary comments if granted by the division.
What to monitor: How different UPC Local Divisions apply Rule 9.2 and Rule 36 RoP regarding the threshold for admitting late arguments in rejoinders.

items.title: Court Of Appeal, Standing Judge, April 28, 2026, Order On Request For Discretionary Review, UPC_CoA_56/2026
items.title_zh: UPC上诉庭裁定：错过期限的人为错误可获追溯延期
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Human Error in Deadline Calculation Warrants Retroactive Term Extension
items.summary: The Court of Appeal examines a request for discretionary review in a patent dispute between Optopol Technology and Topcon Corporation concerning EP 2 845 534. The case involves interpretation of procedural rules governing standing and review processes under the Unified Patent Court framework.
items.ai_summary_zh: 本案系Optopol与Topcon在统一专利法院（UPC）的专利纠纷。上诉庭审查了针对EP 2845534号专利的程序性请求。法院认定，尽管代理人助理系统录入失误导致错过期限，但律所已建立核查机制，该人为错误属可原谅情形。上诉庭支持地方法院决定，允许在权利恢复请求期内隐含提交追溯期限延长申请，强调此类申请应尽早提出，但在特定未决判例背景下具有合理性。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal, Standing Judge, reviewed a discretionary request concerning EP 2 845 534 in Optopol Technology v. Topcon Corporation. The Court upheld the Local Division's decision to grant a retroactive term extension under Rule 9.3 RoP. Although a deadline was missed due to an assistant's data entry error, the Court found this excusable because the law firm had established verification systems. The ruling confirms that such implicit requests filed within the re-establishment of rights period are reasonable, particularly when pending case law creates uncertainty regarding procedural timing.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC诉讼时，需建立严格的期限双重核查机制以防范人为失误。若遇不可抗力或合理疏忽，应及时利用“可原谅错误”条款申请救济。同时，注意程序请求的时效性与独立性，避免过度依赖替代性请求策略，确保合规操作以降低专利失效风险。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies the threshold for 'excusable' errors in UPC proceedings, distinguishing between systemic failures and isolated human mistakes within robust compliance frameworks. For rights holders, it validates the strategy of filing alternative procedural requests during periods of legal uncertainty. However, the Court's emphasis on timeliness reinforces that reliance on such extensions remains exceptional rather than routine practice.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC上诉庭认定代理人系统性核查下的人为失误属可原谅错误", "支持在权利恢复期限内隐含提交追溯期限延长申请的合理性", "明确依据程序规则第9.3条，追溯延期请求原则上应尽早提出"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The Court accepted that a human error by an assistant constituted an excusable mistake despite existing internal verification checks at the representative's firm.", "An implicit request for retroactive term extension filed as an alternative within the re-establishment of rights period was deemed procedurally acceptable.", "While Rule 9.3 RoP requires requests for retroactive term extension to be made as soon as possible, context-specific delays may be justified."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["建立严格期限双重核查机制，防范人为失误导致专利失效", "善用“可原谅错误”条款及时申请救济，确保程序合规"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Demonstrates that established internal deadline monitoring systems can mitigate risks associated with isolated administrative errors in UPC litigation.", "Practice note: Consider filing implicit alternative requests for retroactive term extension alongside re-establishment applications when procedural deadlines are at risk.", "What to monitor: Future interpretations of 'as soon as possible' under Rule 9.3 RoP to understand how pending case law influences acceptable delay durations."]
core_points_en: The Court accepted that a human error by an assistant constituted an excusable mistake despite existing internal verification checks at the representative's firm.
An implicit request for retroactive term extension filed as an alternative within the re-establishment of rights period was deemed procedurally acceptable.
While Rule 9.3 RoP requires requests for retroactive term extension to be made as soon as possible, context-specific delays may be justified.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Demonstrates that established internal deadline monitoring systems can mitigate risks associated with isolated administrative errors in UPC litigation.
Practice note: Consider filing implicit alternative requests for retroactive term extension alongside re-establishment applications when procedural deadlines are at risk.
What to monitor: Future interpretations of 'as soon as possible' under Rule 9.3 RoP to understand how pending case law influences acceptable delay durations.

items.title: Court Of Appeal, April 27, 2026, Order On Provisional Measures, UPC_CoA_917/2025
items.title_zh: UPC上诉法院：临时措施中无效抗辩放弃及紧急性认定
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Waiving Invalidity in Provisional Measures and Urgency Assessment
items.summary: Unlike proceedings on the merits, where the Statement of defence shall include a Counterclaim for revocation (R. 25.1 RoP) if there is an assertion that the patent alleged to be infringed is invalid...
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC上诉法院在Merz案中裁定，临时措施程序中放弃无效抗辩不构成程序规则下的索赔变更或撤回，法院可基于剩余问题审理并判令补偿费用。法院确认获取定价报销不必然构成六个月内上市的紧迫侵权风险，但结合短缺、价格侵蚀及SPC到期等因素，权衡后仍可能批准临时禁令，并给予48小时宽限期。
items.ai_summary_en: In the Merz case, the UPC Court of Appeal ruled that waiving an invalidity defense in provisional measures proceedings does not constitute a claim change or withdrawal under the Rules of Procedure. The Court may proceed based on remaining issues and order cost compensation for withdrawn arguments. The decision confirms that obtaining pricing and reimbursement approval does not automatically establish imminent infringement within six months. However, considering factors such as product shortages, price erosion, and SPC expiry, the Court balanced the parties' interests and granted a provisional injunction with a 48-hour grace period. This highlights the nuanced approach to urgency and necessity in pharmaceutical patent disputes.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国药企在欧应对专利临时禁令时，需谨慎处理无效抗辩策略，避免随意放弃导致成本承担。同时，仅获定价许可不足以规避禁令风险，应充分评估市场短缺、SPC到期等竞争因素对法院“紧迫性”认定的影响，提前准备抗辩证据。
items.ai_insight_en: Parties involved in UPC provisional measures should carefully manage invalidity defenses to avoid unnecessary cost liabilities, as waivers are treated distinctly from formal withdrawals. Mere regulatory approvals like pricing do not guarantee safety from injunctions; defendants must comprehensively assess market dynamics. Factors such as existing product shortages, impending Supplementary Protection Certificate expiries, and broader public health impacts significantly influence the Court's assessment of urgency and necessity. Robust evidence regarding actual launch timelines and competitive conditions is essential to effectively counter claims of imminent infringement.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["临时措施中放弃无效抗辩非程序性撤回，法院可继续审理并追偿相关成本", "获准定价报销不自动构成紧迫侵权，需结合具体上市确定性综合判断", "权衡患者利益与价格侵蚀后，法院仍可授予临时禁令并设定短期宽限"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Waiving invalidity defenses in provisional measures is not a procedural withdrawal; courts may continue hearing remaining issues and award costs.", "Securing pricing and reimbursement approval does not inherently prove imminent launch within six months, requiring specific evidence of market entry certainty.", "Courts weigh patient interests, potential price erosion, and supply shortages when deciding on provisional injunctions, potentially granting short grace periods."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["谨慎处理临时措施中的无效抗辩放弃，防范额外诉讼成本风险", "全面评估市场因素对紧迫性认定的影响，完善应对临时禁令策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Carefully evaluate the strategic implications of waiving invalidity defenses in provisional measures to mitigate unexpected cost orders.", "Practice note: Do not rely solely on pricing approvals to demonstrate lack of urgency; prepare detailed evidence on actual market launch probabilities.", "What to monitor: How Courts balance patient access and supply chain stability against patent rights when determining the necessity of provisional relief."]
core_points_en: Waiving invalidity defenses in provisional measures is not a procedural withdrawal; courts may continue hearing remaining issues and award costs.
Securing pricing and reimbursement approval does not inherently prove imminent launch within six months, requiring specific evidence of market entry certainty.
Courts weigh patient interests, potential price erosion, and supply shortages when deciding on provisional injunctions, potentially granting short grace periods.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Carefully evaluate the strategic implications of waiving invalidity defenses in provisional measures to mitigate unexpected cost orders.
Practice note: Do not rely solely on pricing approvals to demonstrate lack of urgency; prepare detailed evidence on actual market launch probabilities.
What to monitor: How Courts balance patient access and supply chain stability against patent rights when determining the necessity of provisional relief.

items.title: LD Helsinki, April 29, 2026, Order Disposing Of Provisional Measures Application, ACT_551054/2023
items.title_zh: UPC赫尔辛基地院：临时措施申请失去目的时予以处置
items.title_en: UPC Helsinki: Disposing of Provisional Measures Applications Devoid of Purpose Under Rule 360
items.summary: If a provisional measures application has become devoid of purpose and hence there is no longer need to adjudicate on it, the Court shall dispose of it based on R. 360 RoP...
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年4月29日，UPC赫尔辛基地方法院就ACT_551054/2023案发布命令。法院依据《程序规则》第360条裁定，若临时措施申请已失去目的且无需再行裁决，应予以处置。若当事人请求，法院可作出费用决定，并酌情考虑实体案件已知结果。本案涉及AIM Sport Development AG与多家TGI Sport实体关于EP 3 295 663号专利的争议。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Helsinki Local Division issued an order on April 29, 2026, regarding application ACT_551054/2023. The Court held that if a provisional measures application becomes devoid of purpose, it must be disposed of pursuant to Rule 360 of the Rules of Procedure. Upon request by the parties, the Court may issue a cost decision, potentially considering the known outcome of the case on the merits. This proceeding involved AIM Sport Development AG against multiple TGI Sport entities concerning European Patent EP 3 295 663.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC临时禁令时，需密切关注程序进展。若主案胜诉或和解，应及时主张临时措施失去目的以终止程序，避免不必要的费用支出。建议结合实体判决结果，积极向法院申请费用分担，优化跨境知识产权诉讼的成本控制策略。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling clarifies the procedural mechanism for terminating provisional measures proceedings under the Unified Patent Court framework when the underlying urgency or purpose dissipates. For rights holders and defendants, understanding when an application is deemed 'devoid of purpose' is critical for managing litigation timelines and potential cost liabilities. The ability to link cost decisions to the merits outcome provides a pathway for resolving ancillary disputes efficiently once the primary legal questions are settled or mooted.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["临时措施申请若失去目的，UPC法院依R.360条应予处置", "法院可依当事人请求裁定诉讼费用，参考实体案已知结果", "本案涉及EP 3 295 663号专利，原告为AIM Sport，被告为多家公司"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Rule 360 RoP mandates disposal of provisional measures applications that have become devoid of purpose and no longer require adjudication.", "The Court may decide on costs upon party request, taking into account the known outcome of the main proceedings if available.", "The order addresses procedural efficiency in UPC local divisions when interim relief is no longer necessary due to case developments."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注临时措施目的丧失情形，及时申请终止程序", "利用实体案结果争取有利费用裁定，降低诉讼成本"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Parties should assess whether changes in factual circumstances or settlement progress render provisional measures applications obsolete to avoid unnecessary proc…", "Practice note: When requesting cost decisions after disposal under Rule 360, parties should explicitly reference any known outcomes on the merits to support their position.", "What to monitor: Future interpretations by other UPC Local Divisions regarding what constitutes an application being 'devoid of purpose' under Rule 360."]
core_points_en: Rule 360 RoP mandates disposal of provisional measures applications that have become devoid of purpose and no longer require adjudication.
The Court may decide on costs upon party request, taking into account the known outcome of the main proceedings if available.
The order addresses procedural efficiency in UPC local divisions when interim relief is no longer necessary due to case developments.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Parties should assess whether changes in factual circumstances or settlement progress render provisional measures applications obsolete to avoid unnecessary proc…
Practice note: When requesting cost decisions after disposal under Rule 360, parties should explicitly reference any known outcomes on the merits to support their position.
What to monitor: Future interpretations by other UPC Local Divisions regarding what constitutes an application being 'devoid of purpose' under Rule 360.

items.title: Cooperation Board launch strengthens EUIPN framework for collaboration
items.title_zh: 合作委员会启动强化EUIPN协作框架
items.title_en: EUIPO Launches Cooperation Board to Strengthen EUIPN Collaboration Framework
items.summary: Cooperation Board launch strengthens EUIPN framework for collaboration
items.ai_summary_zh: 标题显示欧盟知识产权局（EUIPO）启动了合作委员会，旨在加强欧洲知识产权局网络（EUIPN）的协作框架。原文摘要与正文仅重复该事实，未提供关于委员会具体职能、成员构成或后续工作计划的详细背景信息。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) has officially launched a new Cooperation Board. This initiative is designed to strengthen the collaborative framework of the European Union Intellectual Property Network (EUIPN). The announcement confirms the establishment of this body to enhance coordination among member offices, though specific operational details regarding its functions or composition are not provided in the initial brief.
items.ai_insight_zh: Practice note / What to monitor：鉴于正文极度简略，目前无法评估该委员会对商标/外观设计注册程序或执法协调的具体影响。需持续观察EUIPO后续发布的官方指南或新闻稿，以获取关于新协作机制运作细节及对各成员国局实际影响的明确信息。
items.ai_insight_en: This development signals an ongoing effort by the EUIPO to refine administrative and procedural alignment across the EU intellectual property landscape. For rights holders and practitioners, the formation of this board indicates a continued focus on harmonizing practices among national offices. However, the immediate practical impact on registration procedures or enforcement remains unclear pending further official guidance.

items.title: AI Act Omnibus: EU institutions agree political deal
items.title_zh: 欧盟机构就《人工智能法案》一揽子修正案达成政治协议
items.title_en: EU Institutions Reach Political Deal on AI Act Omnibus Amendments
items.summary: The EU Commission, Parliament and Council have each announced this morning that a political deal has been reached overnight on the AI Act Omnibus. The ...
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟委员会、议会和理事会宣布就《人工智能法案》一揽子修正案（Omnibus）达成政治协议。此前最终三方会谈未能达成一致，此次协议挽救了立法进程，明确了法案的关键修改内容。预计这些变更将加速纳入最终文本并在数周内生效。尽管草案全文尚未公布，但该协议为企业提供了更清晰的合规规划基础，消除了关于法案范围和实施时间表的重大不确定性。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Commission, Parliament, and Council have announced a political agreement on the AI Act Omnibus amendments. This breakthrough follows a failed final trilogue session just one week prior, salvaging the legislative process after significant uncertainty regarding the timeline. The agreed changes are expected to be fast-tracked into the final legal text, with entry into force anticipated within the coming weeks. Although the full draft text remains unpublished, this substantive accord clarifies key modifications to the original regulation. For enterprises, this development provides a much-needed foundation for compliance planning by resolving major ambiguities concerning the scope of application and implementation schedules. The agreement marks a critical step in stabilizing the regulatory environment for artificial intelligence across the European Union.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国AI企业需密切关注修正案对高风险AI系统的定义及合规义务调整。建议立即评估现有产品是否符合新规，特别是针对通用AI模型的透明度要求。应建立动态合规机制，利用生效前的窗口期优化数据治理与算法备案，避免因法规突变导致的市场准入障碍或高额罚款风险。
items.ai_insight_en: Stakeholders should closely monitor how the Omnibus revisions refine the definition of high-risk AI systems and adjust associated compliance obligations. It is advisable to immediately assess whether current products align with the updated framework, particularly regarding transparency mandates for general-purpose AI models. Establishing dynamic compliance mechanisms during the pre-enforcement window allows organizations to optimize data governance and algorithmic documentation. Proactive adaptation mitigates risks of market access barriers or substantial penalties resulting from sudden regulatory shifts, ensuring smoother integration into the EU digital market.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧盟三大机构就AI法案一揽子修正案达成关键政治协议", "修正案旨在解决实施难题，关键变更将快速纳入最终法律文本", "协议消除了监管不确定性，为企业合规提供明确预期和时间表"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["EU institutions secured a pivotal political deal on the AI Act Omnibus, overcoming previous deadlock.", "Key amendments addressing implementation challenges will be rapidly incorporated into the final legal text.", "The agreement reduces regulatory uncertainty, offering clearer compliance expectations and timelines."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["评估修正案对高风险AI定义的影响，调整合规策略", "利用生效窗口期优化数据治理，规避市场准入风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Assess the impact of revised high-risk AI definitions on product portfolios and adjust compliance strategies accordingly.", "Practice note: Leverage the pre-enforcement window to enhance data governance frameworks and mitigate market access risks.", "What to monitor: Final publication of the amended text and specific guidance on general-purpose AI model transparency requirements."]
core_points_en: EU institutions secured a pivotal political deal on the AI Act Omnibus, overcoming previous deadlock.
Key amendments addressing implementation challenges will be rapidly incorporated into the final legal text.
The agreement reduces regulatory uncertainty, offering clearer compliance expectations and timelines.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Assess the impact of revised high-risk AI definitions on product portfolios and adjust compliance strategies accordingly.
Practice note: Leverage the pre-enforcement window to enhance data governance frameworks and mitigate market access risks.
What to monitor: Final publication of the amended text and specific guidance on general-purpose AI model transparency requirements.

items.title: Partial success for Millenium Pharma in battle over Velcade in Paris
items.title_zh: 巴黎法院裁定：Millennium Pharma在Velcade专利战中部分胜诉
items.title_en: Paris Court Rules Partially in Favor of Millennium Pharma in Velcade Patent Dispute
items.summary: Millennium Pharmaceuticals and Cilag accuse several generic drug companies of infringing patents EP 2 251 344 B1 and EP 3 078 667 B1. Both protect a formulation of boronic acid compounds. They form the basis of Millennium’s drug Velcade with the active ingredient bortezomib. The drug treats multiple myeloma and mantle cell lymphoma. Since the patents expired […] The post Partial success for Millenium Pharma in battle over Velcade in Paris appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: Millennium Pharmaceuticals与Cilag指控多家仿制药企侵犯其保护硼酸化合物制剂的欧洲专利EP 2 251 344 B1和EP 3 078 667 B1，该专利是抗癌药Velcade的基础。巴黎司法法院作出裁决，原告获得部分胜诉。鉴于相关专利已过期，此案主要涉及过往侵权行为的法律责任认定及赔偿问题，体现了原研药企在专利到期后仍通过诉讼维护市场利益的策略。
items.ai_summary_en: Millennium Pharmaceuticals and Cilag initiated proceedings against several generic manufacturers alleging infringement of European patents EP 2 251 344 B1 and EP 3 078 667 B1. These patents cover formulations of boronic acid compounds used in the anticancer drug Velcade (bortezomib). The Paris Judicial Court delivered a ruling resulting in partial success for the patent holders. The case highlights ongoing litigation dynamics regarding pharmaceutical formulations even as patent protections reach their expiration.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，法国后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision illustrates the continued enforcement activity by originator companies regarding formulation patents near or after expiry. Rights holders may pursue claims based on past activities or specific formulation aspects distinct from the active ingredient itself. Market participants should track how national courts interpret infringement boundaries for such secondary patents when primary composition-of-matter protections expire.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["Millennium指控仿制药企侵犯Velcade基础专利，巴黎法院裁定部分胜诉", "涉案专利保护硼酸化合物制剂，虽已过期但侵权追责仍在进行中", "案件凸显原研药企利用剩余法律手段延缓仿制药全面进入市场的策略"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Millennium Pharmaceuticals and Cilag accused multiple generic companies of infringing two European patents covering boronic acid compound formulations.", "The disputed patents protect the formulation of Velcade, an active treatment for multiple myeloma and mantle cell lymphoma.", "The Paris Judicial Court issued a judgment granting partial success to the plaintiffs in this patent infringement dispute."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕原研药企专利到期后的历史侵权追溯诉讼风险", "加强FTO分析与无效证据储备，应对潜在高额索赔"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Originator firms continue leveraging formulation patents to address market entry challenges post-expiry of core compound rights.", "Practice note: Courts assess infringement claims for specific pharmaceutical formulations separately from the validity status of the underlying active ingredient patents.", "What to monitor: Future rulings in France concerning the scope of protection for boronic acid formulations and similar secondary patent assets."]
core_points_en: Millennium Pharmaceuticals and Cilag accused multiple generic companies of infringing two European patents covering boronic acid compound formulations.
The disputed patents protect the formulation of Velcade, an active treatment for multiple myeloma and mantle cell lymphoma.
The Paris Judicial Court issued a judgment granting partial success to the plaintiffs in this patent infringement dispute.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Originator firms continue leveraging formulation patents to address market entry challenges post-expiry of core compound rights.
Practice note: Courts assess infringement claims for specific pharmaceutical formulations separately from the validity status of the underlying active ingredient patents.
What to monitor: Future rulings in France concerning the scope of protection for boronic acid formulations and similar secondary patent assets.

items.title: UPC update: 3D printing first | motorcycle dispute rumbles on
items.title_zh: UPC更新：3D打印首案与摩托车纠纷持续
items.title_en: UPC Update: First 3D Printing Patent Case and Ongoing Motorcycle Dispute
items.summary: Publication of the UPC’s annual report and adoption of the procedural rules of the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre were also among major developments
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文报道了统一专利法院（UPC）的最新动态。首先提及了一起涉及3D打印技术的首例案件，标志着该技术在UPC诉讼中的首次亮相。其次，指出一起摩托车专利纠纷仍在进行中，显示相关诉讼的持续性。此外，UPC发布了年度报告，并通过了专利调解和仲裁中心的程序规则，进一步完善了其争议解决机制。这些发展反映了UPC在建立判例法和优化程序方面的持续努力。
items.ai_summary_en: This update covers significant recent developments at the Unified Patent Court (UPC). A landmark case involving 3D printing technology has been initiated, marking the first time this specific technical field has appeared in UPC litigation. Concurrently, a high-profile patent dispute within the motorcycle industry continues to proceed through the court system, highlighting the sustained nature of complex cross-border IP conflicts. Additionally, the UPC published its annual report, providing transparency on its operational progress. Crucially, the procedural rules for the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre were formally adopted. These measures collectively enhance the court’s alternative dispute resolution framework, offering parties more flexible mechanisms beyond traditional litigation. These updates reflect the UPC’s ongoing efforts to establish robust jurisprudence and optimize procedural efficiency for stakeholders across Europe.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业需密切关注UPC在3D打印等新兴技术领域的判例，以预判侵权风险。同时，应熟悉新通过的调解与仲裁规则，将其作为低成本解决跨境专利纠纷的有效替代方案。建议加强在欧专利布局与合规审查，利用UPC多元化争议解决机制维护自身权益。
items.ai_insight_en: Stakeholders should closely monitor UPC jurisprudence regarding emerging technologies like 3D printing to anticipate potential infringement risks and define claim scopes accurately. The adoption of formal procedural rules for mediation and arbitration provides a viable, cost-effective alternative to full litigation for resolving cross-border patent disputes. Companies operating in Europe are advised to integrate these alternative mechanisms into their broader IP enforcement strategies. Furthermore, maintaining rigorous compliance with European patent standards and leveraging the UPC’s diversified dispute resolution framework can help protect commercial interests while managing legal exposure efficiently in a multi-jurisdictional environment.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC审理首例涉及3D打印技术的专利案件，确立新领域司法实践", "摩托车行业专利纠纷仍在UPC持续进行，体现诉讼长期性特征", "UPC发布年报并通过调解仲裁中心程序规则，完善争议解决机制"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UPC is hearing its first patent case involving 3D printing technology, establishing initial judicial practice in this emerging sector.", "A major motorcycle industry patent dispute remains active before the UPC, demonstrating the prolonged timeline characteristic of such litigation.", "The UPC released its annual report and adopted procedural rules for the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre to strengthen dispute resolution options."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注3D打印等新领域UPC判例，预判潜在侵权风险", "善用调解仲裁机制，降低跨境专利纠纷解决成本"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor new UPC precedents in emerging tech sectors like 3D printing to assess infringement exposure and guide R&D compliance.", "Practice note: Utilize the newly adopted mediation and arbitration rules as strategic, lower-cost alternatives to resolve cross-border patent conflicts.", "What to monitor: Track the progression of the ongoing motorcycle dispute and the implementation of the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre's procedures."]
core_points_en: The UPC is hearing its first patent case involving 3D printing technology, establishing initial judicial practice in this emerging sector.
A major motorcycle industry patent dispute remains active before the UPC, demonstrating the prolonged timeline characteristic of such litigation.
The UPC released its annual report and adopted procedural rules for the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre to strengthen dispute resolution options.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor new UPC precedents in emerging tech sectors like 3D printing to assess infringement exposure and guide R&D compliance.
Practice note: Utilize the newly adopted mediation and arbitration rules as strategic, lower-cost alternatives to resolve cross-border patent conflicts.
What to monitor: Track the progression of the ongoing motorcycle dispute and the implementation of the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre's procedures.

items.title: New MPEG-DASH disputes add heat to streaming patent licensing wars
items.title_zh: 新MPEG-DASH纠纷加剧流媒体专利许可战
items.title_en: New MPEG-DASH disputes add heat to streaming patent licensing wars
items.summary: Huawei sues RTL at the UPC, following assertions by fellow Avanci Video licensor Helios Streaming against other streamers
items.ai_summary_zh: 华为在统一专利法院（UPC）起诉RTL，紧随Avanci视频许可池成员Helios Streaming对其他流媒体服务商的专利主张。此举标志着基于MPEG-DASH标准的流媒体专利许可争端升级，反映了标准必要专利（SEP）持有者与内容分发平台间激烈的许可谈判与诉讼博弈，凸显了欧洲市场在视频技术IP合规方面的高压态势。
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国流媒体及硬件出口企业需高度关注Avanci等许可池的动态。面对UPC诉讼激增，建议提前进行FTO分析，评估SEP许可必要性，并建立快速响应机制以应对潜在禁令风险，避免高额赔偿与市场准入受阻。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["华为在UPC起诉RTL，引发MPEG-DASH标准许可新争议", "Avanci视频许可池成员加强针对流媒体平台的专利维权", "欧洲流媒体行业面临日益严峻的标准必要专利诉讼风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕Avanci许可池在UPC发起的集中诉讼行动", "尽快评估MPEG-DASH相关SEP许可成本与合规风险"]

items.title: UPC revokes Chinese military medical research institute’s remdesivir patent
items.title_zh: UPC米兰分部撤销中国军科院瑞德西韦专利
items.title_en: UPC Milan Division Revokes AMMS Remdesivir Patent and Rejects Amendments
items.summary: According to the judgment, the value of the patent dispute is €20 million. However, following the defeat, the Chinese Academy of Military Medical Sciences (AMMS) only has to pay €800,000, which it had previously agreed with Gilead. This week, the central division Milan completely revoked one of AMMS’ patents and rejected amendments (case ID: UPC_CFI_552/2025). […] The post UPC revokes Chinese military medical research institute’s remdesivir patent appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）米兰中央分部作出判决，完全撤销中国人民解放军军事医学科学院（AMMS）的一项瑞德西韦专利，并驳回其修改请求。本案争议标的额为2000万欧元，但依据此前与吉利德科学达成的协议，AMMS败诉后仅需支付80万欧元诉讼费用。该案件编号为UPC_CFI_552/2025，标志着中国科研机构在UPC体系下的专利维权遭遇重大挫折，凸显了欧洲专利无效程序的高风险性。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) Central Division in Milan has issued a judgment completely revoking a patent held by the Chinese Academy of Military Medical Sciences (AMMS) related to remdesivir. The court also rejected proposed amendments to the patent claims in case UPC_CFI_552/2025. The dispute involved a value of €20 million. Under a prior agreement with Gilead, AMMS is liable for €800,000 following this adverse decision.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision illustrates the UPC's authority to centrally invalidate patents across participating states. For rights holders, particularly those from non-European jurisdictions, the outcome underscores the importance of robust claim drafting and validity assessments before engaging in UPC litigation. The rejection of amendments highlights the strict standards applied during central division proceedings.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC米兰分部完全撤销中国军科院瑞德西韦专利并驳回修改", "争议标的2000万欧元，依协议败诉方仅付80万欧元诉讼费用", "案件编号UPC_CFI_552/2025，体现UPC对专利有效性严格审查"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UPC Central Division in Milan fully revoked an AMMS remdesivir patent and rejected amendment requests.", "The case ID is UPC_CFI_552/2025, involving a disputed value of €20 million between the parties.", "AMMS must pay €800,000 pursuant to a pre-existing agreement with Gilead following the patent revocation."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC判决具全域效力，专利被撤将导致全境权利丧失", "建议在欧诉讼前加强FTO分析及预设无效抗辩策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Central division rulings can lead to immediate, broad invalidation of patent rights across multiple jurisdictions.", "Practice note: Applicants should ensure strong foundational validity support, as post-grant amendment opportunities may be limited or rejected.", "What to monitor: Future UPC Central Division decisions regarding patent validity challenges and the treatment of auxiliary requests."]
core_points_en: The UPC Central Division in Milan fully revoked an AMMS remdesivir patent and rejected amendment requests.
The case ID is UPC_CFI_552/2025, involving a disputed value of €20 million between the parties.
AMMS must pay €800,000 pursuant to a pre-existing agreement with Gilead following the patent revocation.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Central division rulings can lead to immediate, broad invalidation of patent rights across multiple jurisdictions.
Practice note: Applicants should ensure strong foundational validity support, as post-grant amendment opportunities may be limited or rejected.
What to monitor: Future UPC Central Division decisions regarding patent validity challenges and the treatment of auxiliary requests.

items.title: Beware of fake emails about trade mark applications
items.title_zh: 警惕关于商标申请的虚假电子邮件
items.title_en: BOIP Issues Warning Regarding Fraudulent Emails Targeting Trademark Applicants
items.ai_summary_zh: 比荷卢知识产权局（BOIP）发布官方警告，提醒申请人注意针对商标申请的诈骗邮件。此类邮件通常模仿官方通知，要求支付非官方费用或提供敏感信息。BOIP强调其不会通过电子邮件索取额外注册费，并建议公众核实发件人地址及链接真实性，以防遭受经济损失或个人数据泄露，确保商标注册流程的安全与合规。
items.ai_summary_en: The Benelux Office for Intellectual Property (BOIP) has issued an official alert warning trademark applicants about sophisticated phishing emails. These fraudulent messages often mimic official BOIP communications, attempting to deceive recipients into paying non-official fees or disclosing sensitive personal and business information. The office explicitly states that it never requests additional registration fees via email. To protect against financial loss and data breaches, the BOIP advises all stakeholders to carefully verify sender addresses and the authenticity of any embedded links before taking action. This measure is critical to ensuring the security and compliance of the trademark registration process within the Benelux region.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在比荷卢地区进行商标布局时，需高度警惕此类定向诈骗。建议建立内部IP通讯审核机制，仅通过BOIP官网验证缴费通知，切勿点击不明链接。这有助于避免因误付费用导致的资金损失及商业机密泄露，保障海外知识产权资产安全。
items.ai_insight_en: For companies managing intellectual property portfolios in the Benelux region, vigilance against targeted social engineering attacks is essential. Organizations should implement robust internal verification protocols for all IP-related communications. It is advisable to cross-check any payment demands or urgent notices directly through the official BOIP website rather than relying on email links. Establishing strict internal review mechanisms helps prevent accidental transfers to fraudulent accounts and safeguards confidential commercial data. Proactive monitoring ensures that overseas IP assets remain secure from evolving digital threats designed to exploit administrative procedures.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["BOIP警示存在冒充官方的商标申请诈骗邮件", "官方明确声明不会通过邮件索取额外注册费用", "建议用户仔细核实邮件来源以防范数据泄露风险"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["BOIP warns of scam emails impersonating official notices to trick trademark applicants into paying unauthorized fees.", "The office confirms it does not request extra registration payments through email channels under any circumstances.", "Users are urged to verify sender details and link legitimacy to prevent data leaks and financial fraud risks."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["建立内部IP邮件审核机制，严防诈骗汇款", "仅通过官方渠道验证通知，保障数据安全"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Implement strict internal audit mechanisms for IP correspondence to prevent fraudulent wire transfers.", "Practice note: Verify all official notifications exclusively through the BOIP website to ensure data security and accuracy.", "What to monitor: Emerging phishing tactics targeting trademark applicants seeking to extract sensitive information or payments."]
core_points_en: BOIP warns of scam emails impersonating official notices to trick trademark applicants into paying unauthorized fees.
The office confirms it does not request extra registration payments through email channels under any circumstances.
Users are urged to verify sender details and link legitimacy to prevent data leaks and financial fraud risks.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Implement strict internal audit mechanisms for IP correspondence to prevent fraudulent wire transfers.
Practice note: Verify all official notifications exclusively through the BOIP website to ensure data security and accuracy.
What to monitor: Emerging phishing tactics targeting trademark applicants seeking to extract sensitive information or payments.

items.title: English High Court ZTE-Samsung ruling says major “non-FRAND factors” at play in SEP licences
items.title_zh: 英高院ZTE诉三星案：SEP许可中“非FRAND因素”起关键作用
items.title_en: English High Court ZTE-Samsung ruling says major “non-FRAND factors” at play in SEP licences
items.summary: A close reading of 50,000-word-plus ruling offers useful guidance on the rate-setting approach of Mr Justice Meade
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国高等法院在ZTE诉三星案中发布超五万字的详细判决，由Meade法官主审。该裁决深入分析了标准必要专利（SEP）许可费率的确定方法，明确指出在计算FRAND费率时，除技术价值外，还存在重大的“非FRAND因素”需纳入考量。这一判决为后续类似案件的费率设定提供了重要的司法指引，强调了综合评估在许可谈判中的必要性。
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国通信企业应密切关注英国法院对“非FRAND因素”的界定，这可能增加许可成本不确定性。建议加强全球诉讼策略协同，特别是在费率抗辩中充分举证非技术因素，以争取更公平的FRAND条款，避免被动接受高额许可费。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["英高院Meade法官作出详尽判决，明确SEP许可费率设定需考量多重因素", "裁决指出存在重大“非FRAND因素”，这些因素影响最终许可条件的公平性", "该案为欧洲SEP诉讼提供关键参考，强调综合评估而非单一技术指标定费率"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注“非FRAND因素”界定，预判其对许可成本的潜在影响", "强化费率抗辩证据链，利用非技术因素争取公平许可条件"]

items.title: LD Hamburg, April 27, 2026, Decision, UPC_CFI_685/2024, UPC_CFI_157/2025
items.title_zh: UPC汉堡地院：辅助请求数量及权利要求宽泛解释影响新颖性
items.title_en: UPC Hamburg: Admissibility of Auxiliary Requests and Impact of Broad Claim Construction on Novelty
items.summary: The Local Division Hamburg of the Unified Patent Court examined infringement and revocation claims involving EP 2 077 811, a patent held by Teleflex Life Sciences II LLC and challenged by Speed Care Mineral GmbH. The proceedings addressed questions of patent validity under multiple European Patent Convention articles and the application of the Rules of Procedure in cross-border patent disputes across ten European jurisdictions.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）汉堡地方法院审理了Teleflex诉Speed Care案，涉及EP 2 077 811专利的侵权与无效。法院裁定在面临多重有效性挑战时，多达51项的辅助请求可被允许；但被告若已知理由却延迟提出反诉，将因缺乏勤勉而被驳回。此外，法院对“粘土材料”等术语进行宽泛的功能性解释，虽利于认定侵权，但也扩大了现有技术范围，导致专利新颖性丧失。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court Local Division Hamburg addressed infringement and revocation claims concerning EP 2 077 811, held by Teleflex Life Sciences II LLC against Speed Care Mineral GmbH. The decision clarified procedural standards under the Rules of Procedure, ruling that up to 51 auxiliary requests may be admissible when facing diverse validity challenges. However, late amendments to counterclaims were rejected due to lack of diligence. Crucially, the court applied a broad functional interpretation to terms like 'clay material' and 'binder,' which expanded the prior art base and resulted in a finding of lack of novelty.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC诉讼时，应注重程序策略的严谨性，避免以已知理由延迟抗辩。同时，需警惕权利要求宽泛解释带来的风险，在撰写和修改权利要求时平衡保护范围与新颖性，避免因功能性限定过宽而引入不利现有技术，确保专利稳定性。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment highlights critical procedural and substantive risks in UPC litigation. Rights holders must balance claim breadth with stability, as functional definitions may inadvertently expand the relevant prior art. Defendants must exercise strict diligence in filing counterclaims, ensuring all known grounds are raised promptly to avoid rejection. The acceptance of numerous auxiliary requests suggests courts will accommodate complex validity defenses, requiring robust preparation from both parties.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["面对复杂有效性挑战时，大量辅助请求可能被视为可接受", "被告延迟提出已知理由的反诉，因缺乏勤勉将被驳回", "宽泛的功能性权利要求解释可能扩大现有技术从而破坏新颖性"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["High numbers of auxiliary requests are admissible if justified by complex technology and multiple distinct validity attacks such as novelty or inventive step.", "Late amendments to counterclaims for revocation are rejected if the defendant fails to demonstrate reasonable diligence under Rule 263(2)(a) RoP.", "Broad functional claim construction can widen the scope of anticipating prior art, potentially destroying patent novelty despite aiding infringement findings."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC诉讼需严守程序时限，避免以已知理由延迟抗辩", "平衡权利要求范围与新颖性，警惕宽泛解释引入现有技术"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Broad functional claim language increases infringement potential but significantly raises novelty risks by expanding the prior art search field.", "Practice note: Ensure counterclaims include all known validity grounds early; failure to do so demonstrates lack of diligence under Rule 263(2)(a) RoP.", "What to monitor: How other UPC divisions apply similar diligence standards for late amendments and interpret functional claim terms in cross-border disputes."]
core_points_en: High numbers of auxiliary requests are admissible if justified by complex technology and multiple distinct validity attacks such as novelty or inventive step.
Late amendments to counterclaims for revocation are rejected if the defendant fails to demonstrate reasonable diligence under Rule 263(2)(a) RoP.
Broad functional claim construction can widen the scope of anticipating prior art, potentially destroying patent novelty despite aiding infringement findings.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Broad functional claim language increases infringement potential but significantly raises novelty risks by expanding the prior art search field.
Practice note: Ensure counterclaims include all known validity grounds early; failure to do so demonstrates lack of diligence under Rule 263(2)(a) RoP.
What to monitor: How other UPC divisions apply similar diligence standards for late amendments and interpret functional claim terms in cross-border disputes.

items.title: LD The Hague, April 24, 2026, Order, UPC_CFI_305/2026
items.title_zh: UPC海牙分院驳回Stratasys临时措施申请并确立程序先例
items.title_en: UPC Hague Dismisses Stratasys Provisional Measures, Clarifies Claim Construction and Online Participation Rules
items.summary: The Local Division of The Hague's decision in UPC-CFI-305/2026 addresses critical questions about claim construction under Article 69 EPC and procedural rules for online participation in patent proceedings. The case involves Stratasys's application for provisional measures against Bambulab concerning EP 2 964 450, with the court interpreting the technical meaning of "layer by layer manner" in 3D printing technology. Additionally, the ruling establishes important precedent regarding the participa
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC海牙地方法院在Stratasys诉Bambulab案中驳回临时措施申请。法院依据EPC第69条将“逐层方式”解释为每层仅含单一材料，认定被告产品未字面侵权。同时裁定当事人方不允许安排远程“记录员”在线参会，以防未经授权的录音。申请人需承担11.2万欧元费用，该命令可直接执行。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Local Division in The Hague dismissed Stratasys’s application for provisional measures against Bambulab regarding EP 2 964 450. Applying the 'more likely than not' standard, the Court found no likelihood of infringement. Crucially, under Article 69 EPC, the term 'in a layer by layer manner' was construed to require each horizontal layer of a purge tower to consist of a single material. Since Bambulab’s product uses layers with multiple materials side-by-side, literal infringement was excluded. The ruling also established that parties may not employ remote 'minute takers' during online hearings, as this resembles unauthorized recording. The applicant bears the burden of proof and was ordered to pay €112,000 in costs, with the decision being immediately enforceable.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国3D打印企业应重视UPC权利要求的严格解释风险，确保产品设计避开“单层单材”等限定特征。诉讼中需严格遵守在线庭审纪律，避免违规旁听导致不利后果。此外，临时措施败诉成本高昂且可立即执行，建议提前评估侵权概率与证据充分性，谨慎发起或应对禁令申请。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision highlights the UPC’s rigorous approach to claim construction, particularly regarding technical features like 'layer by layer' manufacturing. Parties seeking provisional measures must ensure their infringement arguments align strictly with the patent description and prosecution history, as broader interpretations risk dismissal. Furthermore, strict adherence to procedural rules for online participation is essential; employing remote assistants for note-taking can lead to immediate exclusion and adverse cost orders. Litigants should conduct thorough freedom-to-operate analyses considering these narrow constructions and prepare robust evidence to meet the high burden of proof required for interim relief.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院依EPC第69条将“逐层”限缩解释为单层单材料，认定无字面侵权", "禁止当事人安排远程记录员参会，因其性质类似不受控的非法录音", "临时措施费用命令具直接执行力，举证责任由申请人承担且需满足盖然性"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Provisional measures dismissed as applicant failed to prove infringement on balance of probabilities, avoiding need to address urgency or invalidity defenses.", "Claim construction under Article 69 EPC requires each purge tower layer to contain only one material type, excluding defendant's multi-material layers from literal scope.", "Remote 'minute takers' are prohibited in online proceedings due to risks resembling unauthorized recordings, distinct from permitted transcription services."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["设计规避需针对“单层单材”等严格解释特征进行FTO分析", "严守在线庭审纪律，避免因违规旁听引发程序风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Conduct FTO analyses accounting for strict claim constructions, such as single-material layer requirements, to mitigate infringement risks.", "Practice note: Avoid using remote minute takers in online hearings to prevent procedural violations and potential cost sanctions.", "What to monitor: Future UPC rulings on equivalence arguments and the evolving standards for online hearing participation protocols."]
core_points_en: Provisional measures dismissed as applicant failed to prove infringement on balance of probabilities, avoiding need to address urgency or invalidity defenses.
Claim construction under Article 69 EPC requires each purge tower layer to contain only one material type, excluding defendant's multi-material layers from literal scope.
Remote 'minute takers' are prohibited in online proceedings due to risks resembling unauthorized recordings, distinct from permitted transcription services.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Conduct FTO analyses accounting for strict claim constructions, such as single-material layer requirements, to mitigate infringement risks.
Practice note: Avoid using remote minute takers in online hearings to prevent procedural violations and potential cost sanctions.
What to monitor: Future UPC rulings on equivalence arguments and the evolving standards for online hearing participation protocols.

items.title: LD Brussels, April 27, 2026, Order, UPC_CFI_871/2026
items.title_zh: UPC布鲁塞尔分院驳回荷兰公司变更英语诉讼语言申请
items.title_en: UPC Brussels Denies Language Change to English, Citing Party Size Imbalance and Shared Domicile
items.summary: The Local Division Brussels of the Unified Patent Court examined an application to change the language of proceedings in a patent dispute between Dutch companies. The decision explores how factors such as party size, domicile, and technological context influence language selection, even when the patent's original language is commonly used in the relevant technical field.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）布鲁塞尔地方分院在Esko诉In(k)control案中，依据《程序规则》第323条及《协定》第49(5)条，驳回了被告将诉讼语言从荷兰语变更为英语的申请。法院裁定，尽管涉案专利为英语，但考虑到原告为小企业且双方均位于同一语言区，维持荷兰语有助于平衡双方地位并避免对小企业造成不公。此外，法院强调未经授权的额外提交材料不可受理，以确保快速决策。
items.ai_summary_en: The Local Division Brussels of the Unified Patent Court dismissed an application by defendants Esko-Software BV and Esko-Graphics BV to change the language of proceedings from Dutch to English in their dispute with In(k)control BV. Relying on Article 49(5) UPCA and Rule 323 RoP, the Court held that despite the patent being in English, the significant size disparity between the small enterprise claimant and the large multinational defendant constituted a specific circumstance favoring the local language. The shared domicile of all parties within the same linguistic territory further supported maintaining Dutch to ensure procedural fairness. The decision also clarified that unsolicited submissions regarding language changes are inadmissible without prior authorization, emphasizing the need for rapid case management and strict adherence to procedural rules.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在UPC诉讼中应审慎评估语言策略。若对方为欧洲中小企业，试图利用英语优势可能因“力量失衡”被驳回。建议提前规划语言选择，严格遵守程序规则，避免提交未授权材料导致程序延误或不利推定，注重程序合规与实质公平的平衡。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling highlights the UPC’s commitment to balancing procedural efficiency with substantive fairness, particularly regarding access to justice for smaller entities. Litigants should recognize that the language of the patent does not automatically dictate the language of proceedings if it creates an imbalance. Courts will closely examine party profiles and domiciles when exercising discretion under Article 49(5). Practitioners must strictly comply with Rule 323 procedures, avoiding unauthorized filings that risk rejection. Strategic planning should account for potential judicial reluctance to alter languages when parties share a local linguistic context, ensuring arguments focus on demonstrable disadvantages rather than mere preference.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["未经授权的额外提交材料通常不可受理，以保障案件快速审理效率", "当事人规模差异及共同住所地可作为拒绝变更语言的决定性具体情形", "变更语言申请可在答辩前提出，不受送达形式要求的严格限制"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Unsolicited submissions in language change applications are generally inadmissible to ensure rapid decisions and efficient case management.", "Party size disparities and shared domicile can outweigh the technical convenience of using the patent's original language as the proceeding language.", "Applications to change proceedings language may be filed before the Statement of Defence and are not subject to standard service formalities."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕UPC对大小企业间语言优势的平衡审查，避免滥用英语程序", "严格遵守R.323程序规则，确保语言变更申请的时机与形式合规"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Assess whether seeking a language change might be perceived as exploiting size advantages against smaller opponents in shared linguistic regions.", "Practice note: File language change applications early, preferably before the Statement of Defence, and avoid submitting unsolicited materials without prior court authorization.", "What to monitor: How future divisions interpret 'specific circumstances' regarding party size and domicile when balancing efficiency against equitable access to proceedings."]
core_points_en: Unsolicited submissions in language change applications are generally inadmissible to ensure rapid decisions and efficient case management.
Party size disparities and shared domicile can outweigh the technical convenience of using the patent's original language as the proceeding language.
Applications to change proceedings language may be filed before the Statement of Defence and are not subject to standard service formalities.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Assess whether seeking a language change might be perceived as exploiting size advantages against smaller opponents in shared linguistic regions.
Practice note: File language change applications early, preferably before the Statement of Defence, and avoid submitting unsolicited materials without prior court authorization.
What to monitor: How future divisions interpret 'specific circumstances' regarding party size and domicile when balancing efficiency against equitable access to proceedings.

items.title: CJEU Clarifies The ‘Pastiche’ Exception Under EU Copyright Law
items.title_zh: CJEU澄清欧盟版权法下“拼贴”例外适用范围
items.title_en: CJEU Clarifies Pastiche Exception: Three Criteria for Lawful Music Sampling Under EU Copyright
items.summary: On April 14, 2026, the Court of Justice of the European Union (CJEU) issued a landmark ruling in Case C-590/23 (Pelham II), clarifying the scope of the “pastiche” exception under Article 5(3)(k)...
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年4月14日，欧盟法院在Pelham II案中裁定，音乐采样若满足唤起原作、存在显著差异及进行艺术对话三个累积条件，可构成合法的“拼贴”使用。该判决澄清了《信息社会指令》第5(3)(k)条的适用范围，排除了隐蔽模仿和抄袭。此案源于Kraftwerk与Moses Pelham长达25年的纠纷，为创意产业利用受保护作品提供了关键法律指引。
items.ai_summary_en: On April 14, 2026, the Court of Justice of the European Union issued a landmark ruling in Case C-590/23 (Pelham II), defining the scope of the 'pastiche' exception under Article 5(3)(k) of the InfoSoc Directive. The Court held that music sampling qualifies as lawful pastiche only if it meets three cumulative conditions: it must evoke the original work, exhibit perceptible differences, and engage in a recognizable artistic dialogue with the source. This decision resolves a twenty-five-year dispute between Kraftwerk and Moses Pelham, providing critical legal certainty for creative industries utilizing protected works. It explicitly excludes covert imitation and plagiarism from the exception, offering essential guidance for sectors ranging from music to AI-generated content regarding permissible appropriation of existing intellectual property.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国出海企业需重新评估涉及采样或二次创作的合规策略。虽本案聚焦版权而非专利，但其对“转换性使用”的严格界定警示企业：仅凭微小改动无法规避侵权风险。建议建立严格的IP审查机制，确保衍生作品具备显著独创性并尊重原作者权益，以应对欧盟日益严格的知识产权保护环境。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment establishes a strict framework for transformative uses, signaling that minor modifications do not automatically qualify for copyright exceptions. Rights holders and creators must ensure derivative works possess significant originality to avoid infringement risks. Legal teams should implement rigorous IP compliance reviews for sampling and secondary creations, verifying that new works meet the specific criteria for pastiche. As debates on AI training data intensify, this precedent offers a benchmark for assessing fair use boundaries. Stakeholders must prioritize respect for original authors' rights while navigating the evolving landscape of digital creativity and content appropriation in the European market.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["确立合法拼贴三要件：唤起原作、显著差异及艺术对话", "明确例外非兜底条款，隐蔽模仿与抄袭不在此列", "为音乐采样及AI生成内容提供长期期待的法律确定性"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Lawful pastiche requires three cumulative elements: evoking the original, showing perceptible differences, and engaging in artistic dialogue.", "The exception is not a catch-all provision; covert imitation and plagiarism are explicitly excluded from lawful use.", "The ruling provides long-awaited legal certainty for music sampling and emerging AI-generated content practices."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["二次创作须具备显著独创性以符合拼贴例外", "警惕隐蔽模仿风险，建立严格IP合规审查流程"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Derivative works must demonstrate significant originality to satisfy the strict pastiche criteria established by the CJEU.", "Practice note: Implement robust IP compliance workflows to screen for covert imitation and ensure lawful transformation of protected materials.", "What to monitor: Ongoing judicial interpretations of 'artistic dialogue' and their potential application to AI-generated content disputes."]
core_points_en: Lawful pastiche requires three cumulative elements: evoking the original, showing perceptible differences, and engaging in artistic dialogue.
The exception is not a catch-all provision; covert imitation and plagiarism are explicitly excluded from lawful use.
The ruling provides long-awaited legal certainty for music sampling and emerging AI-generated content practices.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Derivative works must demonstrate significant originality to satisfy the strict pastiche criteria established by the CJEU.
Practice note: Implement robust IP compliance workflows to screen for covert imitation and ensure lawful transformation of protected materials.
What to monitor: Ongoing judicial interpretations of 'artistic dialogue' and their potential application to AI-generated content disputes.

items.title: PMAC’s procedural rules adopted by the Administrative Committee
items.title_zh: UPC行政委员会批准PMAC程序规则
items.title_en: UPC Administrative Committee Adopts PMAC Procedural Rules for Mediation and Arbitration
items.summary: The procedural rules of the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) of the Unified Patent Court (UPC) were formally approved and adopted by the Administrative Committee on the 24 April 2026
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年4月24日，统一专利法院（UPC）行政委员会正式批准专利调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）的程序规则。PMAC将提供调解、仲裁及专家裁定等争议解决服务，涵盖欧洲专利、单一专利及相关跨境纠纷，包括SEP/FRAND案件。预计5月启动调解服务，年内陆续开放其他服务。此举标志着UPC体系下替代性争议解决机制的正式确立，为权利人提供了诉讼之外的多元化纠纷处理路径。
items.ai_summary_en: On 24 April 2026, the Administrative Committee of the Unified Patent Court (UPC) formally approved the procedural rules for the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC). This adoption enables PMAC to provide dispute resolution services including mediation, arbitration, expert determination, and hybrid processes. The Centre will handle disputes concerning European and Unitary Patents, as well as related cross-border matters and SEP/FRAND cases. Mediation services are scheduled to commence in May 2026, with arbitration and expert determination services to follow later in the year. Full texts of the rules and fee schedules are available on the PMAC and UPC websites.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: The establishment of PMAC's operational framework provides rights holders with structured non-litigation pathways within the UPC ecosystem. For portfolio managers, this introduces viable options for resolving SEP/FRAND negotiations and cross-border conflicts outside traditional court proceedings. Monitoring the rollout of these services is essential for understanding how alternative dispute resolution may complement or alter current enforcement strategies in Europe.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC行政委员会于2026年4月24日正式通过PMAC程序规则", "PMAC提供调解、仲裁等服务，覆盖单一专利及SEP/FRAND纠纷", "调解服务将于5月启动，仲裁及专家裁定服务年内跟进"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UPC Administrative Committee adopted PMAC procedural rules on 24 April 2026, enabling formal alternative dispute resolution operations.", "PMAC will offer mediation, arbitration, expert determination, and hybrid processes for European and Unitary Patent disputes.", "Services cover complex cross-border cases and SEP/FRAND disputes, with mediation launching in May 2026."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用PMAC非诉机制降低欧洲专利纠纷解决成本与时间", "针对SEP/FRAND复杂案件，探索调解与仲裁的灵活解决方案"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Offers new mechanisms for resolving SEP/FRAND and cross-border patent disputes without immediate litigation.", "Practice note: Review PMAC rules and fee schedules now to prepare for potential mediation or arbitration engagements.", "What to monitor: Track the launch timeline for arbitration and expert determination services later in 2026."]
core_points_en: The UPC Administrative Committee adopted PMAC procedural rules on 24 April 2026, enabling formal alternative dispute resolution operations.
PMAC will offer mediation, arbitration, expert determination, and hybrid processes for European and Unitary Patent disputes.
Services cover complex cross-border cases and SEP/FRAND disputes, with mediation launching in May 2026.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Offers new mechanisms for resolving SEP/FRAND and cross-border patent disputes without immediate litigation.
Practice note: Review PMAC rules and fee schedules now to prepare for potential mediation or arbitration engagements.
What to monitor: Track the launch timeline for arbitration and expert determination services later in 2026.

items.title: German Federal Patent Court grants SPC for safinamide
items.title_zh: 德联邦专利法院授予沙芬酰胺SPC
items.title_en: German Federal Patent Court Grants SPC for Safinamide, Overturning DPMA Rejection
items.summary: On 27 April 2026, the 14th Senate of the Federal Patent Court, presided over by Dörte Otten-Dünnweber, granted an SPC for the period between 8 April 2024 and 7 April 2029 (14 W (pat) 23/24). The presiding judge also works at the UPC. The German Patent and Trademarks Office had initially rejected the application for […] The post German Federal Patent Court grants SPC for safinamide appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年4月27日，德国联邦专利法院第14合议庭裁定授予沙芬酰胺（safinamide）补充保护证书（SPC），有效期为2024年4月8日至2029年4月7日。此前德国专利商标局驳回了该申请。主审法官同时任职于统一专利法院。此案明确了SPC期限计算及审查标准，对制药企业延长市场独占期具有参考意义。
items.ai_summary_en: On 27 April 2026, the 14th Senate of the German Federal Patent Court issued a judgment granting a Supplementary Protection Certificate (SPC) for safinamide. The court ruled that the SPC is valid for a five-year period, specifically from 8 April 2024 to 7 April 2029 (Case No. 14 W (pat) 23/24). This decision reverses the initial refusal by the German Patent and Trademark Office (DPMA), which had rejected the application. Notably, the presiding judge, Dörte Otten-Dünnweber, also serves at the Unified Patent Court (UPC). The ruling clarifies specific standards for SPC term calculation and examination in Germany. It provides significant guidance for pharmaceutical stakeholders seeking to extend market exclusivity periods through supplementary protection mechanisms.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国药企在欧布局需密切关注SPC审批动态，特别是针对已上市药物的二次开发或新适应症。应提前评估基础专利到期后的SPC申请策略，利用司法判例争取最长保护期。同时注意UPC法官背景对案件审理的潜在影响，做好跨国诉讼准备。
items.ai_insight_en: Pharmaceutical companies operating in Europe should closely monitor SPC approval trends, particularly regarding secondary developments or new indications for already marketed drugs. Stakeholders must evaluate SPC application strategies early to maximize protection periods after basic patent expiry. Additionally, the dual role of judges serving in both national courts and the UPC suggests potential influences on case handling. Companies should prepare for cross-border litigation risks by considering judicial backgrounds and ensuring robust legal positioning across jurisdictions to secure optimal intellectual property rights management.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["德联邦专利法院推翻DPMA决定，正式授予沙芬酰胺SPC", "SPC保护期确定为2024年4月至2029年4月，共五年", "主审法官兼任UPC职务，体现德国与欧洲司法体系联动"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The Federal Patent Court overturned the DPMA's rejection, formally granting the SPC for safinamide.", "The SPC protection term is fixed at five years, running from April 2024 to April 2029.", "The presiding judge holds dual roles at the UPC, highlighting links between German and European judicial systems."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注SPC审批趋势，优化在欧药物专利生命周期管理", "重视UPC法官背景，预判跨国知识产权诉讼风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Optimize drug patent lifecycle management in Europe by tracking SPC approval trends and leveraging judicial precedents.", "Practice note: Assess SPC application strategies early for secondary developments to secure maximum protection post-patent expiry.", "What to monitor: Judicial backgrounds of UPC judges and their potential impact on cross-border IP litigation outcomes."]
core_points_en: The Federal Patent Court overturned the DPMA's rejection, formally granting the SPC for safinamide.
The SPC protection term is fixed at five years, running from April 2024 to April 2029.
The presiding judge holds dual roles at the UPC, highlighting links between German and European judicial systems.

Practice note: Assess SPC application strategies early for secondary developments to secure maximum protection post-patent expiry.

items.title: Patenting the use of medical devices (T 0941/24)
items.title_zh: EPO裁定：医疗设备用途的专利申请策略与界限
items.title_en: EPO Decision T 0941/24: Navigating Patentability Boundaries for Medical Device Applications
items.summary: Patenting medical devices in Europe is challenging. First, there is the problem that medical use claims are not permitted for medical devices, whilst simultaneously methods of treatment or surgery using a device are excluded from patentability. However, a recent decision from the Board of Appeal in T 0941/24 demonstrates that it is sometimes possible to navigate the fine line of
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局上诉委员会在T 0941/24案中澄清了医疗设备专利保护的复杂规则。由于欧洲禁止对医疗设备提出医疗用途权利要求，且使用设备的治疗或手术方法不可专利，申请人面临挑战。该裁决指出，尽管存在限制，通过精心构建权利要求，仍可在法律允许的细微界限内为医疗设备的特定应用争取专利保护，为行业提供了重要的合规指引。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office (EPO) maintains strict exclusions regarding medical device patenting, prohibiting medical use claims for devices while simultaneously excluding methods of treatment or surgery from patentability. This creates a complex landscape for applicants seeking protection. The recent Board of Appeal decision in case T 0941/24 provides critical clarification on these rules. It demonstrates that despite statutory limitations, it is possible to secure patent protection for specific applications of medical devices through careful claim construction. The ruling highlights how applicants can navigate the fine legal boundaries to protect technical innovations associated with device usage, offering valuable compliance guidance for the industry.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国医疗器械出口企业需警惕欧洲专利布局陷阱。鉴于治疗方法和直接用途被排除，建议聚焦于设备结构改进、非治疗性操作模式或特定技术参数的创新点撰写申请文件。应提前进行FTO分析，避免侵权风险，并利用专业代理团队优化权利要求以符合EPO审查标准。
items.ai_insight_en: For companies operating in the European market, understanding the distinction between excluded therapeutic methods and patentable technical device features is essential. Since direct medical use claims are not permitted, innovation protection should focus on structural improvements, non-therapeutic operational modes, or specific technical parameters. Conducting thorough freedom-to-operate analyses is recommended to mitigate infringement risks. Engaging specialized patent professionals to optimize claim language ensures alignment with EPO examination standards, thereby maximizing the scope of valid protection for medical device technologies.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧洲禁止医疗设备医疗用途权利要求及治疗方法专利", "T 0941/24案显示可通过特定方式规避限制获取专利", "需在法律允许范围内精细构建医疗设备应用权利要求"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["European law prohibits medical use claims for medical devices and excludes therapeutic methods from patentability.", "Decision T 0941/24 confirms that specific device applications can be patented via precise claim drafting strategies.", "Applicants must carefully structure claims within legal limits to protect technical features of medical device uses."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["避开治疗用途，聚焦设备结构与非治疗功能创新", "聘请专业代理优化权利要求，确保符合EPO审查标准"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Focus protection efforts on device structure and non-therapeutic functional innovations rather than excluded treatment uses.", "Practice note: Engage specialized agents to draft claims that strictly adhere to EPO technical feature requirements.", "What to monitor: Monitor evolving EPO case law regarding the boundary between technical device features and excluded medical methods."]
core_points_en: European law prohibits medical use claims for medical devices and excludes therapeutic methods from patentability.
Decision T 0941/24 confirms that specific device applications can be patented via precise claim drafting strategies.
Applicants must carefully structure claims within legal limits to protect technical features of medical device uses.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Focus protection efforts on device structure and non-therapeutic functional innovations rather than excluded treatment uses.
Practice note: Engage specialized agents to draft claims that strictly adhere to EPO technical feature requirements.
What to monitor: Monitor evolving EPO case law regarding the boundary between technical device features and excluded medical methods.

items.title: Statutory guidance: Directions for online forms
items.title_zh: UKIPO发布关于通过GOV.UK在线填写和提交官方表格的法定指引
items.title_en: UKIPO Issues Statutory Guidance on Online Completion and Delivery of Official Forms via GOV.UK
items.summary: Introducing the online completion and delivery of official forms through GOV.UK.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局（UKIPO）发布了关于官方表格在线完成与提交的法定指引。该政策旨在推动行政流程数字化，允许申请人通过GOV.UK平台在线填写并交付各类知识产权申请及程序所需的官方表格。此举简化了传统纸质或离线提交方式，提高了办事效率，明确了在线提交的法律地位与操作规范，标志着UKIPO在提升公共服务可及性与现代化方面迈出重要一步。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has published statutory guidance establishing the legal framework for completing and submitting official forms online through the GOV.UK platform. This initiative marks a significant step toward the digital transformation of administrative procedures, allowing applicants to file various intellectual property applications and procedural documents electronically. By replacing traditional paper-based or offline submission methods, the new system aims to enhance operational efficiency and clarify the legal status and operational standards for online filings. This move underscores the UKIPO’s commitment to modernizing public services, improving accessibility, and providing a more streamlined, transparent experience for users navigating the intellectual property registration landscape in the United Kingdom.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在英进行商标、专利等IP申请时，需适应UKIPO的数字化趋势。建议熟悉GOV.UK在线提交系统，确保文件格式合规，以利用电子化便利加速审查进程。同时关注后续可能推出的更多自动化服务，优化内部IP管理流程，降低代理成本与时间延误风险。
items.ai_insight_en: Stakeholders engaging with the UKIPO should adapt to the mandatory shift toward digital filing systems. Ensuring strict compliance with specified electronic format requirements is essential to prevent processing delays and leverage accelerated examination timelines. Organizations are advised to integrate these digital tools into their internal IP management workflows to reduce reliance on external agents and minimize time-related risks. Monitoring future updates regarding automated services will help optimize resource allocation and maintain procedural compliance within the evolving digital infrastructure of the UK intellectual property regime.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UKIPO发布新指引，确立通过GOV.UK在线提交官方表格的法定程序", "实现知识产权申请及程序文件的全面数字化交付，取代部分线下流程", "提升行政处理效率，为申请人提供更便捷、透明的在线服务体验"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["UKIPO establishes statutory procedures for legally valid online submission of official forms via the GOV.UK portal.", "Digital delivery replaces certain offline processes for IP applications and procedural documents across all relevant categories.", "Administrative efficiency improves through streamlined online services offering greater transparency and ease of access."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["熟悉UKIPO在线提交系统，确保文件格式合规以加速审查进程", "利用数字化工具优化内部IP管理，降低代理成本与时间延误风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Adapt to UKIPO's digital filing mandate by ensuring electronic formats meet compliance standards to avoid delays.", "Practice note: Integrate GOV.UK submission tools into internal IP workflows to reduce agency costs and streamline case management.", "What to monitor: Future announcements on automated services and additional digital enhancements to the UKIPO filing ecosystem."]
core_points_en: UKIPO establishes statutory procedures for legally valid online submission of official forms via the GOV.UK portal.
Digital delivery replaces certain offline processes for IP applications and procedural documents across all relevant categories.
Administrative efficiency improves through streamlined online services offering greater transparency and ease of access.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Adapt to UKIPO's digital filing mandate by ensuring electronic formats meet compliance standards to avoid delays.
Practice note: Integrate GOV.UK submission tools into internal IP workflows to reduce agency costs and streamline case management.
What to monitor: Future announcements on automated services and additional digital enhancements to the UKIPO filing ecosystem.

items.title: Chinese court says ZTE’s $731 million Samsung offer is FRAND – what we know so far
items.title_zh: 中国法院认定中兴三星报价符合FRAND：英中判决冲突解析
items.title_en: Chinese court says ZTE’s $731 million Samsung offer is FRAND – what we know so far
items.summary: The Chongqing Intermediate People’s Court and English High Court’s conflicting decisions mark the first time two competing global FRAND rate judgments have been delivered in one dispute
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文报道了重庆中院与英国高等法院在ZTE诉三星SEP纠纷中作出相互冲突的全球FRAND费率判决。这是首次在同一争议中出现两个竞争性全球费率裁决。文章分析了这一冲突对国际知识产权管辖权的影响，指出这标志着全球SEP诉讼进入新阶段，不同法域法院竞相确立全球许可费率，增加了跨国企业合规的复杂性与法律风险。
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业面临多国平行诉讼加剧的风险，需建立全球协同应诉机制。建议重点评估英国法院禁令威慑力，同时利用中国法院判决作为谈判筹码。应加强FRAND费率测算能力，避免单一法域判决导致全局被动，积极主张禁诉令以保护自身权益。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["中英法院就同一SEP纠纷作出相互冲突的全球FRAND费率判决", "此案标志首次出现两个竞争性全球费率裁决，引发管辖权冲突", "凸显全球SEP许可规则碎片化，增加跨国企业法律合规不确定性"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["建立全球协同应诉机制，应对多国平行诉讼加剧风险", "利用中国判决作谈判筹码，平衡英国禁令威慑力影响"]
