items.title: Driving the digital shift: highlights from the eSACEPO meeting
items.title_zh: 驱动数字转型：eSACEPO 会议亮点回顾
items.title_en: EPO eSACEPO Meeting Highlights: Digital Shift, Paperless Goals, and AI Principles
items.summary: On the 24th of March 2026, the EPO hosted a SACEPO Working party on e-Patent Process. The meeting focused on the digitalisation initiatives at the EPO, including the paperless project, MyEPO, DOCX filing system, the legal interact
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026 年 3 月，EPO 召开 eSACEPO 会议，重点讨论 2027 年实现无纸化专利授予流程的目标。会议确认电子提交与通知将成为默认标准，仅保留极少数纸质例外。同时介绍了 MyEPO 平台功能升级、DOCX 格式提交将于 2026 年 4 月生效，以及法律互动平台（LIP）的 AI 模型优化。各方强调在引入人工智能辅助审查时，必须坚持“人类主导”原则。
items.ai_summary_en: In March 2026, the EPO’s Standing Advisory Committee on e-Patent Process (eSACEPO) convened to discuss digitalization initiatives. A primary focus was the target for a fully paperless patent granting process by 2027, establishing electronic filing and notification as the default standard with limited exceptions. The meeting also covered enhancements to the MyEPO platform, including new self-service features, and the implementation of DOCX format filing effective April 1, 2026. Additionally, updates on the Legal Interactive Platform highlighted improvements to its artificial intelligence model. Participants emphasized that while AI assists in search and drafting, human oversight must remain central to ensure quality and control throughout the examination process.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业需提前适应 EPO 全数字化流程，熟练掌握 DOCX 提交及 MyEPO 自助服务。建议关注 AI 辅助工具的使用边界，确保申请文件质量，并利用电子化提速机制优化在欧洲的专利布局效率。
items.ai_insight_en: Stakeholders should prepare for the transition to mandatory electronic workflows by familiarizing themselves with the new DOCX filing specifications and MyEPO self-service capabilities. Utilizing electronic acceleration channels can significantly improve examination efficiency within the European patent system. However, users must carefully manage the use of AI-assisted tools, ensuring that generated content meets rigorous accuracy standards. Maintaining human oversight is critical to mitigate risks associated with automated outputs and to safeguard the legal integrity of patent applications during this digital transformation.

items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["尽快熟悉 DOCX 提交规范与 MyEPO 新功能，避免合规风险", "利用电子加速通道提升审查效率，同时警惕 AI 生成内容的准确性"]

items.title: Guidelines 2026 enter into force, streamlining procedural guidance
items.title_zh: 2026 版 EPO 审查指南生效并简化程序指引
items.title_en: EPO 2026 Guidelines Enter Force, Consolidating Procedural Guidance and Replacing Legacy Guides
items.summary: The 2026 EPC, PCT-EPO and Unitary Patent Guidelines enter into force on 1 April 2026, consolidating guidance and replacing the European Patent and Euro-PCT Guides while remaining open for user consultation until 3 April 2026.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）2026 版《欧洲专利公约》、PCT-EPO 及统一专利审查指南于 4 月 1 日生效。新版指南整合了原《欧洲专利指南》和《Euro-PCT 指南》内容，后者将于 5 月底停用。此次更新旨在现代化法律出版物，提供单一程序指引来源，并开放用户咨询至 4 月 3 日以收集反馈，用于指导 2027 版修订。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office’s 2026 editions of the EPC, PCT-EPO, and Unitary Patent Guidelines officially entered into force on 1 April 2026. These updated documents consolidate procedural guidance by integrating content previously found in the European Patent Guide and the Euro-PCT Guide, which are scheduled for discontinuation by 31 May 2026. This consolidation aims to modernize legal publications and provide a single, streamlined source of procedural information for applicants and representatives. The new Guidelines supersede the April 2025 editions and are available in English, French, and German via the EPO website. Users may access clean or marked-up versions to review changes. Additionally, a public consultation period remains open until 3 April 2026, allowing stakeholders to submit feedback that will inform the preparation of the 2027 edition.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧专利申请需立即适应新版指南，特别是统一专利程序变化。建议法务团队对比新旧版本差异，利用咨询期提交意见，并关注指南整合后的检索与答复策略调整，以降低合规风险。
items.ai_insight_en: Legal teams and patent practitioners should immediately familiarize themselves with the consolidated 2026 Guidelines to ensure compliance with updated procedural standards. The integration of former guides into a unified framework simplifies navigation but requires careful review of modified sections, particularly regarding search and examination practices under the PCT-EPO and Unitary Patent systems. Stakeholders are encouraged to utilize the remaining window for public consultation to address any ambiguities or propose refinements. Proactive adaptation to these streamlined rules will help mitigate procedural risks and optimize prosecution strategies within the European patent system.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["版三大审查指南生效，取代 2025 版成为主要程序依据", "原欧洲专利与 Euro-PCT 指南内容被整合，即将正式停止使用", "用户咨询通道开放至 4 月初，反馈将影响下一年度指南修订"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The 2026 EPC, PCT-EPO, and Unitary Patent Guidelines replace the 2025 editions as the primary procedural authority for EPO interactions.", "Content from the discontinued European Patent Guide and Euro-PCT Guide has been integrated into the new Guidelines and official EPO sources.", "Public consultation on the 2026 Guidelines runs until 3 April 2026, with user feedback shaping the upcoming 2027 revision cycle."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["需立即研读新版指南，调整在欧专利申请与答复策略", "善用公众咨询期提交意见，争取更有利的程序规则环境"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Immediate review of the 2026 Guidelines is essential to align prosecution strategies with the consolidated procedural framework.", "Practice note: Utilize the marked-up online versions to identify specific amendments affecting search, examination, and unitary patent procedures.", "What to monitor: Submit feedback via the dedicated webform before 3 April 2026 to influence the development of the 2027 Guidelines."]
core_points_en: The 2026 EPC, PCT-EPO, and Unitary Patent Guidelines replace the 2025 editions as the primary procedural authority for EPO interactions.
Content from the discontinued European Patent Guide and Euro-PCT Guide has been integrated into the new Guidelines and official EPO sources.
Public consultation on the 2026 Guidelines runs until 3 April 2026, with user feedback shaping the upcoming 2027 revision cycle.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Immediate review of the 2026 Guidelines is essential to align prosecution strategies with the consolidated procedural framework.
Practice note: Utilize the marked-up online versions to identify specific amendments affecting search, examination, and unitary patent procedures.
What to monitor: Submit feedback via the dedicated webform before 3 April 2026 to influence the development of the 2027 Guidelines.

items.title: Filing in DOCX now available for all users - greater flexibility and smoother workflows
items.title_zh: EPO 向所有用户开放 DOCX 格式提交以提升灵活性
items.title_en: EPO Opens DOCX Filing to All Users for Enhanced Flexibility and Workflow Efficiency
items.summary: The new filing format builds on the EPO’s digital transformation, offering a more consistent and future-ready way to submit patent applications and other documents.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）宣布在完成试点后，正式向所有用户开放使用 DOCX 格式提交欧洲专利申请及后续文件。此举旨在深化数字化转型，允许绘图嵌入文档或单独上传，减少格式转换错误与人工校对时间。该更新已纳入局长决定，支持与 MyEPO 等现代工具无缝对接，实现端到端数字化处理。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office (EPO) has officially rolled out support for filing European patent applications and subsequent documents in DOCX format to all users. Following a successful pilot phase, this initiative aligns with the EPO’s Strategic Plan 2028 to foster a fully digital granting process. The new format allows applicants to integrate drawings directly into DOCX files or submit them separately as PDFs. This update aims to streamline end-to-end digital workflows, reduce formatting errors, and improve data quality during search, examination, and publication stages. The Decision of the President concerning electronic filing has been amended to reflect these changes, offering greater consistency and time savings for rights holders and representatives.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This development supports portfolio management efficiency by minimizing administrative burdens associated with document conversion and formatting compliance. For European and US practitioners, adopting native DOCX workflows can enhance data integrity throughout the prosecution lifecycle. The ability to maintain stable paragraph references and reduce layout shifts facilitates smoother amendments and responses to examination reports. Rights holders should evaluate their internal document preparation systems to leverage these digital advantages, ensuring compatibility with future EPO tools and services while maintaining high-quality submissions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO 全面推广 DOCX 格式，支持专利申请及后续文件提交", "绘图可嵌入 DOCX 或单独以 PDF 提交，提升操作灵活性", "减少格式错误与重复转换，显著优化审查与修改流程效率"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["DOCX filing is now available for all users, supporting the EPO's goal of a fully digital patent granting environment.", "Applicants may embed drawings directly within DOCX documents or file them separately as PDFs based on preference.", "The format reduces manual checks and formatting corrections, improving text stability and character handling."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["立即调整申请文件制作流程，优先采用原生 DOCX 格式", "利用格式优势减少补正通知，加快欧洲专利授权进程"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Adopting DOCX filing can reduce time spent on manual formatting checks and minimize risks of corrupted characters or layout errors.", "Practice note: Teams should review internal drafting protocols to allow direct integration of drawings into DOCX or manage separate PDF submissions effectively.", "What to monitor: Updates to the EPO Notice and feature guides regarding specific technical requirements for DOCX submissions and future tool integrations."]
core_points_en: DOCX filing is now available for all users, supporting the EPO's goal of a fully digital patent granting environment.
Applicants may embed drawings directly within DOCX documents or file them separately as PDFs based on preference.
The format reduces manual checks and formatting corrections, improving text stability and character handling.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Adopting DOCX filing can reduce time spent on manual formatting checks and minimize risks of corrupted characters or layout errors.
Practice note: Teams should review internal drafting protocols to allow direct integration of drawings into DOCX or manage separate PDF submissions effectively.
What to monitor: Updates to the EPO Notice and feature guides regarding specific technical requirements for DOCX submissions and future tool integrations.

items.title: The Unitary Patent Guidelines April 2026 update
items.title_zh: 2026年4月统一专利指南更新生效
items.title_en: EPO Updates Unitary Patent Guidelines: Key Procedural Clarity Changes Effective April 2026
items.summary: Updated 2026 Unitary Patent Guidelines take effect 1 April, enhancing clarity, procedures, and legal detail across the UPC system.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）运行近三年后，统一专利（UP）指南迎来修订，新版于2026年4月1日生效。此次更新旨在提升UPC系统的清晰度、程序规范及法律细节。欧洲专利局（EPO）已发布标注修改痕迹的2026版指南，对比2025版进行了广泛调整。随着对UP系统及UPC信心的增强，新规在适当位置增加了更多程序与法律依据的细节，以优化用户体验并明确操作标准。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office has published updated Unitary Patent Guidelines, which entered into force on 1 April 2026. Following nearly three years of Unified Patent Court operations, these amendments refine procedural clarity and legal detail across the system. A marked-up version comparing the 2026 guidelines against the 2025 version is available to help users track specific changes. The updates reflect growing confidence in the Unitary Patent system and aim to provide greater transparency regarding procedural requirements and legal bases for applicants and litigants.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: For rights holders managing European portfolios, the refined guidelines offer improved predictability in Unitary Patent administration and UPC interactions. The availability of a tracked-changes document allows counsel to efficiently identify procedural adjustments without reviewing the entire text. This update supports better compliance with evolving administrative standards as the Unitary Patent system matures.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["年4月1日起，新版统一专利指南正式生效实施", "全面修订指南内容，重点增强程序清晰度与法律依据细节", "欧洲专利局提供新旧版本对比文档，便于用户追踪具体变更"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Updated Unitary Patent Guidelines took effect on 1 April 2026, refining procedures and legal details within the UPC system.", "The EPO provides a marked-up comparison document highlighting changes between the 2025 and 2026 guideline versions.", "Amendments focus on enhancing procedural clarity and providing more detailed legal basis information for system users."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["研读EPO对比文档，精准掌握UPC程序合规新要求", "优化欧洲专利组合管理，规避因程序疏漏导致的维权风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Enhanced procedural clarity reduces uncertainty in Unitary Patent maintenance and UPC-related filings.", "Practice note: Review the EPO's marked-up comparison document to identify specific amendments affecting current applications or litigation.", "What to monitor: Further refinements to guidelines as the UPC continues to develop its case law and administrative practices."]
core_points_en: Updated Unitary Patent Guidelines took effect on 1 April 2026, refining procedures and legal details within the UPC system.
The EPO provides a marked-up comparison document highlighting changes between the 2025 and 2026 guideline versions.
Amendments focus on enhancing procedural clarity and providing more detailed legal basis information for system users.

Practice note: Review the EPO's marked-up comparison document to identify specific amendments affecting current applications or litigation.
What to monitor: Further refinements to guidelines as the UPC continues to develop its case law and administrative practices.

items.title: Court of Appeal upholds PI against Sinocare and Menarini
items.title_zh: UPC 上诉法院维持对 Sinocare 及 Menarini 的临时禁令
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Upholds Preliminary Injunction Against Sinocare and Menarini
items.summary: The local division The Hague has become attractive for PI applications — especially in the medical devices sector. In Abbott’s dispute with Chinese competitor Sinocare and the latter’s distribution partner Menarini, the court thus appears to have delivered what companies and their lawyers expect. Yesterday, the UPC Court of Appeal upheld a PI from the […] The post Court of Appeal upholds PI against Sinocare and Menarini appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉法院近日作出裁决，维持了海牙地方分院针对中国厂商 Sinocare 及其分销伙伴 Menarini 发布的临时禁令。该案涉及医疗器械领域的专利侵权纠纷，由 Abbott 发起。此判决进一步巩固了海牙分院在医疗设备专利临时救济方面的吸引力，表明 UPC 体系正按预期为权利人提供高效的跨境执法保护。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) Court of Appeal has recently issued a ruling upholding the preliminary injunction granted by the Local Division in The Hague against Chinese manufacturer Sinocare and its distribution partner, Menarini. This case involves a patent infringement dispute in the medical devices sector, initiated by Abbott. The decision further consolidates the attractiveness of the The Hague division for securing preliminary relief in medical device patent matters. It demonstrates that the UPC system is effectively providing efficient cross-border enforcement protection for rightsholders as anticipated, confirming the court's capability to deliver swift judicial remedies in high-stakes intellectual property conflicts across European jurisdictions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国医疗器械出口企业需高度警惕 UPC 临时禁令风险，尤其是海牙分院。建议提前开展欧洲专利自由实施分析，建立快速响应机制，避免因突发禁令导致产品在欧洲市场全面停摆。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants operating in the medical device sector should closely monitor litigation trends at the UPC Local Division in The Hague, which has become a focal point for preliminary injunction applications. Rightsholders are increasingly leveraging this venue for efficient cross-border enforcement. Conversely, potential defendants must conduct thorough freedom-to-operate analyses prior to market entry to mitigate infringement risks. Establishing robust legal response protocols is essential to address sudden injunctions promptly, thereby preventing significant disruptions to supply chains and ensuring continued market access across participating member states without prolonged operational halts.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC 上诉法院确认维持针对中国企业的临时禁令效力", "海牙分院成为医疗器械领域专利临时禁令的热门管辖地", "判决显示 UPC 机制正有效回应企业对快速跨境维权的需求"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["UPC Court of Appeal confirms the validity and continued effect of the preliminary injunction issued against Chinese enterprises.", "The Hague Local Division has emerged as a preferred jurisdiction for obtaining preliminary injunctions in the medical device sector.", "The judgment indicates the UPC mechanism is effectively meeting corporate demands for rapid cross-border rights enforcement."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["海牙分院已成医械专利战高地，中国企业须前置风险排查", "面对 UPC 禁令需具备快速法律应对能力，防止市场准入受阻"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Medical device companies must assess litigation exposure in The Hague due to its growing preference for granting preliminary injunctions.", "Practice note: Implement proactive freedom-to-operate strategies and rapid response frameworks to manage sudden UPC enforcement actions effectively.", "What to monitor: Track UPC case law developments regarding preliminary relief standards and the strategic selection of local divisions by plaintiffs."]
core_points_en: UPC Court of Appeal confirms the validity and continued effect of the preliminary injunction issued against Chinese enterprises.
The Hague Local Division has emerged as a preferred jurisdiction for obtaining preliminary injunctions in the medical device sector.
The judgment indicates the UPC mechanism is effectively meeting corporate demands for rapid cross-border rights enforcement.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Medical device companies must assess litigation exposure in The Hague due to its growing preference for granting preliminary injunctions.
Practice note: Implement proactive freedom-to-operate strategies and rapid response frameworks to manage sudden UPC enforcement actions effectively.
What to monitor: Track UPC case law developments regarding preliminary relief standards and the strategic selection of local divisions by plaintiffs.

items.title: Chinese car makers take Avanci licence for connected cars
items.title_zh: 七家中国车企签署Avanci网联汽车专利许可
items.title_en: Chinese car makers take Avanci licence for connected cars
items.summary: Seven Chinese car manufacturers have signed agreements with Avanci for its 4G and 5G licensing programmes.
items.ai_summary_zh: Avanci宣布其4G和5G车辆许可计划已达成十项许可协议，其中七家签约方为中国汽车制造商。尽管新闻稿未披露具体车企名称，但此举显示中国车企正加入全球超150个参与Avanci许可项目的汽车品牌行列。Avanci高管强调其一站式许可方案的价值，并表示将继续与中国市场参与者紧密合作。
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国车企批量进入Avanci许可体系，反映SEP许可在全球汽车供应链中的标准化趋势。需关注后续披露的具体被许可人名单及其对行业费率基准的潜在影响，以及该模式在欧洲市场的进一步渗透情况。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["七家中国汽车制造商已签署Avanci的4G及5G车辆专利许可协议", "Avanci车辆许可项目目前全球已有超过150个汽车品牌参与", "Avanci暗示未来数月内还将有更多许可交易达成，但未公布具体名单"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["中国车企规模化采纳Avanci许可，显示SEP合规成为出海标配", "需监测后续公开的具体车企名单，以评估市场覆盖率变化", "观察Avanci“一站式”模式在欧洲及全球汽车行业的扩张节奏"]

items.title: Rapport annuel 2025
items.title_zh: 法国国家工业产权局 2025 年度报告
items.title_en: INPI 2025 Annual Report: Strategic Roadmap Launch and Key Filing Data
items.summary: Rapport annuel 2025 sgurtler@inpi.fr 31 mars 2026 L’année 2025 a été marquée par le lancement d’une nouvelle feuille de route stratégique pour l’INPI. Élément structurant pour l’Institut, le COP 2025-2029 fixe des ambitions fortes et s'inscrit dans la volonté d’apporter toujours plus de services répondant aux besoins des entrepreneurs et des innovateurs, pour contribuer à la croissance de la France. Découvrez dans ce rapport le bilan des premières actions engagées par l’Institut, tant en matière
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国国家工业产权局（INPI）发布 2025 年度报告，标志着其 2025-2029 年战略规划合同（COP）的启动。报告总结了机构在企业手续与知识产权保护方面的首批行动成果，披露了单一窗口及专利、商标等申请的关键数据。报告强调通过支持创新者需求、提升无形资产价值来推动法国经济增长，展现了机构的韧性与服务能力。
items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) released its 2025 Annual Report, marking the commencement of its new strategic roadmap for 2025-2029. The report outlines the objectives of the Performance Contract (COP), emphasizing enhanced services for entrepreneurs and innovators to support French economic growth. It provides a comprehensive overview of INPI's activities, including key statistics from the Single Window platform and intellectual property filings such as patents, trademarks, and designs. The document highlights the institute's resilience and its commitment to supporting businesses through every stage of development, focusing on the valuation of intangible assets and innovation support both domestically and internationally.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应关注法国 IP 政策新动向，利用其强化的服务体系优化在法布局。建议参考报告数据评估市场热度，积极利用单一窗口机制提升确权效率，并重视无形资产运营以契合当地创新支持导向。
items.ai_insight_en: This report signals INPI's continued operational stability and strategic focus on user-centric services under its new multi-year contract. For rights holders and legal practitioners, the publication offers essential context regarding the institute's current priorities in processing efficiency and asset valorization. Monitoring these strategic directions helps stakeholders align their portfolio management expectations with the office's evolving service capabilities and international engagement efforts.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["启动 2025-2029 战略规划合同，确立服务创新者新目标", "披露年度专利申请、商标注册及企业手续办理关键数据", "强调通过无形资产估值与支持创新助力法国经济增长"]

items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注法国新政导向，优化在法知识产权战略布局", "利用单一窗口机制，提升确权效率与资产运营能力"]

Publication of key annual data regarding the Single Window and IP title deposits across all categories.

items.title: Statutory guidance: Forms directions under the Patents Act
items.title_zh: 法定指南：专利法下的表格指示更新
items.title_en: UKIPO Updates Statutory Guidance on Patent Forms to Align with One IPO Digital Service
items.summary: Changes to the patents forms to align with the One IPO digital service.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局（UKIPO）发布关于《专利法》下表格指示的法定指南。此次更新旨在调整现有专利申请及相关事务的官方表格，以全面适配其“One IPO
items.ai_summary_en: The United Kingdom Intellectual Property Office (UKIPO) has issued updated statutory guidance concerning directions for forms under the Patents Act. This regulatory update is designed to modify existing official patent application forms and related procedural documents. The primary objective is to ensure full compatibility with the UKIPO’s new 'One IPO' digital service platform. By aligning statutory form requirements with this integrated digital infrastructure, the Office aims to streamline administrative processes and enhance user experience for applicants and representatives. These changes reflect a broader modernization effort within the UKIPO to digitize patent prosecution workflows, ensuring that all statutory filings adhere to the technical and procedural standards required by the new centralized digital environment.
items.ai_insight_en: This update signals a critical transition in UK patent administration, moving towards a unified digital ecosystem. For in-house counsel and external practitioners, it is essential to review current filing templates and automated systems to ensure they accommodate the revised form structures. Failure to adapt may result in procedural delays or formal objections during prosecution. Stakeholders should verify that their internal docketing software and third-party service providers have implemented these changes. Monitoring further technical specifications from the UKIPO will be necessary to maintain compliance and leverage the efficiency gains promised by the One IPO initiative.

items.title: Statutory guidance: Forms directions under the Trade Marks Act
items.title_zh: 法定指引：商标法下的表格方向更新
items.title_en: UKIPO Updates Trade Marks Forms to Reflect New Fee Structure Effective April 2026
items.summary: Changes to the fee-bearing trade marks forms to show the fees payable from 1 April 2026
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布关于《商标法》下表格方向的法定指引，主要更新涉及费用的商标申请表格。此次变更旨在明确自 2026 年 4 月 1 日起适用的新收费标准，确保申请人使用的官方表格能准确反映届时应付的规费金额，属于常规行政程序更新。
items.ai_summary_en: The United Kingdom Intellectual Property Office (UKIPO) has issued statutory guidance regarding directions under the Trade Marks Act, specifically focusing on updates to fee-bearing trade mark forms. This administrative update is designed to ensure that all official application forms accurately display the new fee schedule applicable from 1 April 2026. The changes are part of a routine procedural adjustment to align documentation with upcoming cost structures. By updating these forms in advance, the UKIPO aims to prevent discrepancies between the fees listed on applications and the actual amounts payable at the time of filing. This measure ensures transparency for applicants and facilitates smoother processing of trade mark registrations by eliminating potential errors related to outdated fee information on submitted documents.
items.ai_insight_zh: 在英布局商标的中国企业需关注 2026 年成本变化。建议提前规划预算，并在明年一季度前核查官方表格版本，避免因使用旧表或费用计算错误导致申请延误或被退回，确保证书流转顺畅。
items.ai_insight_en: Stakeholders managing trade mark portfolios in the United Kingdom should anticipate increased official costs starting in April 2026. It is advisable to review and adjust budget forecasts for upcoming filings to accommodate these higher fees. Furthermore, legal teams and applicants must ensure they download and use the latest versions of official forms before the first quarter of 2026. Using outdated forms with incorrect fee calculations may lead to formal objections, delays in examination, or even refusal of applications due to insufficient payment. Proactive verification of form versions and fee accuracy is essential to maintain efficient prosecution timelines and avoid unnecessary administrative hurdles during the registration process.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UKIPO 更新商标表格以匹配 2026 年新费率", "新规费标准将于 2026 年 4 月 1 日正式生效", "此次调整为法定指引下的行政表格技术性修订"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UKIPO has updated fee-bearing trade mark forms to align with the new fee structure scheduled for implementation.", "The revised fee standards will officially come into effect on 1 April 2026 for all relevant trade mark applications.", "This update constitutes a technical administrative revision of forms under existing statutory guidance provisions."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["需预留 2026 年 4 月起英国商标规费上涨预算", "届时务必下载最新版表格以防形式审查驳回"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Budget planning for UK trade mark filings must account for the fee increases effective 1 April 2026.", "Practice note: Verify and download the latest official forms prior to Q1 2026 to prevent rejection based on incorrect fees.", "What to monitor: Official UKIPO communications regarding the finalization of the new fee schedule and form availability."]
core_points_en: The UKIPO has updated fee-bearing trade mark forms to align with the new fee structure scheduled for implementation.
The revised fee standards will officially come into effect on 1 April 2026 for all relevant trade mark applications.
This update constitutes a technical administrative revision of forms under existing statutory guidance provisions.

Practice note: Verify and download the latest official forms prior to Q1 2026 to prevent rejection based on incorrect fees.
What to monitor: Official UKIPO communications regarding the finalization of the new fee schedule and form availability.

items.title_en: Avanci signs up seven Chinese auto licensees in six months
items.summary: The announcement comes days after Geely was dealt an injunction in Brazil – but it is unknown whether Geely brands are the newest licensees
items.ai_summary_zh: 专利许可池 Avanci 宣布六个月内新增七家中国汽车行业被许可人。该消息发布之际，吉利刚在巴西遭遇禁令，但尚不明确吉利品牌是否包含在此次新签约名单中。此动态反映了全球汽车 SEP 许可市场的快速整合及中企面临的复杂合规环境。
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国车企应加速评估 SEP 风险，避免海外禁令冲击。建议主动参与许可谈判，利用 FRAND 原则争取合理费率，同时关注欧洲潜在诉讼联动风险。

items.title: Court Of Appeal, March 24, 2026, Order On Suspensive Effect, UPC_CoA_44/2026
items.title_zh: UPC 上诉法院裁定：中止执行效力属例外情形需严格证明
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Suspensive Effect Is Exceptional, Requiring Strict Proof and Concrete Evidence
items.summary: The Court of Appeal confirmed that suspensive effect is an exception to the general rule.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉法院在涉及咖啡系统专利的案件中确认，授予中止执行效力是原则之外的例外。上诉人须证明其维持现状的利益优于被上诉人执行一审判决的利益，且必须提供具体证据而非推测。法院驳回了基于平行诉讼结果不确定及模糊财务损害的主张，强调多重侵权风险反而不利于授予中止令。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) Court of Appeal confirmed that granting suspensive effect remains an exception to the general rule. In a case involving coffee system patents, the Court emphasized that appellants must demonstrate their interest in maintaining the status quo significantly outweighs the respondent’s interest in enforcing the first-instance decision. The ruling rejected arguments based on speculative future events, such as uncertain outcomes in parallel proceedings, and dismissed vague claims of financial or reputational harm. Furthermore, the Court highlighted that potential multiple patent infringements weigh heavily against granting suspensive effect, as doing so could unjustifiably reward continued infringement. Applicants must provide specific, quantified evidence of harm rather than relying on general assertions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在 UPC 面临不利一审判决时，申请中止执行难度极大。务必准备具体的修改成本、停产损失等量化证据，避免空泛主张。若涉及多专利侵权，更应预判法院可能因“奖励侵权”逻辑而拒绝中止，需提前制定备选合规方案。
items.ai_insight_en: Securing suspensive effect at the UPC Court of Appeal presents significant challenges following an adverse first-instance judgment. Parties must prepare concrete, quantified evidence regarding modification costs, production stoppages, and specific operational impacts, avoiding generic assertions of harm. In scenarios involving multiple potentially infringing patents, applicants should anticipate that courts may view suspension as rewarding infringement. Consequently, businesses should proactively develop alternative compliance strategies and immediate cessation plans to mitigate risks if suspensive relief is denied.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["中止执行效力仅为例外，需证明上诉人利益显著优于执行利益", "仅凭平行诉讼等推测性未来事件或模糊损害主张不足以获准中止", "潜在的多重专利侵权事实将作为反对授予中止执行效力的重要理由"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Suspensive effect is exceptional; appellants must prove their interest in maintaining the status quo outweighs the respondent's enforcement interest.", "Speculative future events, like parallel litigation outcomes, and vague damage claims are insufficient grounds for suspending enforcement.", "Potential multiple patent infringements strongly argue against suspensive effect, preventing unjust rewards for continued violation."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["申请中止必须提供具体量化的损害证据，杜绝模糊与推测性主张", "多重侵权背景下获准中止概率极低，需预设立即停止销售的应对预案"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Securing suspensive effect requires concrete, quantified evidence of harm, as vague claims and speculative arguments are routinely rejected by the Court.", "Practice note: In cases involving multiple patents, assume suspension will be denied to avoid 'rewarding' infringement; prepare immediate sales cessation protocols.", "What to monitor: How the Court assesses 'manifest error' and procedural rights violations when balancing appellant interests against enforcement needs."]
core_points_en: Suspensive effect is exceptional; appellants must prove their interest in maintaining the status quo outweighs the respondent's enforcement interest.
Speculative future events, like parallel litigation outcomes, and vague damage claims are insufficient grounds for suspending enforcement.
Potential multiple patent infringements strongly argue against suspensive effect, preventing unjust rewards for continued violation.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Securing suspensive effect requires concrete, quantified evidence of harm, as vague claims and speculative arguments are routinely rejected by the Court.
Practice note: In cases involving multiple patents, assume suspension will be denied to avoid 'rewarding' infringement; prepare immediate sales cessation protocols.
What to monitor: How the Court assesses 'manifest error' and procedural rights violations when balancing appellant interests against enforcement needs.

items.title: LD Paris, March 23, 2026, Procedural Order, UPC_CFI_1963/2025
items.title_zh: UPC 巴黎分院裁定：专利共被告无需与锚定被告有直接商业联系
items.title_en: UPC Paris: No Direct Link Required Between Anchor and Co-Defendants for Joint Jurisdiction
items.summary: The commercial link is assessed flexibly to avoid multiplying parallel proceedings and the risk of contradictory decisions. This applies in particular in cases where all defendants...
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）巴黎地方法院在涉及博世集团的程序令中裁定，依据《UPC 协定》第 33(1)(b) 条，所有被告间存在商业联系即可，无需每个被告均与“锚定被告”有直接联系。法院灵活解释以避免平行诉讼，并确认“相同侵权”指侵犯同一专利权而非产品完全一致。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court’s Local Division in Paris issued a procedural order clarifying jurisdictional requirements under Article 33(1)(b) of the UPC Agreement. The court ruled that a direct commercial link between the anchor defendant and each co-defendant is unnecessary; rather, a general commercial connection among all defendants suffices. This flexible interpretation aims to prevent parallel proceedings and contradictory judgments, particularly within corporate groups sharing R&D, manufacturing, or distribution activities. Additionally, the court defined 'same alleged infringement' as referring to the violation of identical patent claims, regardless of product trade names or forms. Consequently, preliminary objections were dismissed, and the failure to amend the statement of claim did not result in dismissal of the infringement action.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临专利诉讼时，若属同一集团或产业链，易被 UPC 合并审理。应提前评估集团内各实体商业关联风险，统一应诉策略，避免因单一实体被列为锚定被告而牵连整个集团在欧业务。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling significantly impacts multinational corporations operating in Europe, particularly those with complex group structures. By lowering the threshold for establishing joint jurisdiction, the UPC facilitates the consolidation of patent disputes involving multiple entities within the same supply chain or corporate group. Litigants should anticipate that separate legal entities may be joined in a single proceeding if their activities are commercially related and target the same patent. Strategic planning must account for this risk, ensuring consistent defense strategies across all potentially implicated entities to mitigate the danger of fragmented litigation and inconsistent outcomes across different divisions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["商业联系只需存在于所有被告之间，无需逐个对接锚定被告", "相同侵权指侵犯同一专利权利要求，不要求涉案产品形式完全一致", "初步异议被驳回后，未修正起诉状不会导致侵权诉讼直接被驳回"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Article 33(1)(b) requires only a general commercial link among all defendants, not a direct relationship with the anchor defendant.", "'Same alleged infringement' concerns the identity of infringed patent rights, not the exact identity of allegedly infringing products.", "Dismissing a preliminary objection renders motions to dismiss the main action moot, with no penalty for unamended claims."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["集团内各实体商业活动关联可能触发 UPC 合并管辖风险", "应诉时需统一抗辩逻辑，防止因产品差异被认定为不同侵权"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Multinational groups face higher risks of consolidated litigation where commercially linked entities are sued together under one patent.", "Practice note: Defense strategies must be unified across all group entities, as product variations do not necessarily preclude joint infringement findings.", "What to monitor: How other UPC divisions apply this flexible 'commercial link' standard to determine venue and joinder in future cases."]
core_points_en: Article 33(1)(b) requires only a general commercial link among all defendants, not a direct relationship with the anchor defendant.
'Same alleged infringement' concerns the identity of infringed patent rights, not the exact identity of allegedly infringing products.
Dismissing a preliminary objection renders motions to dismiss the main action moot, with no penalty for unamended claims.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Multinational groups face higher risks of consolidated litigation where commercially linked entities are sued together under one patent.
Practice note: Defense strategies must be unified across all group entities, as product variations do not necessarily preclude joint infringement findings.
What to monitor: How other UPC divisions apply this flexible 'commercial link' standard to determine venue and joinder in future cases.

items.title: Via Licensing’s new president outlines patent pool operator's strategic reset
items.title_zh: Via Licensing 新任总裁阐述专利池运营战略重置
items.title_en: Via Licensing President Outlines Strategic Reset Focusing on Core Programs and Data Center Expansion
items.summary: Speaking to IAM on the sidelines of IPBC Europe, Kevin Mack sets out a growth strategy focusing on core programmes, expanding into data centre technologies and doubling down on customer service
items.ai_summary_zh: Via Licensing 新任总裁凯文·麦克在 IPBC 欧洲会议期间接受采访，提出公司增长战略。该战略聚焦核心项目，计划将业务扩展至数据中心技术领域，并强调加倍投入客户服务。此举标志着该专利池运营方在市场策略上的重大调整，旨在通过多元化技术布局和强化服务来应对复杂的 SEP 许可环境。
items.ai_summary_en: In an interview at IPBC Europe, Via Licensing’s new president Kevin Mack detailed a comprehensive growth strategy designed to reposition the patent pool operator. The plan prioritizes strengthening core licensing programs while strategically expanding into emerging data center technologies. This expansion aims to diversify the portfolio beyond traditional communication standards. Simultaneously, the operator is committing significant resources to enhance customer service quality, viewing it as a key differentiator in a competitive market. These moves signal a major strategic pivot intended to navigate the increasingly complex landscape of standard-essential patent licensing. By balancing technological diversification with improved licensee support, Via Licensing seeks to offer more predictable and efficient licensing solutions for implementers facing evolving FRAND obligations.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在数据中心及通信领域应关注 Via 许可政策变化，评估潜在许可义务。建议提前梳理自身技术栈，主动沟通以避免纠纷，并利用其服务导向策略争取更合理的 FRAND 条款。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants operating in data center and communications sectors should closely monitor Via Licensing’s policy shifts regarding new technology inclusion. Assessing potential licensing obligations early allows companies to align their technical stacks with upcoming pool requirements. Proactive engagement with the operator can help mitigate dispute risks and leverage the renewed focus on service-oriented negotiations. Implementers should utilize this strategic reset to seek more reasonable FRAND terms by demonstrating compliance and openness. Understanding these changes is crucial for managing intellectual property costs and ensuring supply chain stability across European and global markets.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["新任总裁确立以核心项目为基础的增长战略方向", "计划将专利池许可范围扩展至数据中心关键技术", "强调提升客户服务质量作为差异化竞争的核心手段"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["New leadership establishes a growth strategy anchored in strengthening and optimizing existing core licensing programs.", "The patent pool plans to expand its licensing scope to include critical technologies within the rapidly growing data center sector.", "Enhancing customer service quality is emphasized as the primary method for achieving competitive differentiation in the market."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注数据中心技术纳入许可范围对出口企业的影响", "利用对方服务导向策略主动谈判以优化许可条件"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Evaluate how the inclusion of data center technologies in the patent pool impacts licensing exposure for exporters and global manufacturers.", "Practice note: Leverage the operator's service-oriented approach to initiate proactive negotiations aimed at optimizing final licensing conditions.", "What to monitor: Track updates to Via Licensing’s administrative policies and fee structures as they adapt to the expanded technological scope."]
core_points_en: New leadership establishes a growth strategy anchored in strengthening and optimizing existing core licensing programs.
The patent pool plans to expand its licensing scope to include critical technologies within the rapidly growing data center sector.
Enhancing customer service quality is emphasized as the primary method for achieving competitive differentiation in the market.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Evaluate how the inclusion of data center technologies in the patent pool impacts licensing exposure for exporters and global manufacturers.
Practice note: Leverage the operator's service-oriented approach to initiate proactive negotiations aimed at optimizing final licensing conditions.
What to monitor: Track updates to Via Licensing’s administrative policies and fee structures as they adapt to the expanded technological scope.

items.title: NUC and Preu Bohlig overturn slow juicer ruling on appeal
items.title_zh: NUC 与 Preu Bohlig 在上诉中推翻慢速榨汁机侵权裁决
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Overturns Mannheim Slow Juicer Infringement Ruling
items.summary: In March last year the Mannheim local division ruled that NUC and its European distribution partner Warmcook infringed EP 2 028 981 relating to a juice extractor. Subsequently, they were barred from distributing the Auto 10 slow juicer in Germany, Denmark, France, Italy, and the Netherlands. As to the question, whether NUC and Warmcook should […] The post NUC and Preu Bohlig overturn slow juicer ruling on appeal appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 曼海姆地方分院曾裁定 NUC 及其分销商侵犯榨汁机欧洲专利，禁止其在德、法等多国销售。近日，统一专利法院（UPC）上诉庭作出新裁决，推翻了原侵权认定及相应的跨境分销禁令，标志着该案在二审阶段出现重大转折，涉案产品恢复市场流通资格。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) Court of Appeal has reversed the earlier infringement decision issued by the Mannheim Local Division regarding European patent EP 2 028 981, which covers a specific juice extractor technology. The initial ruling had found that NUC and its distribution partner Warmcook infringed the patent, resulting in an injunction that prohibited the sale of the Auto 10 slow juicer across Germany, Denmark, France, Italy, and the Netherlands. This appellate judgment effectively nullifies the prior finding of infringement and lifts the corresponding cross-border sales bans. Consequently, the affected products are no longer subject to the previously enforced restrictions, allowing for their continued market circulation in these jurisdictions. This development marks a significant procedural turnaround in the second instance of the litigation.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国出口企业应重视 UPC 上诉救济渠道，面对不利一审禁令勿轻言放弃。需提前布局欧洲专利诉讼策略，利用上诉程序争取翻盘机会，降低单一地方法院裁决对泛欧市场的毁灭性打击风险。
items.ai_insight_en: This outcome highlights the strategic importance of the UPC’s appellate structure in mitigating the risks associated with fragmented first-instance decisions. For rights holders and implementers alike, relying solely on local division judgments can be precarious given the potential for reversal. Parties facing adverse preliminary injunctions should rigorously evaluate the merits of an appeal rather than accepting immediate compliance. Integrating robust appellate planning into overall litigation strategy is essential to prevent localized legal setbacks from escalating into widespread market exclusions across the unified patent system.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC 上诉庭成功推翻曼海姆分院关于榨汁机专利侵权的一审判决", "原针对德国、法国等五国的产品销售禁令随上诉胜诉而被解除", "案件凸显 UPC 上诉机制对纠正地方法院裁判偏差的关键作用"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UPC Court of Appeal successfully overturned the Mannheim Local Division's first-instance judgment concerning alleged patent infringement.", "The original injunction prohibiting product sales in five European countries was lifted following the successful appeal by the defendants.", "The case underscores the critical role of the UPC appellate mechanism in correcting potential errors or biases in local division rulings."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["善用 UPC 上诉机制可有效阻断地方法院不当禁令的泛欧扩散效应", "应对跨国专利诉讼时，需将上诉策略纳入整体风控与应诉方案"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Utilizing the UPC appeal mechanism can effectively halt the pan-European expansion of unfavorable local court injunctions.", "Practice note: Cross-border patent litigation strategies must incorporate comprehensive appellate planning as a core component of risk management.", "What to monitor: Future appellate decisions that clarify the standard of review applied by the UPC Court of Appeal when assessing factual findings from local divisions."]
core_points_en: The UPC Court of Appeal successfully overturned the Mannheim Local Division's first-instance judgment concerning alleged patent infringement.
The original injunction prohibiting product sales in five European countries was lifted following the successful appeal by the defendants.
The case underscores the critical role of the UPC appellate mechanism in correcting potential errors or biases in local division rulings.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Utilizing the UPC appeal mechanism can effectively halt the pan-European expansion of unfavorable local court injunctions.
Practice note: Cross-border patent litigation strategies must incorporate comprehensive appellate planning as a core component of risk management.
What to monitor: Future appellate decisions that clarify the standard of review applied by the UPC Court of Appeal when assessing factual findings from local divisions.

items.title: New WIPO Guide Casts Doubt on Open General Exceptions
items.title_zh: 新版 WIPO 指南质疑开放式一般例外条款的合规性
items.title_en: WIPO Guide Reassesses Compliance of Open General Exceptions with Three-Step Test
items.summary: WIPO’s new Guide to the Copyright and Related Rights Treaties Administered by WIPO (2nd ed.) contains some complicated messages on the use of open general exceptions, like fair use and fair dealing. Open General Exceptions in Copyright
items.ai_summary_zh: 世界知识产权组织发布新版版权条约指南，重新审视“合理使用”等开放式一般例外是否违反《伯尔尼公约》三步检验法。指南反驳了早期认为美国模式因目的列举不封闭而违规的观点，指出其可能符合特定特殊情况要求。这一立场转变对依赖灵活例外条款的欧盟及各成员国版权政策产生深远影响，引发关于权利限制边界的新一轮法律辩论。
items.ai_summary_en: The World Intellectual Property Organization has released the second edition of its Guide to Copyright and Related Rights Treaties, fundamentally reassessing whether open general exceptions, such as fair use, violate the Berne Convention’s three-step test. The new guidance challenges earlier interpretations that deemed the US model non-compliant due to its non-exhaustive list of purposes. Instead, it suggests these exceptions may satisfy the requirement for 'certain special cases.' This significant shift in international copyright policy interpretation carries profound implications for EU member states relying on flexible limitation frameworks. It triggers renewed legal debate regarding the precise boundaries of copyright exceptions and the compatibility of open-ended statutory provisions with established international treaty obligations.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧运营需关注版权例外边界变化，避免因误判合理使用范围引发侵权风险。建议审查内容使用策略，建立合规评估机制，并跟踪欧盟各国后续立法动态以调整本地化版权管理方案。
items.ai_insight_en: Organizations operating within the European Union should closely monitor evolving interpretations of copyright exception boundaries to mitigate infringement risks arising from misjudged fair use applications. It is advisable to review current content usage strategies and establish robust compliance assessment mechanisms. Stakeholders must track subsequent legislative developments across various EU member states to adjust localized copyright management protocols effectively. Maintaining agility in response to these shifting legal standards is essential for ensuring ongoing regulatory adherence and minimizing potential liability exposure in cross-border digital operations.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["新版 WIPO 指南推翻旧论，不再认定美式合理使用必然违反三步检验法", "开放式例外需通过比例测试平衡权利人、用户及公众三方利益", "该指南将影响欧盟各国对版权例外条款的解释尺度与立法方向"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The new WIPO Guide overturns previous assertions that US-style fair use inherently violates the three-step test requirements.", "Open general exceptions must undergo a proportionality test to balance the interests of rights holders, users, and the public.", "This guidance significantly influences how EU countries interpret copyright exception scopes and shapes future legislative directions."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕欧美对开放式例外认定标准趋同带来的合规不确定性", "建立动态版权风险评估机制，适应欧盟各国政策微调趋势"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor convergence in US-EU standards for open exceptions to manage compliance uncertainty.", "Practice note: Establish dynamic copyright risk assessment mechanisms to adapt to subtle policy shifts.", "What to monitor: Legislative updates in EU member states regarding the scope of copyright limitations."]
core_points_en: The new WIPO Guide overturns previous assertions that US-style fair use inherently violates the three-step test requirements.
Open general exceptions must undergo a proportionality test to balance the interests of rights holders, users, and the public.
This guidance significantly influences how EU countries interpret copyright exception scopes and shapes future legislative directions.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor convergence in US-EU standards for open exceptions to manage compliance uncertainty.
Practice note: Establish dynamic copyright risk assessment mechanisms to adapt to subtle policy shifts.
What to monitor: Legislative updates in EU member states regarding the scope of copyright limitations.

items.title: Judge Schoen says UK FRAND approach a “way to stay in business” after Brexit, defends Munich’s record on implementer losses
items.title_zh: 舍恩法官称英国 FRAND 路径是脱欧后生存之道并捍卫慕尼黑记录
items.title_en: Judge Schoen Defends Munich SEP Record and Praises UK FRAND Approach Post-Brexit
items.summary: The presiding judge of the Munich Regional Court’s 7th Civil Chamber was outspoken as a panellist at IPBC Europe in Paris last week
items.ai_summary_zh: 慕尼黑地区法院第七民事庭主审法官舍恩在巴黎 IPBC 欧洲会议上发表言论。他评价英国处理 FRAND 纠纷的方式是其在脱欧后维持业务影响力的关键策略，同时针对外界批评，有力辩护了慕尼黑法院在标准必要专利诉讼中导致实施者败诉的记录，强调其司法实践的合理性。
items.ai_summary_en: At the IPBC Europe conference in Paris, Judge Schoen, presiding over the Munich Regional Court’s 7th Civil Chamber, addressed key developments in standard-essential patent litigation. He characterized the United Kingdom’s judicial approach to FRAND disputes as a vital strategy for maintaining business relevance and influence following Brexit. Simultaneously, Judge Schoen robustly defended the Munich court’s track record, specifically addressing criticisms regarding the high rate of implementer losses in SEP cases. He emphasized the legal soundness and procedural fairness of the German court’s practices, asserting that its rulings provide necessary clarity and enforcement efficiency in the European IP landscape.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临英德双重司法压力。需重视慕尼黑法院强硬立场，提前评估禁令风险；同时利用英国费率裁决机制，制定差异化应诉与许可谈判策略，避免被动局面。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants operating in Europe face distinct litigation risks across major jurisdictions. The Munich Regional Court maintains a stringent stance on SEP enforcement, necessitating early assessment of injunction exposure and potential damages. Conversely, the UK courts offer mechanisms for determining global FRAND rates, which can be leveraged to optimize licensing negotiations. Rights holders and implementers should adopt differentiated strategies: preparing robust defenses against injunctive relief in Germany while utilizing UK proceedings to establish favorable royalty benchmarks, thereby avoiding passive positions in cross-border disputes.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["舍恩法官肯定英国 FRAND 司法路径对脱欧后业务延续的价值", "法官公开辩护慕尼黑法院在 SEP 案件中实施者高败诉率的记录", "该言论反映了英德两大法域在标准必要专利治理上的不同定位"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Judge Schoen affirmed that the UK's FRAND adjudication model serves as a crucial mechanism for sustaining commercial influence post-Brexit.", "The judge publicly defended the Munich Regional Court's history of ruling against implementers in SEP litigation, citing judicial rigor.", "These remarks highlight the divergent strategic roles and enforcement philosophies adopted by UK and German courts in SEP governance."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕慕尼黑法院高败诉率带来的禁令与赔偿双重风险", "善用英国法院确定全球费率的机制优化许可谈判筹码"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Companies must navigate dual pressures from strict German injunctions and UK global rate-setting mechanisms.", "Practice note: Evaluate injunction risks in Munich early while using UK FRAND determinations to strengthen negotiation leverage.", "What to monitor: Diverging judicial attitudes in Germany and the UK regarding implementer conduct and global licensing terms."]
core_points_en: Judge Schoen affirmed that the UK's FRAND adjudication model serves as a crucial mechanism for sustaining commercial influence post-Brexit.
The judge publicly defended the Munich Regional Court's history of ruling against implementers in SEP litigation, citing judicial rigor.
These remarks highlight the divergent strategic roles and enforcement philosophies adopted by UK and German courts in SEP governance.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Companies must navigate dual pressures from strict German injunctions and UK global rate-setting mechanisms.
Practice note: Evaluate injunction risks in Munich early while using UK FRAND determinations to strengthen negotiation leverage.
What to monitor: Diverging judicial attitudes in Germany and the UK regarding implementer conduct and global licensing terms.

items.title: Post-transaction Reselection Of A Payment Method: Non-technical
items.title_zh: 交易后重选支付方式被认定为非技术性特征
items.title_en: EPO Board Rules Post-Transaction Payment Method Reselection Non-Technical
items.summary: The application underlying the discussed decision concerns a method and system for reversing a payment method selection after a transaction has already been processed using a consolidated payment device associated...
items.ai_summary_zh: EPO 技术上诉委员会在 T 1327/22 号案件中裁定，利用整合支付设备在交易完成后撤销原支付方式并启用新方式，本质上属于金融安排而非技术贡献。若权利要求未限定超出通用计算机系统的具体技术实现手段，仅定义此类非技术需求不足以确立创造性，该特征在 inventive step 评估中不予考虑。
items.ai_summary_en: In decision T 1327/22, EPO Technical Board of Appeal 3.5.01 addressed a patent application for reversing payment method selection after transaction processing via a consolidated payment device. The Board determined that allowing users to cancel a first payment and authorize a second one constitutes a financial arrangement rather than a technical contribution. Consequently, this feature was excluded from the inventive step assessment. The ruling emphasizes that defining non-technical requirements without specifying technical implementation details beyond standard computer systems fails to establish inventiveness under European patent practice.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请涉及金融科技或支付流程的软专利时，应避免仅描述商业逻辑。必须将方案锚定于具体的技术架构改进或数据处理流程，明确区别于通用计算机的标准功能，以符合 EPO 对技术性的严格要求，降低被驳回风险。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision reinforces the EPO's strict separation between business logic and technical character in software-related inventions. For rights holders in fintech and digital payments, merely automating commercial workflows or user preferences does not satisfy the requirement for a technical contribution. Applicants must anchor claims in specific data processing architectures or hardware interactions that solve technical problems, rather than relying on the economic benefits of flexible payment options.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["交易后退款并重充属金融安排，不构成技术贡献", "未限定具体技术实现的非技术需求无法确立创造性", "EPO 上诉委强调软件专利需具备实质技术实施手段"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Post-transaction reselection of payment methods is classified as a non-technical financial matter by the EPO Board.", "Claims lacking specific technical implementation details beyond generic computer systems cannot support inventive step.", "The invention allows refunding a first payment method while simultaneously authorizing a second method on a single device."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["避免纯商业逻辑描述，须锚定具体技术架构改进", "明确区分通用计算功能与特有技术实施手段"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Fintech applicants must distinguish technical implementations from pure financial rules to secure patentability in Europe.", "Practice note: Draft claims to highlight specific technical mechanisms for data handling or system architecture, avoiding broad business method descriptions.", "What to monitor: Future EPO decisions regarding consolidated payment devices and the boundary between administrative financial processes and technical solutions."]
core_points_en: Post-transaction reselection of payment methods is classified as a non-technical financial matter by the EPO Board.
Claims lacking specific technical implementation details beyond generic computer systems cannot support inventive step.
The invention allows refunding a first payment method while simultaneously authorizing a second method on a single device.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Fintech applicants must distinguish technical implementations from pure financial rules to secure patentability in Europe.
Practice note: Draft claims to highlight specific technical mechanisms for data handling or system architecture, avoiding broad business method descriptions.
What to monitor: Future EPO decisions regarding consolidated payment devices and the boundary between administrative financial processes and technical solutions.

items.title: EPO meets with the German Association of Industry IP Experts
items.title_zh: EPO 与德国工业知识产权专家协会举行双边会晤
items.title_en: EPO and German Industry IP Experts Discuss Unitary Patent, AI Integration, and National Strategy
items.summary: EPO-VPP bilateral meeting on 25 March 2026: Recent developments, increasing IP awareness, AI, quality were among topics discussed.
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026 年 3 月，欧洲专利局（EPO）与德国工业知识产权专家协会（VPP）在慕尼黑会晤。双方就加强创新生态系统、单一专利制度对中小企业的赋能作用，以及人工智能在专利审查中的人本化应用达成共识。VPP 支持制定国家知识产权战略，并强调需兼顾德国产业特定利益，共同推动高质量专利体系发展。
items.ai_summary_en: On 25 March 2026, the European Patent Office (EPO) hosted the German Association of Industry IP Experts (VPP) in Munich to align on shared priorities for the European patent system. Discussions focused on strengthening the innovation ecosystem, with particular attention to the Unitary Patent system’s role in empowering SMEs and startups through fee reductions. While acknowledging the system's momentum, delegates emphasized balancing these benefits with specific interests of German industry. The parties also addressed the human-centric integration of artificial intelligence into patent operations to enhance quality and efficiency. Furthermore, VPP expressed support for developing a national IP strategy for Germany, highlighting the utility of EPO data tools like the Deep Tech Finder in informing strategic decisions and fostering technology transfer.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧应关注单一专利制成本优势，利用费用减免机制布局。同时需适应 EPO 人机协同审查新趋势，确保申请文件质量以应对更高效的审查流程，并参考德企策略参与标准制定。
items.ai_insight_en: Companies operating in Europe should closely monitor the evolving application of the Unitary Patent system, particularly regarding fee reduction mechanisms available for SMEs and individual inventors. Strategic planning should account for the EPO’s increasing integration of AI in examination workflows, necessitating higher quality application drafting to navigate more efficient review processes. Additionally, observing how major European industries engage with national IP strategies and standard-setting provides valuable context for aligning corporate IP portfolios with broader regulatory and technological trends in the region.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO 与 VPP 探讨利用工具数据支持德国国家知识产权战略制定", "单一专利制度获中小企业青睐，但需平衡德国产业具体利益诉求", "双方确认以人本主义原则整合 AI 技术，提升专利授予质量与效率"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["EPO and VPP discussed leveraging EPO data tools to support the formulation of a comprehensive national IP strategy for Germany.", "The Unitary Patent system shows strong adoption among SMEs, though stakeholders stress the need to balance this with German industry interests.", "Both parties confirmed a commitment to integrating AI into patent processes using a human-centric approach to improve grant quality and operational efficiency."]

items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage Unitary Patent fee reductions to optimize cost structures for European patent portfolio management, especially for SMEs.", "Practice note: Adapt application drafting strategies to meet higher quality standards required by EPO’s increasingly AI-assisted examination workflows.", "What to monitor: Track developments in national IP strategies and industry engagement with standard-setting to align long-term IP positioning."]

items.title: Successful conclusion of second convergence of practice cycle
items.title_zh: EPO 成功完成第二轮专利审查实践趋同周期
items.title_en: EPO Adopts Common Practices on Broad Claims and Double Patenting
items.summary: The EPO has completed the second Convergence of Practice cycle with new common practices on Broad Claims and Double Patenting, strengthening alignment and legal certainty across the patent network.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）宣布完成第二轮“实践趋同”计划，正式采纳关于“宽泛权利要求”和“重复专利”的共同实践准则。此举旨在统一欧洲专利网络内的审查标准，减少各国差异，提升法律确定性。新规则明确了过度宽泛权利要求的处理框架及重复专利异议的信息披露要求，为申请人提供更可预测的审查环境。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office (EPO) has concluded its second Convergence of Practice cycle, adopting new common practices regarding broad claims and double patenting. This initiative, a cornerstone of the EPO's Strategic Plan 2028, aims to harmonize examination standards across the European Patent Network, thereby enhancing legal certainty for users. Working Group 11 established a framework for identifying overly broad claims during the search phase, while Working Group 12 clarified the information requirements for double patenting objections. These measures seek to reduce procedural divergences among national offices and improve synergy between first and second filing procedures. The third work cycle is now underway, focusing on divisional applications and internet disclosures.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧专利申请需关注审查标准趋同，避免因权利要求过宽或重复布局被驳回。建议提前研判新指南，优化撰写策略以适配统一审查口径，降低合规风险。
items.ai_insight_en: The adoption of these common practices signals a move toward greater procedural uniformity within the European Patent Network. For rights holders and applicants, this reduces the risk of unexpected divergences in examination outcomes across different contracting states. The clarified approach to broad claims and double patenting objections provides a more transparent basis for responding to office actions. As the EPO continues to drive alignment through its Strategic Plan 2028, monitoring the implementation of these practices by national offices will be essential for maintaining consistent portfolio management strategies across Europe.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO 采纳宽泛权利要求与重复专利两项共同实践准则", "新框架旨在统一审查标准，增强欧洲专利网络法律确定性", "第三轮工作已启动，聚焦分案申请与互联网披露议题"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["New common practices on broad claims define frameworks for handling overly broad claims during the search phase.", "Double patenting guidelines clarify required examiner information for objections to ensure predictable outcomes.", "The third convergence cycle has commenced, addressing divisional applications and internet disclosure practices."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注宽泛权利要求新界定，优化专利撰写以避免审查障碍", "利用趋同红利预判审查走向，提升在欧洲各国的获权效率"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Enhanced legal certainty and reduced procedural divergences benefit applicants seeking protection across multiple EPC states.", "Practice note: Review claim drafting strategies against the new framework for overly broad claims to align with updated search phase expectations.", "What to monitor: Track national office updates on the Convergence Dashboard regarding the implementation of double patenting objection standards."]
core_points_en: New common practices on broad claims define frameworks for handling overly broad claims during the search phase.
Double patenting guidelines clarify required examiner information for objections to ensure predictable outcomes.
The third convergence cycle has commenced, addressing divisional applications and internet disclosure practices.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Enhanced legal certainty and reduced procedural divergences benefit applicants seeking protection across multiple EPC states.
Practice note: Review claim drafting strategies against the new framework for overly broad claims to align with updated search phase expectations.
What to monitor: Track national office updates on the Convergence Dashboard regarding the implementation of double patenting objection standards.

items.title: Results of EQE paper F 2026 available
items.title_zh: 2026 年欧洲专利代理人资格考试 F 卷成绩公布
items.title_en: EPO Publishes 2026 EQE Paper F Results Amidst Modular Reform Transition
items.summary: Less than two weeks after the European Qualifying Examination (EQE) 2026 session concluded on 12 March 2026, the results of paper F have been distributed to around 650 candidates.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局公布 2026 年 EQE 基础卷（F 卷）成绩，约 650 名考生参试，通过率约 84%。作为考试模块化改革的关键一步，今年首次引入 M1/M2 卷并保留旧制试卷，标志着过渡期顺利完成。全数字化考试提升了效率，新架构旨在增强专利体系的包容性与可持续性，考生可按阶段评估能力并进阶。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office has distributed results for the 2026 European Qualifying Examination (EQE) Paper F to approximately 650 candidates. The foundation paper, which assesses procedural patent law and claim analysis, achieved a pass rate of around 84%, with over 530 candidates succeeding. This release highlights the efficiency of the fully digital examination system introduced in 2021. The 2026 session marked a significant milestone as the final year legacy papers were offered alongside new modular components M1 and M2. This transitional phase supports the EPO's progressive structural reform aimed at enhancing quality, accessibility, and sustainability within the European patent profession.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局需关注代理人资质新规，模块化考试可能改变服务供给节奏。建议提前规划专利代理合作，利用早期模块评估潜在合作伙伴能力，确保在欧知识产权事务由具备最新资质的专业人士处理，以应对更严格的执业标准。
items.ai_insight_en: The progression toward a fully modular EQE structure alters the timeline for qualifying as a European patent attorney. For companies and firms relying on external counsel or building internal teams, understanding these phased competency assessments is crucial for talent acquisition and service provider evaluation. The early benchmarking capability allows for more structured career development paths for trainees, potentially impacting the availability of junior versus senior representatives in the market during the transition period.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["F 卷测试程序法与权利要求分析，超 530 人通过，体现数字化考试高效性", "年为旧制试卷最后一年，M1/M2 首考标志模块化改革过渡成功", "新架构允许考生分阶段参考，2027 年将全面实施全新模块化考试体系"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Paper F results show an 84% pass rate, reflecting foundational legal knowledge and analytical skills required for professional representation.", "The 2026 session was the last to offer legacy papers A through D, marking the successful completion of the EQE's transitional phase.", "New modules M1 and M2 were introduced this year, with M3 and M4 scheduled for implementation in 2027 to finalize the modular structure."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注考试改革对欧洲专利代理服务市场供给与专业分工的潜在影响", "建议依据新模块标准筛选代理人，确保其具备分阶段验证的专业能力"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Understanding the new modular qualification pathway helps in assessing the specific competencies and experience levels of potential patent attorneys.", "Practice note: Firms should align training programs with the new M1-M4 structure to ensure candidates progress efficiently through the reformed examination system.", "What to monitor: The implementation of M3 and M4 modules in 2027 will complete the transition, potentially affecting the supply of newly qualified representatives."]
core_points_en: Paper F results show an 84% pass rate, reflecting foundational legal knowledge and analytical skills required for professional representation.
The 2026 session was the last to offer legacy papers A through D, marking the successful completion of the EQE's transitional phase.
New modules M1 and M2 were introduced this year, with M3 and M4 scheduled for implementation in 2027 to finalize the modular structure.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Understanding the new modular qualification pathway helps in assessing the specific competencies and experience levels of potential patent attorneys.
Practice note: Firms should align training programs with the new M1-M4 structure to ensure candidates progress efficiently through the reformed examination system.
What to monitor: The implementation of M3 and M4 modules in 2027 will complete the transition, potentially affecting the supply of newly qualified representatives.

items.title: LD Düsseldorf, March 20, 2026, Order, UPC_CFI_1849/2025
items.title_zh: 杜塞尔多夫地方法院裁定：平衡公平性可变更 UPC 诉讼语言
items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf: Defendant’s Position Prevails in Language Change Balancing Test
items.summary: The President applied the Court of Appeal’s multi-factor framework, considering case-related circumstances (predominant language in the technology field...
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院杜塞尔多夫分院在一项命令中应用了上诉法院的多因素框架，裁定在加速程序中，若双方利益相当，被告立场具有决定性。法院考量了技术领域通用语言及当事人内部工作语言等因素，认为非德语被告面临的翻译成本与延误构成重大负担，支持将诉讼语言由德语变更为英语，确立了程序公平性的具体权衡标准。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court’s Local Division in Düsseldorf applied the Court of Appeal’s multi-factor framework to rule on a language change request. The President determined that where balancing relevant circumstances yields comparable interests, the defendant’s position is decisive under Article 49(5) UPCA and Rule 323 RoP. Factors included the predominant technology language, exhibit languages, and internal working languages. In accelerated proceedings, the burden of translation costs and delays for a non-German-speaking defendant carried significant weight, supporting a switch from German to English. The claimant’s choice of patent language was not deemed inherently unfair, but specific negative impacts on the defendant justified the change. This decision clarifies how procedural fairness is weighed when parties face unequal linguistic burdens during urgent litigation.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对 UPC 诉讼时，若面临非母语程序，应积极援引本案先例，主张翻译成本与时间延误对防御的不利影响，申请变更至英语等通用语言。同时需注意在提交答辩状前及时提出语言变更请求，以最大化程序权益。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling provides clear guidance on managing linguistic disadvantages in UPC litigation. Parties facing non-native proceedings should actively argue that translation burdens impair their defense capabilities, particularly in accelerated cases. It is crucial to file language change requests before lodging the Statement of Defence, aligning with consistent Court of Appeal recommendations. While claimants retain forum and timing flexibility, defendants can leverage strict deadlines and cost implications to seek equitable procedural adjustments. Monitoring this approach helps ensure fair participation regardless of the initial language chosen by the patent holder or claimant.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["诉讼语言变更需平衡案件与当事人相关情形，利益相当时被告立场优先", "加速程序中，非母语被告的翻译负担与延误风险是变更语言的关键因素", "原告虽有权选择专利语言，但若造成不公，法院可依职权调整程序语言"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Language changes require balancing case and party circumstances; if interests are equal, the defendant’s position prevails.", "In accelerated proceedings, translation costs and delays for non-native speakers are critical factors favoring language changes.", "Claimants choosing the patent language do not automatically prevent changes if specific unfairness to the defendant is demonstrated."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用本案先例，在加速程序中主张语言变更以降低非母语诉讼劣势", "严格遵守程序时限，务必在提交答辩状前提出语言变更申请"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage this precedent to argue for language changes in accelerated proceedings, emphasizing translation costs and delays.", "Practice note: File language change applications strictly before submitting the Statement of Defence to maximize procedural rights.", "What to monitor: How courts balance claimant flexibility against defendant burdens in future multi-factor language disputes."]
core_points_en: Language changes require balancing case and party circumstances; if interests are equal, the defendant’s position prevails.
In accelerated proceedings, translation costs and delays for non-native speakers are critical factors favoring language changes.
Claimants choosing the patent language do not automatically prevent changes if specific unfairness to the defendant is demonstrated.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Leverage this precedent to argue for language changes in accelerated proceedings, emphasizing translation costs and delays.
Practice note: File language change applications strictly before submitting the Statement of Defence to maximize procedural rights.
What to monitor: How courts balance claimant flexibility against defendant burdens in future multi-factor language disputes.

items.title: CD Munich, March 24, 2026, Procedural Order, UPC_CFI_2296/2025
items.title_zh: UPC 慕尼黑裁定：初步异议范围穷尽且不含诉讼资格抗辩
items.title_en: UPC Munich: Rule 19.1 Preliminary Objections Exhaustive; Standing and Res Judicata Are Merits Issues
items.summary: The court confirmed, in line with the Court of Appeal’s decisions in Aylo v. DISH/SLING (UPC_CoA_188/2024) and Roku/Sun (UPC_CoA_288/2025)...
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院慕尼黑中央分部作出程序令，确认规则 19.1 所列初步异议清单具有穷尽性，排除诉讼资格缺失或既判力等实体抗辩。法院指出此类问题需经事实评估，不属“明显”不可受理情形，应合并审理以提升程序效率，避免单独听证。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Central Division in Munich issued a procedural order confirming that the list of preliminary objections under Rule 19.1 RoP is exhaustive, limited strictly to jurisdiction, divisional competence, and language. The court rejected the defendant’s attempts to raise lack of standing and res judicata as preliminary objections, classifying them as substantive defences requiring merits assessment. Consequently, anticipatory orders under Rules 361 and 362 RoP were deemed inapplicable as these issues were not manifestly inadmissible. Prioritizing procedural economy, the court denied a separate hearing on admissibility, opting instead for a single combined hearing with the merits.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在 UPC 应诉时，不宜将诉讼资格等实体问题作为初步异议提出，以免被驳回并浪费程序机会。应聚焦管辖权等法定异议点，并准备在实质审理阶段充分举证经济利益关联，以应对资格挑战。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies the strict boundary between procedural admissibility and substantive validity at the UPC. Parties must ensure that preliminary objections align precisely with Rule 19.1 grounds to avoid dismissal. Arguments regarding standing based on corporate structures or prior national judgments should be prepared as part of the main defence strategy on the merits, rather than relying on early procedural dismissal mechanisms.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["规则 19.1 初步异议仅限管辖权、分庭能力及语言，不得扩展至实体抗辩", "诉讼资格与既判力涉及事实审查，不符合规则 361/362 条“明显”不可受理标准", "基于程序经济原则，法院拒绝就可受理性举行单独听证，主张合并审理"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Rule 19.1 RoP preliminary objections are exhaustive and exclude substantive defences like lack of standing or res judicata.", "Lack of standing and res judicata require factual and legal assessment, preventing their treatment as manifestly inadmissible under Rules 361 and 362 RoP.", "Procedural efficiency dictates a single hearing combining admissibility and merits rather than separate preliminary hearings."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["初步异议策略需严格限定于管辖权等法定事由，避免混同实体抗辩", "针对诉讼资格质疑，应提前梳理子公司股权链条及经济利益证据以备实质审理"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders and defendants must distinguish between procedural jurisdiction challenges and substantive standing arguments to avoid wasting preliminary objecti…", "Practice note: Prepare evidence regarding economic interest and corporate links for the merits phase, as standing disputes will not be resolved via anticipatory orders unless mani…", "What to monitor: Upcoming Court of Appeal rulings on res judicata, which may further refine how prior national decisions impact UPC nullity actions."]
core_points_en: Rule 19.1 RoP preliminary objections are exhaustive and exclude substantive defences like lack of standing or res judicata.
Lack of standing and res judicata require factual and legal assessment, preventing their treatment as manifestly inadmissible under Rules 361 and 362 RoP.
Procedural efficiency dictates a single hearing combining admissibility and merits rather than separate preliminary hearings.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders and defendants must distinguish between procedural jurisdiction challenges and substantive standing arguments to avoid wasting preliminary objecti…
Practice note: Prepare evidence regarding economic interest and corporate links for the merits phase, as standing disputes will not be resolved via anticipatory orders unless mani…
What to monitor: Upcoming Court of Appeal rulings on res judicata, which may further refine how prior national decisions impact UPC nullity actions.
