items.title: International Patent Applications Rose in 2025, with Digital Communication and Semiconductor Technologies Showing Strong Growth
items.title_zh: 2025 年国际专利申请微增，数字通信与半导体增长强劲
items.title_en: WIPO Reports 2025 PCT Growth Driven by Digital Communication and Semiconductor Technologies
items.summary: International patent applications filed through WIPO's Patent Cooperation Treaty (PCT) rose 0.7% in 2025 to reach 275,900 filings worldwide, marking a second consecutive year of growth. The increase was partly due to robust activity in ICT related fields, with digital communication remaining as the top category (11.1%) of published PCT applications, while semiconductors recorded one of the fastest growth rates among all leading areas of international patents.
items.ai_summary_zh: 世界知识产权组织发布数据显示，2025 年通过 PCT 提交的国际专利申请量同比增长 0.7%，达 27.59 万件，连续第二年实现增长。增长主要由 ICT 领域驱动，其中数字通信稳居第一大技术类别，占比 11.1%；半导体技术则成为增速最快的领先领域之一，凸显全球在关键硬件技术上的竞争加剧。
items.ai_summary_en: World Intellectual Property Organization data indicates that international patent applications filed via the Patent Cooperation Treaty increased by 0.7% in 2025, reaching 275,900 filings globally. This marks the second consecutive year of growth for the system. The upward trend was primarily driven by robust activity within information and communication technology sectors. Digital communication maintained its position as the leading technical category, accounting for 11.1% of all published PCT applications. Meanwhile, semiconductor technologies recorded one of the highest growth rates among major international patent fields. These figures highlight intensifying global competition in critical hardware and digital infrastructure technologies, reflecting strategic shifts in innovation priorities across key markets worldwide.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局应紧跟半导体与数字通信热点，利用 PCT 途径优化海外申请策略。鉴于欧洲市场对硬科技的高度重视，建议加大高价值专利储备，防范潜在的技术壁垒与侵权风险，提升在全球产业链中的话语权。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants should prioritize strategic patent positioning in semiconductor and digital communication sectors, leveraging the PCT system to optimize international protection strategies. Given the European market's strong emphasis on hard technology, rights holders are advised to strengthen high-value patent portfolios to mitigate potential technical barriers and infringement risks. Enhancing intellectual property reserves in these competitive areas can improve leverage within the global supply chain and support sustained market access against evolving regulatory and competitive landscapes.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["年 PCT 国际专利申请总量微增 0.7%，连续两年保持上升态势", "数字通信以 11.1% 占比持续领跑，半导体领域录得最快增长率之一", "ICT 相关领域的 robust 活动是推动全球专利申请增长的主要动力"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Total PCT international patent applications rose slightly by 0.7%, maintaining an upward trajectory for the second consecutive year.", "Digital communication remains the dominant technical category with an 11.1% share, while semiconductors show rapid expansion.", "Robust activity in ICT-related fields serves as the primary engine driving overall growth in global patent filing volumes."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["聚焦半导体与数字通信赛道，利用 PCT 途径加速欧洲市场专利布局", "针对欧洲硬科技竞争态势，提升高价值专利储备以应对潜在壁垒"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Focus on semiconductor and digital communication tracks to accelerate patent layout in European markets via PCT pathways.", "Practice note: Enhance high-value patent reserves to address competitive pressures in Europe's hard technology sector effectively.", "What to monitor: Evolving technical barriers and infringement risks associated with rapid growth in semiconductor and digital tech patents."]
core_points_en: Total PCT international patent applications rose slightly by 0.7%, maintaining an upward trajectory for the second consecutive year.
Digital communication remains the dominant technical category with an 11.1% share, while semiconductors show rapid expansion.
Robust activity in ICT-related fields serves as the primary engine driving overall growth in global patent filing volumes.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Focus on semiconductor and digital communication tracks to accelerate patent layout in European markets via PCT pathways.
Practice note: Enhance high-value patent reserves to address competitive pressures in Europe's hard technology sector effectively.
What to monitor: Evolving technical barriers and infringement risks associated with rapid growth in semiconductor and digital tech patents.

items.title: Celebrating International Women’s Day
items.title_zh: EPO 庆祝国际妇女节并发布女性 STEM 领域研究报告
items.title_en: EPO Marks International Women’s Day with Joint Statement and New STEM Diversity Study
items.summary: Action for equality: joint statement and the latest study
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）为庆祝 2026 年国际妇女节，联合 WIPO 等 82 个机构签署声明，呼吁消除女性在知识产权系统中的代表性不足问题。同期，EPO 观察站发布研究报告，揭示 STEM 领域女性占比增长缓慢，指出结构性障碍，并通过四位杰出女性发明人案例，为推动包容性创新政策提供实证依据。
items.ai_summary_en: To commemorate the 2026 International Women’s Day, the European Patent Office (EPO) joined WIPO and eighty-two other intellectual property offices in signing a joint statement. This collaborative effort addresses the persistent underrepresentation of women within the global IP system, advocating for equal rights to protection and recognition. Concurrently, the EPO Observatory released a new study titled 'Advancing women in STEM.' The report highlights that despite incremental progress, female participation in science, technology, engineering, and mathematics remains low due to structural barriers. By profiling four distinguished women inventors, including European Inventor Award recipients, the study provides empirical evidence to support policy reforms aimed at fostering inclusive innovation and removing obstacles for female creators.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应关注欧洲 IP 体系对多样性的重视，优化内部创新激励机制以吸引女性人才。同时，利用 EPO 提供的教育服务，提升女性研发人员的专利布局能力，契合欧盟政策导向，降低合规与声誉风险。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants operating in Europe should closely monitor evolving EU policies regarding diversity and inclusion within the intellectual property landscape. Aligning internal innovation incentives with these regulatory trends can enhance talent acquisition and retention strategies, particularly for female researchers. Companies are advised to leverage available educational resources from the EPO to strengthen the patent literacy and strategic filing capabilities of their female R&D personnel. Proactively addressing representation gaps not only supports corporate social responsibility goals but also mitigates potential reputational risks associated with non-compliance with broader European equality standards.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO 联合全球 82 个机构签署声明，支持女性平等获取 IP 保护", "新研究揭示 STEM 领域女性发明人比例增长缓慢且存在结构壁垒", "报告 profiling 四位获奖女性发明人以激励未来 generations"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The EPO partnered with WIPO and eighty-two national offices to sign a joint statement supporting equal access to IP protection for women.", "A new EPO Observatory study reveals slow growth in female inventorship within STEM fields, identifying significant structural barriers.", "The report profiles four award-winning women inventors to provide practical examples and inspire future generations of innovators."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注欧盟多样性政策，优化企业女性创新人才激励机制", "利用 EPO 教育资源，提升女性研发人员专利布局与申请能力"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor EU diversity policies to align internal innovation incentives and attract female talent effectively.", "Practice note: Utilize EPO educational resources to enhance patent layout and application skills among female R&D staff.", "What to monitor: Regulatory shifts concerning gender equality in IP systems and potential compliance or reputational implications."]
core_points_en: The EPO partnered with WIPO and eighty-two national offices to sign a joint statement supporting equal access to IP protection for women.
A new EPO Observatory study reveals slow growth in female inventorship within STEM fields, identifying significant structural barriers.
The report profiles four award-winning women inventors to provide practical examples and inspire future generations of innovators.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor EU diversity policies to align internal innovation incentives and attract female talent effectively.
Practice note: Utilize EPO educational resources to enhance patent layout and application skills among female R&D staff.
What to monitor: Regulatory shifts concerning gender equality in IP systems and potential compliance or reputational implications.

items.title: UPC monthly statistics publication
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院恢复发布月度统计数据
items.title_en: UPC monthly statistics publication
items.summary: The Unified Patent Court resumes the publication of its monthly statistics
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院宣布恢复发布月度统计数据，并引入更新格式以提供更清晰的洞察。截至2026年2月28日，一审法院累计受理1130起案件。2026年前两个月新立案72起，其中侵权诉讼30起，撤销反诉39起。德语为最主要程序语言，占比62.5%，其次为英语和法语。数据涵盖各地方分院案件量及类型分布。
items.ai_insight_zh: 数据显示UPC诉讼活动持续进行，慕尼黑和杜塞尔多夫分院仍是案件集中地。英语作为主要程序语言的地位稳固，但德语案件占比显著。实务中需关注各分院案件积压趋势及新格式数据对诉讼策略的潜在参考意义，特别是侵权与撤销程序的联动情况。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC恢复发布月度统计，截至2026年2月底累计受理一审案件1130起，2026年新立…", "年前两月新案中，侵权诉讼30起，撤销反诉39起，独立撤销诉讼1起", "年案件程序语言分布：英语62.5%，德语34.72%，法语2.78%"]

items.title: Upcoming changes to judicial compositions of the Court of Appeal and the Court of First Instance, Central Division Paris
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院上诉院及巴黎一审分部法官组成变更公告
items.title_en: UPC Announces Judicial Composition Changes for Court of Appeal and Paris Central Division
items.summary: The Court informs on changes to the judicial compositions of the Court of Appeal and Court of First Instance, Central Division Paris, effective as of 1 April 2026
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院宣布自 2026 年 4 月 1 日起调整司法人员组成。因上诉院法官 Germano 退休，原巴黎中央分部一审法官 Catallozzi 晋升至上诉院；同时任命 Carnì为新任巴黎一审法官。该决定由行政委员会于 2025 年 7 月作出，旨在确保法院审判工作的连续性与稳定性。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court has announced significant changes to its judicial compositions, effective 1 April 2026. Following the retirement of legally qualified judge Ms Emanuela Germano from the Court of Appeal at the end of March 2026, the Administrative Committee nominated Mr Paolo Catallozzi to fill the vacancy. Mr Catallozzi, currently a legally qualified judge at the Court of First Instance, Central Division Paris, will be appointed to the Court of Appeal on the specified date. To address the resulting vacancy in Paris, the Administrative Committee simultaneously appointed Mr Vincenzo Carnì as a new legally qualified judge for the Court of First Instance, Central Division Paris, also effective 1 April 2026. These decisions, adopted on 2 July 2025, aim to ensure the continuity and stability of the Court’s judicial operations during this transition period.
items.ai_insight_zh: 法官更替可能影响特定技术领域的审判风格与倾向性。在欧中企需关注新任法官背景，评估对未决案件或未来诉讼策略的潜在影响，适时调整法律团队配置以应对巴黎分部的司法实践变化。
items.ai_insight_en: Judicial transitions can subtly influence procedural approaches and substantive interpretations within specific technical fields. Rights holders with pending cases or anticipated litigation before the Paris Central Division should assess the professional backgrounds of the newly appointed judges. Understanding their prior experience may help predict potential tendencies regarding patent validity challenges and infringement determinations. Legal teams are advised to review current case strategies and evidence preparation protocols to align with any shifts in judicial practice. Proactive adaptation ensures that litigation tactics remain robust and responsive to the evolving composition of the bench, maintaining strategic advantage in ongoing and future proceedings.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["上诉院法官 Germano 将于 2026 年 3 月底正式退休离任", "Catallozzi 从巴黎一审分部晋升至上诉院，2026 年 4 月生效", "行政委员会任命 Carnì填补巴黎一审分部法官空缺"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Ms Emanuela Germano will retire from her position as a legally qualified judge at the UPC Court of Appeal by the end of March 2026.", "Mr Paolo Catallozzi is promoted from the Paris Central Division to serve as a legally qualified judge at the Court of Appeal starting 1 April 2026.", "Mr Vincenzo Carnì is appointed as a new legally qualified judge for the Court of First Instance, Central Division Paris, effective 1 April 2026."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注新任法官专业背景，预判其对专利有效性及侵权判定的倾向", "针对巴黎分部案件，建议重新评估诉讼策略与证据准备重点"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Assess how the new judges' professional backgrounds may influence rulings on patent validity and infringement in the Paris Central Division.", "Practice note: Re-evaluate litigation strategies and evidence preparation priorities for cases pending before the Paris division to account for potential judicial shifts.", "What to monitor: Track the publication of new decisions by Judges Catallozzi and Carnì to identify emerging patterns in legal interpretation and procedural preferences."]
core_points_en: Ms Emanuela Germano will retire from her position as a legally qualified judge at the UPC Court of Appeal by the end of March 2026.
Mr Paolo Catallozzi is promoted from the Paris Central Division to serve as a legally qualified judge at the Court of Appeal starting 1 April 2026.
Mr Vincenzo Carnì is appointed as a new legally qualified judge for the Court of First Instance, Central Division Paris, effective 1 April 2026.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Assess how the new judges' professional backgrounds may influence rulings on patent validity and infringement in the Paris Central Division.
Practice note: Re-evaluate litigation strategies and evidence preparation priorities for cases pending before the Paris division to account for potential judicial shifts.
What to monitor: Track the publication of new decisions by Judges Catallozzi and Carnì to identify emerging patterns in legal interpretation and procedural preferences.

items.title: The enchanted land of IP
items.title_zh: IP魔法世界：从《遥远的魔树》看版权与商标保护
items.title_en: IP in the Enchanted Land: Copyright and Trademark Protection for The Faraway Tree
items.summary: A favourite childhood story is being adapted for the screen, and it got me thinking about the intellectual property behind it. From copyright and licensing to trade marks, The Magic Faraway Tree shows how IP helps creative worlds travel from
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局博客以《遥远的魔树》改编电影为例，阐释知识产权在创意产业中的作用。文章指出，尽管原著出版于1930年代，但因作者逝世未满70年，依据英国法律仍受版权保护，改编需获授权许可。此外，权利持有者通过注册“Faraway Tree”等文字商标，覆盖出版、娱乐及周边产品领域，构建品牌护城河。该案例展示了版权、许可与商标如何协同保障创作者权益并促进IP商业化。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office blog uses the film adaptation of The Magic Faraway Tree to illustrate intellectual property roles in creative industries. Although the original book was published in the 1930s, it remains under copyright protection because the author died less than seventy years ago. Consequently, UK law requires formal licensing for adaptations, ensuring respect for the original work. Additionally, rights holders have registered trademarks for Faraway Tree titles and characters across publishing, entertainment, and merchandise sectors. This strategy builds a brand moat by preventing unauthorized use. The case demonstrates how copyright, licensing, and trademarks work together to protect creator rights while facilitating commercial exploitation and safeguarding the integrity of cherished literary works in new media formats.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在进行文学IP出海或改编时，务必核实目标国版权剩余期限，避免侵权风险。同时，应建立完善的全球商标布局策略，尤其在核心市场提前注册关键IP名称，防止被抢注。建议结合版权许可与商标保护，构建多维度的IP资产防御体系，保障商业变现安全。
items.ai_insight_en: Rights holders managing literary IP for international markets must verify remaining copyright terms in target jurisdictions to avoid infringement liabilities. Establishing a comprehensive global trademark strategy is equally critical, particularly securing registrations for key IP names in core markets before launch. Combining copyright licensing with robust trademark protection creates a multi-dimensional defense system. This integrated approach safeguards commercial monetization efforts and prevents third-party squatting, ensuring that brand equity and creative assets remain secure during cross-border expansion and multimedia adaptation projects.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["英国版权法规定作者死后70年内作品受保护，《遥远的魔树》尚未进入公有领域", "影视改编需获得权利人正式许可，确保原作尊重及商业开发的合法性与规范性", "通过注册商标保护角色名称及品牌标识，覆盖多类别商品以防侵权并拓展商业价值"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["UK copyright law protects works for seventy years after the author's death, meaning The Faraway Tree has not yet entered the public domain.", "Film adaptations require formal authorization from rights holders to ensure legal compliance and proper treatment of the original literary source material.", "Registered trademarks covering character names and brand identifiers prevent infringement and expand commercial value across multiple product categories."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["出口前核查目标国版权状态，规避因保护期未届满导致的侵权赔偿风险", "实施“版权+商标”组合保护策略，提前在核心市场注册IP名称以巩固品牌壁垒"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Verify copyright status in target export markets to mitigate infringement risks arising from unexpired protection periods.", "Practice note: Implement a combined copyright and trademark protection strategy, registering key IP names early in core markets to strengthen brand barriers.", "What to monitor: Track trademark filings and copyright expirations in key jurisdictions to proactively defend against unauthorized adaptations or brand squatting."]
core_points_en: UK copyright law protects works for seventy years after the author's death, meaning The Faraway Tree has not yet entered the public domain.
Film adaptations require formal authorization from rights holders to ensure legal compliance and proper treatment of the original literary source material.
Registered trademarks covering character names and brand identifiers prevent infringement and expand commercial value across multiple product categories.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Verify copyright status in target export markets to mitigate infringement risks arising from unexpired protection periods.
Practice note: Implement a combined copyright and trademark protection strategy, registering key IP names early in core markets to strengthen brand barriers.
What to monitor: Track trademark filings and copyright expirations in key jurisdictions to proactively defend against unauthorized adaptations or brand squatting.

items.title: FCJ: Requirements for Licensee Willingness under FRAND
items.title_zh: 德联邦法院明确FRAND抗辩中被许可人意愿要求
items.title_en: FCJ: Requirements for Licensee Willingness under FRAND
items.summary: The German Federal Court of Justice clarifies the requirements for willingness to license in FRAND defence cases.
items.ai_summary_zh: 德国联邦最高法院于2026年1月驳回HMD Global上诉，维持慕尼黑地方法院判决，进一步细化标准必要专利（SEP）禁令救济中FRAND抗辩的许可意愿标准。慕尼黑法院系列判决强调，评估许可意愿需结合具体谈判行为，如支付无争议费用或提供担保。法院还指出，可比协议可确定FRAND费率范围，且德国法院对涉及德国专利的FRAND义务拥有管辖权。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案将欧盟法院Huawei v ZTE框架转化为具体程序与经济标准。实务中需关注被许可人谈判行为的具体化要求，特别是部分支付与担保对认定“愿意被许可”的影响。同时，德国法院强化了对本国专利FRAND争议的属地管辖立场，排斥外国法院干预。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["德联邦最高法院驳回HMD Global上诉，确认慕尼黑法院关于FRAND抗辩中许可意愿…", "慕尼黑法院强调，支付无争议许可费或提供充足担保是证明被许可人无拖延意图的关键行为证据", "法院裁定德国法院原则上负责评估涉及德国专利的FRAND义务，外国法院 interim…"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["许可意愿评估从形式声明转向具体谈判行为，支付无争议费用或提供担保成为关键抗辩要素", "德国法院确立对涉及德国专利FRAND义务的专属评估权，限制外国法院临时许可令的域外效力", "需持续观察德国法院如何依据可比协议界定FRAND费率走廊，以及该标准在后续SEP诉讼中…"]

items.title: Research: Female participation in inventorship
items.title_zh: 研究：女性参与发明人身份的分析
items.title_en: UKIPO Research: Female Inventorship Trends in UK Patent Applications (1997–2024)
items.summary: Analysis of female representation among inventors listed on UK published patent applications from 1997 to 2024.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布研究报告，分析了 1997 年至 2024 年间英国已公布专利申请中列明的女性发明人代表比例。该数据旨在揭示长期趋势下女性在技术创新领域的参与度变化，为制定促进多样性与包容性的知识产权政策提供实证依据，反映英国在专利生态系统中对性别平等的关注。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has released a comprehensive research report analyzing the representation of female inventors listed on published patent applications in the United Kingdom. Covering the period from 1997 to 2024, this study provides a detailed longitudinal assessment of gender diversity within the national innovation ecosystem. The data aims to reveal long-term trends in female participation in technological invention, offering empirical evidence to support the development of intellectual property policies that promote diversity and inclusion. This publication reflects the UK’s ongoing commitment to addressing gender equality within its patent system and serves as a key resource for understanding the evolving demographic landscape of inventors over nearly three decades.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应关注欧洲市场对创新多样性的重视趋势，优化研发团队结构以提升 ESG 评级。在英申请专利时，准确登记所有发明人信息，避免因合规细节影响企业形象或政府资助资格。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants should closely monitor European regulatory and policy shifts emphasizing innovation diversity, as these trends increasingly influence corporate ESG ratings and funding eligibility. Ensuring accurate registration of all inventors in patent applications is essential to maintain compliance and protect corporate reputation. Rights holders operating in the UK must verify inventor details rigorously to avoid administrative errors that could jeopardize government grants or public perception. Regular audits of inventorship records are recommended to align with best practices in inclusive innovation management and to mitigate potential legal or reputational risks associated with inaccurate filings.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["覆盖 1997 至 2024 年英国专利申请中的女性发明人数据", "旨在评估女性在技术创新领域的长期参与趋势", "为优化知识产权领域的多样性政策提供数据支持"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Comprehensive analysis of female inventor data extracted from UK published patent applications spanning 1997 to 2024.", "Assessment of long-term trends regarding female participation levels within the broader field of technological innovation.", "Provision of critical data support to optimize and refine diversity policies within the intellectual property sector."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注欧洲创新多样性趋势，优化团队结构以符合 ESG", "确保专利申请中发明人信息准确，规避合规风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor European innovation diversity trends to optimize team structures and enhance ESG performance metrics.", "Practice note: Ensure precise recording of inventor information in patent applications to mitigate compliance risks and safeguard eligibility.", "What to monitor: Evolving UKIPO guidelines on inventorship accuracy and their impact on corporate governance and funding qualifications."]

Assessment of long-term trends regarding female participation levels within the broader field of technological innovation.
Provision of critical data support to optimize and refine diversity policies within the intellectual property sector.

items.title: 1 April 2026: Update to the Patent Cooperation Treaty (PCT) fees
items.title_zh: 2026 年 4 月 1 日：专利合作条约（PCT）费用更新
items.title_en: UKIPO Confirms PCT Fee Structure Changes Effective 1 April 2026
items.summary: The Patent Cooperation Treaty (PCT) fee structure will change on 1 April 2026
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布通知，确认专利合作条约（PCT）的费用结构将于 2026 年 4 月 1 日正式调整。作为 WIPO 管理下的关键国际专利申请体系，PCT 费用变动将直接波及所有经由英国或欧洲其他受理局提交国际申请的主体。此次更新旨在反映行政成本变化，申请人需提前规划预算，以避免因费用标准更迭导致的程序延误或额外支出，确保国际阶段顺利进入国家阶段。
items.ai_summary_en: The United Kingdom Intellectual Property Office has issued an official notice confirming that the fee structure for the Patent Cooperation Treaty will undergo significant adjustments effective 1 April 2026. As a critical international patent application system administered by WIPO, these changes directly impact all entities filing international applications through the UK or other European receiving offices. The update aims to reflect evolving administrative costs within the international phase. Consequently, applicants must proactively plan their budgets to avoid procedural delays or unexpected expenditures caused by the new fee standards. Ensuring accurate financial preparation is essential for a smooth transition from the international phase into the national phase, maintaining the integrity and continuity of patent protection strategies across multiple jurisdictions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧专利布局多依赖 PCT 途径，费用上调将增加海外维权与确权成本。建议企业重新核算 2026 年后的 IP 预算，对拟在该时间节点前后提交的申请进行策略性时间规划，并密切关注具体费率细则以优化资金配置。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants relying on the PCT pathway for European patent portfolios should anticipate increased costs for overseas rights confirmation and enforcement. It is advisable to recalculate intellectual property budgets for post-2026 filings. Strategic timing of applications around this date can optimize capital allocation. Stakeholders must closely monitor specific rate details to ensure efficient fund management and avoid unnecessary financial burdens during the international and national phases of patent prosecution.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["PCT 国际专利申请费用结构定于 2026 年 4 月 1 日生效变更", "英国知识产权局正式发布官方通告提醒相关申请人注意", "费用调整将影响所有经由 UK 或欧洲渠道提交的 PCT 申请成本"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The PCT international patent application fee structure is scheduled to change officially on 1 April 2026.", "The UK Intellectual Property Office has released an official announcement reminding relevant applicants of these updates.", "Fee adjustments will affect the costs of all PCT applications filed via UK or European channels."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["需重新评估 2026 年后 PCT 国际阶段及进入国家阶段的预算成本", "建议根据新费率时间表优化申请提交节点，规避不必要的支出"]

The UK Intellectual Property Office has released an official announcement reminding relevant applicants of these updates.

items.title: AI-assisted minute-taking extended to Unitary Patent oral proceedings
items.title_zh: EPO 将 AI 辅助笔录扩展至统一专利口头程序
items.title_en: EPO Extends AI-Assisted Minute-Taking to Unitary Patent Oral Proceedings
items.summary: EPO extends AI‑assisted minute‑taking to Unitary Patent proceedings, improving efficiency, accuracy and consistency while ensuring full human oversight and data protection
items.ai_summary_zh: 继 2025 年试点成功后，欧洲专利局（EPO）正式将 AI 辅助笔录技术应用范围扩大至统一专利保护部门（UPPD）的口头程序。该流程利用 AI 生成录音转录稿并起草会议纪要，全程保留人工最终审核权以确保准确性。此举旨在提升审查、异议及统一专利程序的效率与一致性，同时严格遵守数据保护规定，录音在纪要发布后即被删除。
items.ai_summary_en: Following a successful pilot phase in 2025, the European Patent Office (EPO) has officially extended the use of artificial intelligence for minute-taking in oral proceedings before the Unitary Patent Protection Division (UPPD). This initiative builds upon existing AI applications in examination and opposition procedures. The system utilizes AI tools to generate audio transcripts and draft minutes, which are subsequently reviewed and finalized by human examiners to ensure accuracy and legal compliance. This hybrid approach aims to enhance procedural efficiency, consistency, and structural quality while maintaining strict human oversight. In alignment with rigorous data protection standards, all audio recordings and transcriptions are permanently deleted immediately after the final minutes are issued to the parties involved.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧参与统一专利诉讼或异议时，需适应 AI 辅助的高效程序节奏。建议提前准备高质量口头陈述，利用程序一致性优势，同时关注数据隐私合规，确保在人工复核环节有效传达核心技术与法律观点。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants engaging in Unitary Patent proceedings should anticipate accelerated procedural rhythms driven by AI-supported documentation. While AI enhances transcript consistency, the final minutes remain subject to human verification, making precise oral advocacy critical during hearings. Parties must ensure their core technical and legal arguments are clearly articulated to influence the examiner's final review effectively. Additionally, firms should maintain robust data privacy compliance measures, acknowledging that session recordings are transient and deleted post-issuance, necessitating independent record-keeping strategies for internal case management.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO 将 AI 辅助笔录从审查异议程序扩展至统一专利口头程序", "采用", "AI 转录 + 人工复核”模式，确保最终纪要责任归属明确", "严格遵循数据保护原则，程序录音及转录稿在纪要发出后销毁"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The EPO extends AI-assisted minute-taking from examination and opposition phases to Unitary Patent oral proceedings.", "A hybrid model combining AI transcription with mandatory human review ensures clear responsibility for final minutes.", "Strict data protection protocols require the deletion of recordings and transcripts once minutes are formally issued."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["适应 AI 提速后的程序节奏，提升口头审理陈述的精准度", "利用程序一致性红利，强化在人工复核阶段的关键论点输出"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Adapt to faster procedural timelines by preparing high-quality, precise oral statements for Unitary Patent hearings.", "Practice note: Leverage improved minute consistency but prioritize clear argument delivery during the human review phase.", "What to monitor: Data privacy implications regarding the automatic deletion of audio records after minute issuance."]
core_points_en: The EPO extends AI-assisted minute-taking from examination and opposition phases to Unitary Patent oral proceedings.
A hybrid model combining AI transcription with mandatory human review ensures clear responsibility for final minutes.
Strict data protection protocols require the deletion of recordings and transcripts once minutes are formally issued.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Adapt to faster procedural timelines by preparing high-quality, precise oral statements for Unitary Patent hearings.
Practice note: Leverage improved minute consistency but prioritize clear argument delivery during the human review phase.
What to monitor: Data privacy implications regarding the automatic deletion of audio records after minute issuance.

items.title: EPO and IP Australia PCT pilot programme enters into force starting 1 March 2026
items.title_zh: EPO 与澳知识产权局 PCT 试点项目于 2026 年启动
items.title_en: EPO and IP Australia Launch Two-Year PCT Pilot Allowing EPO as ISA from March 2026
items.summary: Under a two-year pilot programme between the EPO and IP Australia that started 1 March 2026, Australian applicants can designate the EPO as their International Searching Authority (ISA) under the PCT.
items.ai_summary_zh: 自 2026 年 3 月 1 日起，EPO 与澳大利亚知识产权局开启为期两年的 PCT 试点。澳洲申请人可指定 EPO 为国际检索和初步审查单位。此举允许申请人进入欧洲区域阶段时免除补充检索，并在请求第二章审查后享受 75% 官费减免，旨在加速高质量欧洲专利保护获取。
items.ai_summary_en: Starting 1 March 2026, a two-year pilot programme between the European Patent Office (EPO) and IP Australia enables Australian applicants to designate the EPO as their International Searching Authority (ISA) and International Preliminary Examining Authority (IPEA) under the Patent Cooperation Treaty (PCT). This initiative allows applicants filing with IP Australia or the WIPO International Bureau to leverage EPO search reports for accelerated entry into the European regional phase. Key benefits include exemption from supplementary searches upon entering the European phase, significantly reducing time and costs. Additionally, applicants who request international preliminary examination under PCT Chapter II with the EPO receive a 75% reduction in European regional phase examination fees. The high-quality EPO search report provides a robust basis for strategic decisions regarding European and national phase entries, ultimately facilitating more efficient and cost-effective access to patent protection across EPO member states and potential unitary effect territories.
items.ai_insight_zh: 虽试点针对澳洲申请人，但彰显 EPO 优化 PCT 流程趋势。中企应关注此类双边合作是否扩展至中国，提前布局利用 EPO 作为 ISA 以优化欧洲专利组合成本与效率。
items.ai_insight_en: This pilot highlights the EPO’s strategic effort to integrate its search capabilities earlier in the global patent lifecycle, offering tangible cost efficiencies for specific jurisdictions. For rights holders managing cross-border portfolios, leveraging high-quality international search reports can streamline validation strategies and reduce overall prosecution expenses. While currently limited to Australian filings, this model suggests a broader trend toward bilateral cooperation that could influence future PCT procedures. Stakeholders should assess how such arrangements might optimize their European entry strategies, particularly regarding fee reductions and procedural shortcuts. Monitoring the expansion of similar agreements will be crucial for adapting long-term IP budgeting and prosecution workflows to maximize efficiency and minimize redundant search costs across multiple jurisdictions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["澳洲申请人可指定 EPO 为 PCT 国际检索及初步审查单位", "凭 EPO 报告进入欧洲阶段可免除补充检索并节省时间成本", "若请求国际初步审查，欧洲区域阶段审查费可减免百分之七十五"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Australian applicants can now designate the EPO as ISA and IPEA for PCT applications filed via IP Australia or WIPO.", "Using an EPO international search report exempts applicants from supplementary searches when entering the European regional phase.", "Requesting international preliminary examination with the EPO grants a 75% reduction in subsequent European examination fees."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注 EPO 与他国 PCT 合作动态，评估未来适用中国可能性", "利用高质量国际检索报告优化欧洲进入策略以降低整体成本"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage high-quality international search reports to streamline European entry strategies and reduce overall prosecution costs.", "Practice note: Evaluate the financial impact of fee reductions and search exemptions when planning international patent filings and regional phase entries.", "What to monitor: Track the expansion of bilateral PCT cooperation models to anticipate potential applicability to other key markets and jurisdictions."]
core_points_en: Australian applicants can now designate the EPO as ISA and IPEA for PCT applications filed via IP Australia or WIPO.
Using an EPO international search report exempts applicants from supplementary searches when entering the European regional phase.
Requesting international preliminary examination with the EPO grants a 75% reduction in subsequent European examination fees.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Leverage high-quality international search reports to streamline European entry strategies and reduce overall prosecution costs.
Practice note: Evaluate the financial impact of fee reductions and search exemptions when planning international patent filings and regional phase entries.
What to monitor: Track the expansion of bilateral PCT cooperation models to anticipate potential applicability to other key markets and jurisdictions.

items.title: EPO’s next-generation search tool for examiners now used in over 40 national patent offices worldwide
items.title_zh: EPO 新一代审查检索工具已在全球四十余国局启用
items.title_en: EPO Next-Generation Search Tool Deployed in Over 40 National Patent Offices Globally
items.summary: A new search era has formally commenced: the next-generation tool ANSERA-based SEARCH was developed by the European Patent Office (EPO) in collaboration with national patent offices across the EPO member states.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）开发的基于 ANSERA 的新一代检索工具 SEARCH，已在全球超过 40 个国家专利局投入使用。该工具取代了旧的 EPOQUE Net 系统，为 2500 多名审查员提供处理复杂现有技术的未来型解决方案。其具备智能排序、语义检索及海量数据管理能力，旨在统一全球高质量检索实践，巩固 EPO 在专利质量领域的领导地位，支持全球创新生态系统。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office has formally launched its next-generation search tool, ANSERA-based SEARCH, developed in collaboration with national patent offices. Now active in over forty jurisdictions, the system supports more than 2,500 examiners by replacing the legacy EPOQUE Net platform. It offers a future-proof solution for managing increasingly complex prior art through intelligent ranking, semantic-like retrieval, and robust handling of vast document volumes. This deployment marks a significant milestone in the EPO’s Strategic Plan 2028, aiming to harmonize high-quality search practices worldwide. By providing advanced digital tools and shared data standards, the initiative strengthens global cooperation and upholds international patent quality standards, thereby supporting the broader innovation ecosystem with enhanced efficiency and accuracy in novelty and inventive step assessments.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧专利申请将面临更严苛且高效的现有技术检索。建议提前进行深度 FTO 分析，利用同类先进工具自查，确保新颖性与创造性论证充分，以应对审查标准的技术性升级。
items.ai_insight_en: The deployment of advanced AI-driven search capabilities across multiple national offices signals a shift toward more rigorous and efficient prior art examinations. Rights holders should anticipate stricter scrutiny regarding novelty and inventive step due to improved semantic retrieval and comprehensive database coverage. To mitigate risks, companies are advised to conduct thorough Freedom to Operate analyses early in the development cycle. Utilizing similar advanced search technologies for internal pre-filing checks can help identify potential conflicts proactively. Ensuring that technical disclosures are precise and well-documented will be crucial for successfully navigating these heightened examination standards and securing robust patent protection in key markets.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO 新一代 ANSERA 检索工具已在超 40 国局部署使用", "新工具支持语义检索与智能排序，大幅提升审查效率", "取代旧系统以统一全球标准，强化专利质量领导力"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["ANSERA-based SEARCH is now deployed in over forty national patent offices, replacing the legacy EPOQUE Net system globally.", "The tool features semantic-like retrieval and intelligent ranking, significantly enhancing examiner efficiency and search depth.", "This upgrade unifies global search standards, reinforcing the EPO's leadership in maintaining high patent quality internationally."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["欧专利审查检索升级，中国企业需强化前置 FTO 分析", "适应智能化审查趋势，提升专利技术交底书撰写质量"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Enhanced search capabilities across national offices may lead to stricter examination outcomes, requiring stronger prior art defenses.", "Practice note: Conduct deep Freedom to Operate analyses early and use advanced search tools for internal self-checks to ensure robustness.", "What to monitor: Track the adoption rates of ANSERA-based SEARCH in specific target jurisdictions to adjust filing strategies accordingly."]
core_points_en: ANSERA-based SEARCH is now deployed in over forty national patent offices, replacing the legacy EPOQUE Net system globally.
The tool features semantic-like retrieval and intelligent ranking, significantly enhancing examiner efficiency and search depth.
This upgrade unifies global search standards, reinforcing the EPO's leadership in maintaining high patent quality internationally.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Enhanced search capabilities across national offices may lead to stricter examination outcomes, requiring stronger prior art defenses.
Practice note: Conduct deep Freedom to Operate analyses early and use advanced search tools for internal self-checks to ensure robustness.
What to monitor: Track the adoption rates of ANSERA-based SEARCH in specific target jurisdictions to adjust filing strategies accordingly.

items.title: President’s mission to Hungary
items.title_zh: EPO 局长访问匈牙利共商欧洲专利网络未来
items.title_en: EPO President Discusses European Patent Network Future During Hungary Visit
items.summary: President Campinos attended the 130th anniversary of the Hungarian Intellectual Property Office (HIPO) and met with HIPO President Szabolcs Farkas to discuss the future of the European Patent Network.
items.ai_summary_zh: EPO 局长坎皮诺斯出席匈牙利知识产权局成立 130 周年活动，并与该局主席法卡斯会晤。双方聚焦欧洲专利系统韧性，探讨通过统一专利制度深化网络整合、协调审查实践及共享数字工具，以应对技术变革并支持中小企业创新。
items.ai_summary_en: EPO President António Campinos attended the 130th anniversary celebrations of the Hungarian Intellectual Property Office (HIPO) on March 3. He met with HIPO President Szabolcs Farkas to discuss priorities for the national and European IP landscape. The visit supported ongoing consultations for the EPO’s upcoming Scenarios for the Future study, which examines the evolution of the innovation ecosystem and patent system over the next two decades. Both leaders emphasized strengthening the European Patent Network through harmonized practices and shared digital tools. They highlighted the Unitary Patent system as key to deeper integration and a coherent technology market. Discussions focused on ensuring system resilience against technological and geopolitical changes, while improving joint support for startups and SMEs through enhanced digital cooperation and capacity building.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应关注欧洲专利网络数字化整合趋势，利用协调化程序降低多国申请成本。建议密切跟踪统一专利制度在匈牙利的落地进展，优化在欧洲新兴市场的专利布局策略以增强竞争力。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants should monitor the ongoing digital integration of the European Patent Network, as standardized procedures and shared tools can significantly reduce costs for multi-jurisdictional filings. The advancement of the Unitary Patent system remains a critical development for optimizing patent portfolios across Europe. Rights holders are advised to track implementation progress in member states like Hungary to refine their intellectual property strategies in Central and Eastern European markets. Aligning filing strategies with these harmonization efforts may enhance legal certainty and operational efficiency for companies seeking robust protection in emerging tech sectors.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO 与匈牙利局共商欧洲专利网络现代化及数字化协作路径", "强调通过统一专利制度深化整合，构建连贯的欧洲技术市场", "双方致力于协调审查实践，提升对初创企业及中小企业的联合支持"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["EPO and HIPO discussed modernizing the European Patent Network via enhanced digital collaboration and practice convergence.", "Leaders emphasized deepening integration through the Unitary Patent system to build a coherent European technology market.", "Both offices committed to harmonizing examination practices and increasing joint support for startups and SMEs."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用欧洲专利网络数字化协作机制，降低跨国专利申请与维护成本", "关注统一专利制度在匈牙利的实施，优化中东欧市场知识产权布局"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage digital collaboration mechanisms within the European Patent Network to lower cross-border application and maintenance costs.", "Practice note: Monitor the implementation of the Unitary Patent system in Hungary to optimize intellectual property layouts in Central and Eastern European markets.", "What to monitor: Progress in harmonized examination practices and digital tool integration affecting multi-country patent strategies."]
core_points_en: EPO and HIPO discussed modernizing the European Patent Network via enhanced digital collaboration and practice convergence.
Leaders emphasized deepening integration through the Unitary Patent system to build a coherent European technology market.
Both offices committed to harmonizing examination practices and increasing joint support for startups and SMEs.

Practice note: Monitor the implementation of the Unitary Patent system in Hungary to optimize intellectual property layouts in Central and Eastern European markets.

items.title: When milk turns sour: Oatly v Dairy UK
items.title_zh: 燕麦奶终败诉：英国最高法院裁定 Oatly 商标无效
items.title_en: UK Supreme Court Rules Oatly's 'Post Milk Generation' Trademark Invalid
items.summary: Back in 2021, Oatly, a Swedish manufacturer of oat drinks, obtained a registration for the trade mark POST MILK GENERATION in the UK for goods including milk substitutes, yoghurt substitute, and other food products, all being oat-based.
items.ai_summary_zh: 瑞典企业 Oatly 在英国注册的
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Supreme Court has upheld the invalidation of Oatly’s ‘POST MILK GENERATION’ trademark, concluding a four-year legal dispute with Dairy UK. The Swedish oat drink manufacturer originally secured registration in 2021 for plant-based food substitutes. Dairy UK challenged the mark, arguing it violated retained EU regulations restricting the term ‘milk’ to animal-derived products. While the High Court initially favored Oatly, the Court of Appeal reversed this decision, finding that the mark infringed regulatory prohibitions regardless of consumer deception. The Supreme Court ultimately agreed with Dairy UK, interpreting the regulation strictly to prohibit using ‘milk’ designations for non-animal products. This final ruling confirms that such trademarks are invalid under current UK law, reinforcing strict labeling standards for dairy alternatives.
items.ai_insight_en: This landmark decision clarifies the scope of protected designations for dairy terms under UK law, impacting all market participants in the plant-based sector. Rights holders must ensure trademark applications avoid prohibited terminology linked to regulated food categories, even if used metaphorically. The ruling emphasizes that regulatory compliance takes precedence over distinctiveness claims when specific statutory bans apply. Companies should conduct rigorous clearance searches focusing on sector-specific labeling laws rather than relying solely on traditional likelihood of confusion assessments. Future branding strategies for alternative proteins must navigate these strict definitional boundaries to avoid costly invalidation proceedings and potential enforcement actions by industry associations.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["瑞典企业 Oatly 在英国注册的"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UK Supreme Court upheld the invalidation of Oatly's 'POST MILK GENERATION' trademark after a four-year legal battle.", "Retained EU regulations strictly prohibit using 'milk' designations for any product other than those derived from animal secretions.", "The Court rejected arguments that the mark was merely descriptive or that notional fair use could bypass regulatory prohibitions."]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Plant-based food manufacturers must align trademark strategies with strict dairy labeling regulations to avoid invalidation risks.", "Practice note: Conduct comprehensive clearance searches that include regulatory compliance checks for restricted food terminology beyond standard conflicts.", "What to monitor: Potential legislative updates or further judicial interpretations regarding the definition of 'designation' in food labeling laws."]
core_points_en: The UK Supreme Court upheld the invalidation of Oatly's 'POST MILK GENERATION' trademark after a four-year legal battle.
Retained EU regulations strictly prohibit using 'milk' designations for any product other than those derived from animal secretions.
The Court rejected arguments that the mark was merely descriptive or that notional fair use could bypass regulatory prohibitions.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Plant-based food manufacturers must align trademark strategies with strict dairy labeling regulations to avoid invalidation risks.
Practice note: Conduct comprehensive clearance searches that include regulatory compliance checks for restricted food terminology beyond standard conflicts.
What to monitor: Potential legislative updates or further judicial interpretations regarding the definition of 'designation' in food labeling laws.

items.title: Avanci enters market for licensing wi-fi SEPs
items.title_zh: Avanci进军Wi-Fi标准必要专利许可市场
items.title_en: Avanci enters market for licensing wi-fi SEPs
items.summary: Avanci has expanded beyond cellular connectivity into wi-fi technology and launched a new platform for wi-fi 6 and wi-fi 7 SEPs.
items.ai_summary_zh: 专利池运营商Avanci将其业务从蜂窝通信扩展至Wi-Fi技术领域，推出针对Wi-Fi 6及未来Wi-Fi 7标准必要专利（SEP）的新许可平台。该平台首个项目“Avanci Wi-Fi 6 Vehicle”面向汽车行业，整合了十家专利权人的权利。德国豪华汽车制造商梅赛德斯-奔驰已签署协议，成为该新平台的首家被许可人。
items.ai_insight_zh: Avanci进入Wi-Fi SEP许可领域，标志着汽车 connectivity 许可模式从蜂窝向Wi-Fi延伸。需关注后续更多车企加入情况及Wi-Fi 7专利纳入进度，以及该模式对现有分散许可格局的影响。

items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["Avanci将蜂窝许可模式复制至Wi-Fi领域，旨在简化车企多源许可流程", "梅赛德斯-奔驰作为首家 licensee，具有行业示范效应，可能引发其他车企跟进", "需持续观察Wi-Fi 7专利纳入情况及其他主要专利权人是否加入该平台"]

items.title: Copyright and Champagne labels: French court confirms rejection of the accessory theory and tacit assignment
items.title_zh: 法国法院驳回附属理论，确认香槟标签版权侵权
items.title_en: French Court Rejects Accessory Theory and Tacit Assignment in Champagne Label Copyright Dispute
items.summary: France's Douai Court of Appeal has confirmed that a work reproduced on Champagne bottles without authorisation constitutes copyright infringement.
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国杜埃上诉法院维持原判，认定香槟生产商未经授权在标签及数字媒体复制艺术作品构成侵权。法院明确拒绝适用“附属理论”及“默示转让”抗辩，强调即便作品物理所有权转移，若无明确合同，经济权利仍归作者所有。此案重申了作者专有权利的严格解释原则。
items.ai_summary_en: The Douai Court of Appeal has upheld a ruling that a Champagne producer infringed copyright by reproducing an artist's work on bottle labels, packaging, and digital media without authorization. The court explicitly rejected the 'accessory theory' and the defense of tacit assignment of economic rights. Although the Champagne house purchased the physical sculpture for €4,000, the transfer of material ownership did not convey any intellectual property rights. The decision reinforces the strict interpretation of authors' exclusive exploitation rights under French law, confirming that absent a clear contractual agreement, economic rights remain with the creator regardless of the commercial context or the incidental nature of the use.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧采购艺术品或设计时，须签署书面版权许可协议，切勿误以为购买实物即获使用权。面对侵权诉讼，依赖“附属使用”或“默示授权”等法式抗辩风险极高，应提前完成权利链条清理。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants acquiring physical artworks or designs must secure separate, written copyright licenses to avoid infringement liabilities. Relying on the accessory theory or assuming tacit permissions from physical purchases carries significant legal risk in France. Rights holders should conduct thorough due diligence to verify the chain of title and ensure all necessary economic rights are explicitly assigned before commercial exploitation. This case underscores the critical distinction between owning a physical object and holding the underlying intellectual property rights.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院驳回附属理论，认定涉案作品非次要或偶然出现", "明确物理作品买卖不等于版权经济权利的默示转让", "重申无明确合同时，作者保留对其作品的独家 exploitation 权"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The court rejected the accessory theory, finding the artwork was central to the branding rather than secondary or incidental.", "Physical purchase of an artwork does not imply tacit assignment of economic rights; explicit contracts are mandatory.", "Authors retain exclusive exploitation rights unless clearly transferred via written agreement, ensuring strict legal protection."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["采购实体艺术品务必同步签署书面版权授权合同", "在法涉诉时避免盲目援引附属理论作为免责抗辩"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Acquiring physical art does not grant usage rights; separate written copyright licenses are essential for commercial exploitation.", "Practice note: Avoid relying on the accessory theory or tacit assignment defenses in France, as courts strictly require explicit contractual transfers.", "What to monitor: Ensure comprehensive due diligence on the chain of title for all artistic works used in branding, packaging, and digital media."]
core_points_en: The court rejected the accessory theory, finding the artwork was central to the branding rather than secondary or incidental.
Physical purchase of an artwork does not imply tacit assignment of economic rights; explicit contracts are mandatory.
Authors retain exclusive exploitation rights unless clearly transferred via written agreement, ensuring strict legal protection.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Acquiring physical art does not grant usage rights; separate written copyright licenses are essential for commercial exploitation.
Practice note: Avoid relying on the accessory theory or tacit assignment defenses in France, as courts strictly require explicit contractual transfers.
What to monitor: Ensure comprehensive due diligence on the chain of title for all artistic works used in branding, packaging, and digital media.

items.title: Avanci unveils Wi-Fi 6 Vehicle programme with Mercedes as first licensee
items.title_zh: Avanci 推出 Wi-Fi 6 车载计划，奔驰成首家被许可人
items.title_en: Avanci Launches Wi-Fi 6 Vehicle Licensing Platform with Mercedes-Benz as First Licensee
items.summary: New platform has “significantly lower” rates than cellular SEP offering, says programme lead Qudus Olaniran
items.ai_summary_zh: 专利池运营商 Avanci 正式推出面向汽车行业的 Wi-Fi 6 标准必要专利许可计划，德国车企梅赛德斯 - 奔驰成为首个签约被许可人。项目负责人强调，该新平台的许可费率显著低于其现有的蜂窝通信 SEP 许可方案，旨在为车联网领域提供更适配的知识产权授权框架。
items.ai_summary_en: Patent pool administrator Avanci has officially introduced a new licensing program for Wi-Fi 6 standard essential patents tailored specifically for the automotive industry. German automaker Mercedes-Benz has become the first licensee to sign an agreement under this new framework. Qudus Olaniran, the program lead, emphasized that the royalty rates for this new platform are significantly lower than those of Avanci’s existing cellular SEP licensing offerings. This initiative aims to provide a more suitable intellectual property authorization framework for connected vehicle technologies. The launch marks a strategic expansion of Avanci’s portfolio beyond traditional cellular connectivity, addressing the growing integration of Wi-Fi standards in modern vehicles and offering market participants a distinct, cost-effective licensing pathway for non-cellular wireless technologies.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国车企及零部件出口商需关注 Wi-Fi 6 许可成本变化，评估加入新计划对整体合规成本的影响。建议提前梳理自身专利储备，利用费率差异优化谈判策略，避免重复付费。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants should closely monitor the evolving cost structures associated with Wi-Fi 6 licensing compared to established cellular SEP regimes. Understanding the rate differential is critical for optimizing overall compliance budgets and negotiating strategies. Companies must evaluate whether joining the new program offers tangible financial benefits or if it introduces unnecessary complexity. Furthermore, rights holders and implementers need to assess the risk of double charging as vehicle connectivity technologies converge. Proactive analysis of patent portfolios against both cellular and Wi-Fi standards will help ensure efficient licensing outcomes and prevent redundant payments in the connected car ecosystem.

items.title: BYD sued at UPC over former LG Energy Solution battery patents
items.title_zh: 比亚迪在统一专利法院因电池专利被诉
items.title_en: BYD Sued at UPC Over Former LG Energy Solution Battery Patents
items.summary: BMS Innovations lawsuit marks first time BYD has been sued at UPC post-Avanci licence
items.ai_summary_zh: BMS Innovations 在统一专利法院起诉比亚迪，指控其侵犯原属 LG 能源解决方案的电池专利。此案标志比亚迪在获得 Avanci 许可后，首次成为统一专利法院的被告，凸显电动汽车电池领域知识产权争端在欧洲司法层面的升级趋势。
items.ai_summary_en: BMS Innovations has initiated litigation against BYD at the Unified Patent Court (UPC), alleging infringement of battery patents previously owned by LG Energy Solution. This action represents a significant development in European intellectual property enforcement, marking the first time BYD has been named as a defendant in UPC proceedings since securing its Avanci licensing agreement. The case underscores an escalating trend in patent disputes within the electric vehicle battery sector, highlighting that existing pool licenses do not necessarily immunize manufacturers from targeted enforcement actions involving specific patent portfolios outside those agreements.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国车企即便获取部分许可，仍可能面临特定专利组合的单独诉讼。建议企业深化专利尽职调查，评估统一专利法院管辖风险，并制定针对性的无效或抗辩策略以应对潜在纠纷。
items.ai_insight_en: Securing a license through a major patent pool like Avanci does not grant immunity from separate infringement claims involving non-pool patents. Rights holders and manufacturers must recognize that individual entities may still pursue targeted litigation for specific technology assets excluded from broader licensing frameworks. Consequently, companies should conduct thorough freedom-to-operate analyses that extend beyond standard pool coverage. It is critical to assess potential exposure under the UPC’s jurisdiction early, preparing robust invalidity arguments and defensive strategies to address these distinct, high-stakes enforcement actions effectively.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["BMS Innovations 就前 LG 电池专利在 UPC 起诉比亚迪", "这是比亚迪获 Avanci 许可后首次在 UPC 遭遇诉讼挑战", "案件反映电动汽车电池技术领域的专利博弈日益激烈"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["BMS Innovations filed a lawsuit at the UPC against BYD regarding former LG Energy Solution battery patents.", "This marks BYD's first appearance as a defendant at the UPC following its recent Avanci licensing agreement.", "The dispute reflects intensifying patent competition and legal challenges within the European EV battery market."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["获许可不代表免疫，需警惕非池内专利的单独诉讼风险", "应针对统一专利法院特性，提前布局证据与法律应对方案"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Pool licenses do not cover all relevant IP; standalone suits remain a material risk for manufacturers.", "Practice note: Conduct comprehensive due diligence on non-pool patents and prepare UPC-specific defense strategies.", "What to monitor: Enforcement trends by non-practicing entities or competitors targeting specific battery technologies."]
core_points_en: BMS Innovations filed a lawsuit at the UPC against BYD regarding former LG Energy Solution battery patents.
This marks BYD's first appearance as a defendant at the UPC following its recent Avanci licensing agreement.
The dispute reflects intensifying patent competition and legal challenges within the European EV battery market.

items.title: BREAKING: Imminent new referral to the EBA on the relevance of G1/24 to added matter
items.title_zh: 突发：T 873/24 案就 G1/24 适用于新增事项向 EBA 转呈问题
items.title_en: Breaking: Board Refers Questions to EBA on G1/24 Impact on Added Matter Assessment
items.summary: The Board of Appeal in T 873/24 has decided to refer questions to the Enlarged Board of Appeal (EBA) on the application of G1/24 (claim interpretation) to the assessment of added matter. According to the minutes of oral proceedings, the Board of Appeal concluded that the case hinged on whether the order from G1/24 that the description and drawings should always be consulted for claim
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局技术上诉委员会在 T 873/24 案中决定，就 G1/24 号决定（关于权利要求解释）是否适用于“新增事项”评估这一问题，向扩大上诉委员会（EBA）转呈。案件核心争议在于，G1/24 确立的“必须结合说明书和附图解释权利要求”这一原则，在判断修改是否超出原申请范围时是否具有同等约束力。
items.ai_summary_en: The Technical Board of Appeal in case T 873/24 has decided to refer questions to the Enlarged Board of Appeal regarding the application of decision G1/24 to the assessment of added matter. The central legal issue concerns whether the principle established in G1/24, which mandates that claims must always be interpreted in light of the description and drawings, applies with equal force when determining if amendments introduce subject matter extending beyond the content of the original application. The Board concluded that the outcome of the case hinges on clarifying this specific scope of application. This referral seeks authoritative guidance on reconciling claim interpretation standards with the strict prohibition against adding new matter during prosecution.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧专利申请需关注解释规则变化，避免因依赖单一文本导致修改被拒。建议重新审视撰写策略，确保说明书充分支持各类潜在修改，以应对更严格的审查标准。
items.ai_insight_en: This development signals a potential shift in how European patent applications are examined for compliance with added matter provisions. Rights holders should anticipate stricter scrutiny of amendments, particularly where claim language relies heavily on descriptive support. It is prudent to review current drafting strategies to ensure that specifications provide robust support for various potential claim modifications. Proactively strengthening the descriptive basis can mitigate risks associated with future rejections based on extended subject matter, ensuring greater resilience during examination and opposition phases.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["上诉委员会认定案件取决于 G1/24 解释原则的适用范围", "正式向扩大上诉委员会转呈关于新增事项审查的法律问题", "明确说明书与附图在权利要求解释及修改审查中的关联性"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The Board determined that the case outcome depends entirely on defining the precise scope and applicability of the G1/24 interpretation principles.", "A formal referral has been submitted to the Enlarged Board of Appeal to resolve critical legal uncertainties concerning the assessment of added matter.", "The proceedings explicitly address the necessary connection between the description, drawings, and claims during both interpretation and amendment review."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["需强化说明书对权利要求修改的支撑力度以防新增事项驳回", "密切关注 EBA 最终裁决以调整欧洲专利申请文件撰写策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Strengthen specification support for claims to prevent rejection based on added matter issues during examination.", "Practice note: Monitor the final Enlarged Board of Appeal ruling closely to adjust European patent application drafting strategies accordingly.", "What to monitor: Track procedural updates in T 873/24 and subsequent EBA decisions impacting claim interpretation and amendment limits."]
core_points_en: The Board determined that the case outcome depends entirely on defining the precise scope and applicability of the G1/24 interpretation principles.
A formal referral has been submitted to the Enlarged Board of Appeal to resolve critical legal uncertainties concerning the assessment of added matter.
The proceedings explicitly address the necessary connection between the description, drawings, and claims during both interpretation and amendment review.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Strengthen specification support for claims to prevent rejection based on added matter issues during examination.
Practice note: Monitor the final Enlarged Board of Appeal ruling closely to adjust European patent application drafting strategies accordingly.
What to monitor: Track procedural updates in T 873/24 and subsequent EBA decisions impacting claim interpretation and amendment limits.

items.title: Injunction need not list products, but 40 auxiliary requests trigger tabular clarity requirements
items.title_zh: UPC 裁定禁令无需列明产品但大量辅助请求需表格化
items.title_en: UPC Ruling: Injunctions Need Not List Products, but Excessive Auxiliary Requests Require Tabular Clarity
items.summary: GlaxoSmithKline Biologicals v Moderna – The Hague Local Division, 18 February 2026, UPC_CFI_616/2025 and UPC_CFI_1439/2025
items.ai_summary_zh: 在 GSK 诉 Moderna 案中，UPC 海牙分部作出程序令：一是确认禁令请求无需限定具体产品名称，涵盖变体即可；二是针对 GSK 提交的 40 项有条件辅助请求，法院认为数量过多，责令其在一周内提交详细表格，明确每项请求的新增特征组合及对应的无效攻击点，否则后续组合需另行获批。
items.ai_summary_en: In GlaxoSmithKline Biologicals v Moderna, the UPC Hague Local Division issued a procedural order addressing key litigation strategies. First, the Court confirmed that injunction requests need not be limited to specific product names; relief covering variants and versions is sufficient. Consequently, adding Moderna’s updated vaccine mNEXSPIKE was not strictly necessary for scope, though permitted under Rule 263 RoP due to the recent EMA opinion. Second, regarding GSK’s forty conditional auxiliary requests filed under Rule 30.1 RoP, the Court found the volume excessive and potentially hindering speedy proceedings. It ordered GSK to submit a detailed table within one week, clearly mapping each request’s feature combinations to corresponding invalidity attacks. Failure to comply would restrict future submissions of combined features, ensuring procedural efficiency and clarity in complex patent disputes.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国药企在 UPC 诉讼中应避免堆砌大量辅助请求，需提前准备结构化表格以应对法院对清晰度的严苛要求。同时，利用禁令无需列明具体产品的规则，可更灵活地布局维权策略，覆盖潜在侵权变体。
items.ai_insight_en: Parties before the UPC should prioritize procedural efficiency when managing claim amendments and auxiliary requests. While broad injunction language effectively covers future product iterations, submitting numerous conditional claims requires rigorous organization. Courts may enforce tabular formats to ensure clarity and prevent delays. Litigants must balance comprehensive protection with judicial expectations for concise, convergent argumentation. Strategic drafting of statements of claim should anticipate potential product variations without relying on exhaustive lists, while maintaining readiness to present complex technical distinctions in a structured, court-friendly manner to avoid adverse procedural orders.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["禁令请求无需封闭列举具体产品名称，涵盖版本变体即可生效", "四十项辅助请求被指过量，法院强制要求以表格形式澄清特征组合", "未获批准的额外特征组合将受程序规则严格限制，不得随意提交"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Injunction requests do not require a closed list of specific product names, as coverage extends to relevant variants and versions.", "Forty auxiliary requests were deemed excessive, prompting the Court to mandate a structured table clarifying feature combinations.", "Unapproved additional feature combinations face strict procedural limits, preventing arbitrary submission without prior leave."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["应对 UPC 程序令时，务必将复杂辅助请求转化为清晰表格以避免被驳回", "起草禁令请求时应注重涵盖产品变体，无需拘泥于具体上市产品名称"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Broad injunction wording allows flexible enforcement against new product variants without constant amendment applications.", "Practice note: Convert complex auxiliary requests into clear tables linking features to invalidity grounds to satisfy clarity requirements.", "What to monitor: Judicial tolerance for the number of auxiliary requests and strict adherence to deadlines for structured submissions."]
core_points_en: Injunction requests do not require a closed list of specific product names, as coverage extends to relevant variants and versions.
Forty auxiliary requests were deemed excessive, prompting the Court to mandate a structured table clarifying feature combinations.
Unapproved additional feature combinations face strict procedural limits, preventing arbitrary submission without prior leave.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Broad injunction wording allows flexible enforcement against new product variants without constant amendment applications.
Practice note: Convert complex auxiliary requests into clear tables linking features to invalidity grounds to satisfy clarity requirements.
What to monitor: Judicial tolerance for the number of auxiliary requests and strict adherence to deadlines for structured submissions.

items.title: R.262A applications required to maintain confidentiality in UPC Proceedings | EIP
items.title_zh: UPC程序维持保密性需依规则262A提出申请
items.title_en: R.262A applications required to maintain confidentiality in UPC Proceedings | EIP
items.summary: The Court of Appeal clarified the necessity of formal applications to maintain confidentiality in Unified Patent Court (UPC) proceedings when disclosing ordered information. This ruling arose from a dispute involving patent infringement and confidentiality claims between EOFlow and Insulet.
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC上诉法院在EOFlow与Insulet案中裁定，若欲对法院命令披露的信息维持保密，必须依据《程序规则》第262A条正式提出申请。仅将文件标记为“高度机密”而未提交申请，不产生隐含的保密义务。因EOFlow未在披露后14天内申请，相关信息不再受保密保护，对方可自由使用。此裁决强调严格遵守保密申请程序的必要性。
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在参与UPC诉讼时，务必重视程序合规。一旦收到信息披露命令，需在14天内严格依据规则262A提交保密申请，切勿仅依赖系统标记。忽视此步骤将导致核心商业机密丧失法律保护，被对手利用于后续程序或他处，造成不可逆的商业损失。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["未依规则262A申请则无隐含保密义务，仅标记机密无效", "必须在披露后14天窗口期内提交保密申请以保留权利", "违反程序将导致信息失去保密性，对方可自由使用证据"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["严守14天窗口期，依规则262A提交保密申请", "避免仅靠系统标记，须通过正式程序确立保密效力"]

items.title: EUIPO supports major Europe-wide action against counterfeit medicines
items.title_zh: EUIPO 支持全欧打击假药重大行动
items.title_en: EUIPO Backs Major Europol-Led Operation Seizing Counterfeit Medicines Across Europe
items.summary: EUIPO supports major Europe-wide action against counterfeit medicines
items.ai_summary_zh: EUIPO 联合 Europol 等机构开展
items.ai_summary_en: The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) supported Operation SHIELD VI, a significant Europe-wide initiative led by Europol to combat counterfeit medicines and illicit doping substances. Conducted from April to November 2025, the operation involved authorities from thirty European countries, resulting in the seizure of EUR 32 million worth of fake pharmaceuticals. Enforcement actions included nearly 500 arrests, over 3,300 prosecutions, and investigations into more than forty organized crime groups. Authorities also shut down sixty-six websites facilitating these illegal sales. The seized items comprised over three million fake pills and substantial quantities of illegal doping products, including Semaglutide-based substances marketed as fat-burners. These counterfeits often mimic legitimate opioids, posing severe health risks such as poisoning and overdose. The EUIPO provided critical expertise in intellectual property crime analysis and online infringement trends, reinforcing coordinated efforts to protect public health and legitimate businesses throughout the European Union.
items.ai_insight_en: This operation highlights the escalating intersection between intellectual property infringement and serious public health threats. Rights holders must recognize that counterfeit pharmaceuticals are increasingly sophisticated, closely mimicking legitimate products to evade detection. The collaboration between IP offices, law enforcement, and health agencies like the EMA demonstrates a shift towards multi-agency enforcement strategies. For market participants, this signals a need for enhanced supply chain security and proactive monitoring of online platforms. The rise of unregulated e-commerce channels complicates traditional enforcement, requiring rights holders to adopt dynamic digital surveillance tools. Furthermore, consumer awareness campaigns are becoming integral to enforcement success, suggesting that educational initiatives should complement legal actions to effectively disrupt illicit markets and protect brand integrity.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EUIPO 联合 Europol 等机构开展"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Operation SHIELD VI resulted in seizures valued at EUR 32 million, involving millions of fake pills and illegal doping substances across thirty European nations.", "Enforcement actions led to nearly 500 arrests and over 3,300 prosecutions, targeting more than forty organized crime groups responsible for illicit pharmaceutical trade.", "Sixty-six websites selling counterfeit medicines were shut down, with EUIPO providing essential expertise on IP crime and online infringement trends."]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders should prioritize supply chain verification and collaborate with law enforcement to address the growing sophistication of pharmaceutical counterfe…", "Practice note: Integrate digital surveillance with physical enforcement strategies, leveraging multi-agency partnerships to tackle online infringement and organized crime networks.", "What to monitor: Track emerging trends in unregulated online sales platforms and the increasing use of AI-driven tools for detecting sophisticated product imitation techniques."]

Enforcement actions led to nearly 500 arrests and over 3,300 prosecutions, targeting more than forty organized crime groups responsible for illicit pharmaceutical trade.
Sixty-six websites selling counterfeit medicines were shut down, with EUIPO providing essential expertise on IP crime and online infringement trends.

items.title: Long arm not available for amended patent | EIP
items.title_zh: UPC 裁定：修改后的统一专利无法延伸至瑞士禁令
items.title_en: UPC Denies Swiss Injunction for Amended Unitary Patent Due to Validity Risks
items.summary: IMC Créations is a French company specialising in anti-theft systems for vehicles, particularly commercial vehicles. Among other things, it sells locks for the side and rear doors of commercial vehicles. Mul-T-Lock belongs to the Assa Abloy group and specialises in high security locking and access control systems, in particular pick-resistant keys and locks. IMC alleged that Mul-T-Lock’s MPV 1000 padlock infringes its unitary patent EP4153830 and the corresponding Swiss national validation.
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国 IMC 公司起诉 Mul-T-Lock 侵犯其统一专利及瑞士部分。IMC 在诉讼中无条件修改了统一专利权利要求。UPC 巴黎地方法院裁定，因修改暗示原授权版本存在无效风险，而瑞士部分未同步修改，故法院拒绝就瑞士部分颁发禁令，确立了 UPC 对非成员国专利行使长臂管辖的限制。
items.ai_summary_en: IMC Créations sued Mul-T-Lock for infringing its unitary patent and corresponding Swiss national validation. During proceedings, IMC unconditionally amended the patent claims to limit protection for unitary effect purposes. The UPC Paris Local Division ruled that it could not grant an injunction covering Switzerland, a non-UPC state. The court reasoned that the unilateral amendment implicitly acknowledged defects in the originally granted version, creating a serious risk of invalidity for the Swiss part, which was not similarly amended. Citing CJEU precedent, the court held it lacks jurisdiction to rule on the validity of national patents outside UPC territory when such validity is seriously challenged. Consequently, the court refused to exercise long-arm jurisdiction over the Swiss national part due to the linked validity concerns arising from the claim amendments.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧诉讼若涉及统一专利与非 UPC 国家（如瑞士、英国）组合，需谨慎对待权利要求修改。单方面为适应 UPC 标准而缩小保护范围，可能导致失去在非 UPC 国家的禁令救济，需统筹全局策略。
items.ai_insight_en: Rights holders pursuing cross-border enforcement involving both UPC member states and non-UPC jurisdictions like Switzerland or the UK must carefully coordinate claim strategies. Unilaterally narrowing claims to secure validity within the UPC system may inadvertently undermine the stability and enforceability of corresponding national validations. Courts may view such amendments as admissions of prior invalidity, potentially barring injunctive relief in non-UPC countries where parallel validity challenges arise. Strategic planning should assess how procedural choices in one forum impact substantive rights and remedies across all relevant territories.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC 无权裁决非成员国授予的专利部分有效性问题", "单方修改统一专利暗示原版本缺陷，导致瑞士部分面临无效风险", "当存在严重撤销风险时，UPC 拒绝对非成员国部分行使管辖权"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UPC lacks jurisdiction to adjudicate the validity of national patent parts granted by non-UPC member states.", "Unilateral amendment of a unitary patent implies defects in the original grant, risking invalidity for non-amended national parts.", "The UPC must refuse jurisdiction over non-member state patent parts when a serious risk of revocation exists."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["修改统一专利可能削弱对应国家部分的稳定性与执行力", "跨境维权需评估 UPC 裁决对非成员国专利效力的连带影响"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Amendments in UPC proceedings may weaken the enforceability of corresponding national patents in non-UPC states.", "Practice note: Coordinate claim scope modifications globally to avoid undermining validity arguments in parallel national actions.", "What to monitor: How UPC decisions on validity risks influence jurisdictional limits for non-UPC national patent parts."]
core_points_en: The UPC lacks jurisdiction to adjudicate the validity of national patent parts granted by non-UPC member states.
Unilateral amendment of a unitary patent implies defects in the original grant, risking invalidity for non-amended national parts.
The UPC must refuse jurisdiction over non-member state patent parts when a serious risk of revocation exists.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Amendments in UPC proceedings may weaken the enforceability of corresponding national patents in non-UPC states.
Practice note: Coordinate claim scope modifications globally to avoid undermining validity arguments in parallel national actions.
What to monitor: How UPC decisions on validity risks influence jurisdictional limits for non-UPC national patent parts.

items.title: Re-establishment of rights following failure to apply for a cost decision in time | EIP
items.title_zh: 因未及时申请费用决定而获准恢复权利的案例
items.title_en: UPC Grants Re-establishment of Rights After Missed Cost Decision Deadline Due to Legal Error
items.summary: The dispute arises out of earlier proceedings between Heraeus Electronics GmbH & Co. KG (claimant) and Vibrantz GmbH (defendant), relating to European Patent No. 3215288. The Munich Local Division issued a substantive decision on 10 October 2025 addressing infringement and a counterclaim for revocation. Among other findings, the court partially revoked the patent in three Contracting Member States and dismissed the infringement action. In its cost decision, the court apportioned 40% of the costs
items.ai_summary_zh: 慕尼黑地方分院审理 Heraeus 与 Vibrantz 专利纠纷时，原告因误判法律未按时提交费用分担申请。法院认定其代表虽犯法律评估错误，但具备完善监控体系且非疏忽，符合“应有谨慎”标准，例外批准恢复权利并受理逾期申请。
items.ai_summary_en: In proceedings before the Munich Local Division of the Unified Patent Court, the claimant missed the deadline to apply for a cost decision under Rule 151 of the Rules of Procedure. The claimant subsequently filed a late application alongside a request for re-establishment of rights under Rule 320. The court accepted that the representative’s failure resulted from an erroneous legal assessment regarding mixed cost ratios, rather than negligence. Despite the strict procedural requirements, the court found that the claimant maintained a robust internal monitoring system with four-eyes principles and random checks. Consequently, the court determined that the standard of due care was met and granted the re-establishment of rights, allowing the late application to proceed.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业需警惕 UPC 程序细节，即使有内部监控，法律误判仍可能导致失权。建议加强对 UPC 程序规则的专项培训，并在遇到程序障碍时迅速寻求专业救济。
items.ai_insight_en: Rights holders must ensure precise understanding of Unified Patent Court procedural rules, particularly regarding cost decisions under Rule 151. Even with robust internal deadline monitoring systems, relying on an incorrect legal interpretation of procedural obligations can lead to loss of rights. Legal teams should implement specialized training on UPC procedures and establish dual-check mechanisms for complex procedural deadlines. When facing procedural obstacles, parties should act swiftly to seek professional relief, ensuring that any error is documented as a genuine legal misapprehension rather than administrative negligence to satisfy due care requirements.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["原告因误以为无需申请而错过费用决定截止期", "法院认定法律理解错误在特定条件下可构成恢复理由", "确立 UPC 规则下权利恢复的严格但灵活适用标准"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The claimant missed the Rule 151 deadline due to a genuine but incorrect legal belief that no application was required in mixed cost scenarios.", "The court ruled that a specific legal misunderstanding can constitute a valid ground for re-establishment if supported by strong internal controls.", "This decision clarifies that UPC re-establishment standards remain strict yet allow flexibility when due care is demonstrably exercised."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["强化对 UPC 程序规则的精准理解与合规操作", "建立针对程序期限的双重核查与快速响应机制"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Ensure accurate interpretation of UPC cost decision rules to prevent inadvertent loss of reimbursement rights despite existing monitoring systems.", "Practice note: Implement rigorous dual-check protocols for procedural deadlines and provide targeted training on nuanced UPC procedural requirements.", "What to monitor: How courts assess 'due care' when legal errors occur within otherwise compliant administrative frameworks under the new patent court regime."]
core_points_en: The claimant missed the Rule 151 deadline due to a genuine but incorrect legal belief that no application was required in mixed cost scenarios.
The court ruled that a specific legal misunderstanding can constitute a valid ground for re-establishment if supported by strong internal controls.
This decision clarifies that UPC re-establishment standards remain strict yet allow flexibility when due care is demonstrably exercised.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Ensure accurate interpretation of UPC cost decision rules to prevent inadvertent loss of reimbursement rights despite existing monitoring systems.
Practice note: Implement rigorous dual-check protocols for procedural deadlines and provide targeted training on nuanced UPC procedural requirements.
What to monitor: How courts assess 'due care' when legal errors occur within otherwise compliant administrative frameworks under the new patent court regime.
